name: Rick Scott
subject: I hate to say it, but you’re not doing enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
|
Fellow American,

Every single quarter our incumbent senators and candidates challenging Democrats are being outraised – often by a 3-1 one margin. And don’t get me started on how much the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee has raised .... If you really want to know, it’s a whopping **$150,434,543.**

Take a look at the top Senate races in the country right now – I really want you to see the fundraising disparities between what our folks have been able to raise and what **DEMS are RAKING IN.**
**CASH IN THE BANK TOTALS**
**_MARCO RUBIO (R) | VAL DEMINGS (D) - FL

$22,690,972 | $30,773, 246

HERSCHEL WALKER | RAPHAEL WARNOCK - GA

$16,456,942 | $73,223,097

ADAM LAXALT (R) | CATHERINE CORTEZ MASTO (D) - NV

$5,887,721 | $19,733,755

DOCTOR OZ (R) | JOHN FETTERMAN (D) – PA

$15,071,813 | $16,032,524

TEDD BUDD (R) | Cheri Beasley (D) – NC

$4,537,743 | $9,626,759._**

So, there you have it, Fellow American, **the Republican nominee for Senate is not leading in the cash race in a single one of the races that I’ve listed above.**

As the chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Campaign, I can tell you with 100% certainty that we do not have enough money in the bank to pay for the TV ads necessary to promote each of the above candidates in the frequency which is needed to win.

[**That’s why I’m asking you to be generous today. Would you please make a gift of $10 or even $20 that we can spend for these five Senate nominees above?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a1c7d6dd77c490a8ee124485533d3b7&_e=w-ph0wOjiCR_DX_GSmNPiNV4fmC5V-uXzxRg3gDVEfSYE9cYrolPp_uadI31L_Jm--DTSh1m3PF3h9tcOsGQHc0k9KCWNU8B1qdf1uzLlDZPQsFjgKDIlGmpYnf_sxHiRs2GB2wM_VqT-UT4WMpkctj3OJTo5dzGQNDj-EbAY5CAD33WSS80_CfmSBvHb5Va6kEomRfSvFtCYgAcxzaUMGkrPvomoGf9Mq162VcMZ_Wzj-gdx07d16ClATKv4h7l5K1MY0lNaS9YDAY0vvOpHI4pX-e5jEYtq994mxGw6ms-cevlYK8CxSSRsKFCDjpIwxWx4jxx1aTukh29Vs4OE1T5xCkyCSJD3tnZwjA1In3QtcOgVOBPpwpo6wafVc873s71HahhV7tWbY-G9AXquLGJNuQvOIjLDg6BqiO3pegeivL07XiMhZF-FiVSQFtk5nO7U2fNniivl6oaU3RV9dHe6J9LeMO2z2Atm3mJFv0%3D) They need all of the help they can get – and quite frankly, we cannot afford to lose a single one of these races. If we do – well, you can say hello to two more years of Senate Democrat rule.

I know $10 or even $20 might be a lot right now, but can you imagine how bad things will get if Republicans don’t take control of the nation?

[**I need you to make a contribution right now or we risk losing it all!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a1c7d6dd77c490a8ee124485533d3b7&_e=w-ph0wOjiCR_DX_GSmNPiNV4fmC5V-uXzxRg3gDVEfSYE9cYrolPp_uadI31L_Jm--DTSh1m3PF3h9tcOsGQHc0k9KCWNU8B1qdf1uzLlDZPQsFjgKDIlGmpYnf_sxHiRs2GB2wM_VqT-UT4WMpkctj3OJTo5dzGQNDj-EbAY5CAD33WSS80_CfmSBvHb5Va6kEomRfSvFtCYgAcxzaUMGkrPvomoGf9Mq162VcMZ_Wzj-gdx07d16ClATKv4h7l5K1MY0lNaS9YDAY0vvOpHO3PHrR2AOUUw24TL20W0VdYUzNDRflGDlPJdde_zKv5mGmOehfF2vr_8v8tOaYEI0Gr6IW2aSZAmoGQTovqukY-0y8PKEzj7UahPQnBz5ynDkaueH7EB0RlQvj2jBdVqI8QroTUthJJ8sGXUJbcf6lM1pu4Ld0N9ZAWtTw6l-fCMWEDyhfQ43I8O5Q7R6OPjN3m495JQ7RSnvfpEy1cc3s%3D)

[** « Save the Senate candidates above CHIP IN TODAY » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a1c7d6dd77c490a8ee124485533d3b7&_e=w-ph0wOjiCR_DX_GSmNPiNV4fmC5V-uXzxRg3gDVEfSYE9cYrolPp_uadI31L_Jm--DTSh1m3PF3h9tcOsGQHc0k9KCWNU8B1qdf1uzLlDZPQsFjgKDIlGmpYnf_sxHiRs2GB2wM_VqT-UT4WMpkctj3OJTo5dzGQNDj-EbAY5CAD33WSS80_CfmSBvHb5Va6kEomRfSvFtCYgAcxzaUMGkrPvomoGf9Mq162VcMZ_Wzj-gdx07d16ClATKv4h7l5K1MY0lNaS9YDAY0vvOpHCO08ALdJS4AjC6BCXwNMYTUMRV7zUVTyJUvNTi_sEATrfKRRNjxPBgyH_S7jv11ukmVRn_xlkbWmc1Quq2jj22zeQutpkPOfqKp0TryM3Ptx9cMSStbhp6qBypql139k5umIhfMOpxUy-hdDU_nD27NhNA_Orn5nRbndtcr1o78_80bXfwQhxabyScXO6Eb4Jtm4qpJTuH2PNaf1W5eOWY%3D)
Thanks,
Senator Rick Scott

name: Are You Still a Republican
subject: Please be truthful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden | ****
---
**URGENT:
_The number of Americans identifying as Republican is the lowest it has been in a decade -- (from Gallup Polling)_**
* * *

Listen, we're trusting you to tell us the truth...

| Have you left the Republican Party?

[** ****No, I'm still a Republican ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bf693c1077454a1f9283879be1bfef69&_e=6UvgstlWKzooQEmiXXcOftZwRk_CVl5np1EjFBtAkopG9xGJ8vSZlLJLgMUCMeHlYR0QOkwov4xDHeGP-rbW-vNf4Sfi_r5k-e96c3mn-R5I4-rRPkx0U_YFVTUWGOoxmrrVuELBZdtq5e_8lzClqrn2-pRx81SGxpne6hxQCEp54atO3rbcJgfKmckGJVBfUqyeP5fnuk3WSISuJUGE02xzca5op-tr-p_ig6d3-w3-ZvtCTRz6tgRTK_bjkzbA4hzIcg7EhHUhNi6sXafh1k273hRQx-N4jbT-uzcIFMFtyOUF1GGfSMDB676fFEHyP3yD-LQ5L4mv5Bm6OBVyKCp6awXMX5q9ez7bCfG5FUr8LUGCwWLFJwQROklUDDH7EhL8FNUKUoN3DyKlWfGm8cjUh557wCWP5HCACDrSI_ctwDNMTX1Y5fORRtG28GWb69RSw_ozd345kqZWvjPcosIvtCQCfaXlaXjB0CQnzZ4%3D)

A recent release from Gallup polling is being used to back liberal media claims that Republicans are _"leaving the party in droves"_ \-- and if it's true, it means the worst has happened...and that support for Joe Biden is growing.

Is it true? [**Respond now ➞**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bf693c1077454a1f9283879be1bfef69&_e=6UvgstlWKzooQEmiXXcOftZwRk_CVl5np1EjFBtAkopG9xGJ8vSZlLJLgMUCMeHlYR0QOkwov4xDHeGP-rbW-vNf4Sfi_r5k-e96c3mn-R5I4-rRPkx0U_YFVTUWGOoxmrrVuELBZdtq5e_8lzClqrn2-pRx81SGxpne6hxQCEp54atO3rbcJgfKmckGJVBfUqyeP5fnuk3WSISuJUGE02xzca5op-tr-p_ig6d3-w3-ZvtCTRz6tgRTK_bjkzbA2MCzHM6VhrRAt-J4Jkdvs6Vkn_E-FJ_Cfrxhe-ouGUxlTqGnM1QKBf651yyWvbSZZAfakrR2KCo-p715vfheqfjsMVY71hDM-fV48Gfd8jVZJdu6ehnVbwCzf5FPXClOXa-x5Ts1oVkESutUIiKWd4EB_IuZNhqZaGNL8AEmVWGTM2Glr6SqkeYzFrPL5PxEgjy7VOsOo2P7gnIUlBjnPIFkI7Ob6Sa4yACzEN8bu8M%3D)

**Please do not delay for even a second.** We need to hear back from you ASAP. _We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST_ or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden. Only with your input can we work to build a winning Republican strategy and retake the Senate.

Will you respond using the buttons above?

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/85378dde6ca8/announcing-watermen-for-kelly-11818455?e=64ac72257a)
---
| | [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=7a99334159&e=64ac72257a)
---
| |
# Dear Peter,
I recently had the opportunity to sit down with WBAL to discuss my plans to make Maryland safe, steady and prosperous, and I wanted to share it with you.
---
| [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=ea7044a774&e=64ac72257a)
---
| **We are two days into early voting I am humbly asking for your support today, and asking you to vote EARLY! **

Early voting in Maryland runs from July 7 - July 14 from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM (including Saturday and Sunday).

[**Early voting locations are located in every county and can be found online here**](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=9b634fd372&e=64ac72257a).

We are not only battling my primary opponent but we are also battling the Democratic Governors Association.

Voters aren't buying it and we need your help to continue to spread our message, and let the DGA know they have no business playing in the Maryland Republican Primary.

[Can you chip in $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 today?](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=1c538c9160&e=64ac72257a)

Your support means the world to me.

Let's do this!

Thank you,
---
|
---
| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Peter, I recently had the opportunity to sit down with WBAL to discuss my plans to make Maryland safe, steady and prosperous, and I wanted to share it with you. | | We are two days into early voting I am humbly asking for your support today, and asking you to vote EARLY! Early voting in Maryland runs from July 7 - July 14 from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM (including Saturday and Sunday). . We are not only battling my primary opponent but we are also battling the Democratic Governors Association. Voters aren't buying it and we need your help to continue to spread our message, and let the DGA know they have no business playing in the Maryland Republican Primary. Your support means the world to me. Let's do this! Thank you, | | Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | | "Contribute" | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | kellyschulzforgovernor.com | | | Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc.; Treasurer: Sam Malhotra. | Our mailing address is: Kelly Schulz for GovernorPO Box 6528Annapolis, MD 21401-0528 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=1)
---
### July 8, 2022
Friend -- We hope you had a great Fourth of July weekend! It’s been an exciting week for election integrity and a bad news week for Democrats as the headlines pile on against their Senate candidates. As we approach the midway point of the summer, Wisconsin Republicans are knocking on doors, holding [**events**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0SsIN05Kq52csGqnQtqVEFs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=2) , and speaking to voters in every corner of the state. If you would like to join us in our efforts to further secure election integrity and mobilize in support of Republican candidates up and down the ballot, you can sign up to volunteer on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=3). As always, thanks for all you do! \- Team WisGOP | Today, the Wisconsin Supreme Court [**ruled**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouMY56iXwJLM5qB_PC47au0bhxD9oecxr8rPOg-M9K0Le4LiRbW0JcRVnvG0cNGKGLPKuPzwmtTCORvaDcdItHZ2O4iaXu2o1qk7QA_krHlMDSJGYI3s52oWeNbqAgUsodjzRoBIGB_5EuE-74IOqouc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=4) that the use of ballot drop boxes and ballot harvesting is illegal. The Republican Party of Wisconsin has long disputed the abuse of ballot drop boxes as creating a massive risk of fraud by allowing additional individuals to handle ballots, and joined the RNC and NRSC in an amicus brief in this case. This is a massive win for election integrity – but we can’t stop here. We need to elect a Republican governor who will stand up for voter confidence and sign the election integrity [**bills**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eH7mQqnwg7TiRkzkxQsBEiy2QEaRvsvV0RjO0WcIwL3&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=5) vetoed by Tony Evers. If you want to help us send Tony Evers packing, you can sign up to volunteer [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bfZhAig058TAIOJhSOZVp8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=6).
This week, Democrats gathered for their first official debate hosted through the Dane County Democrats. As expected, it didn’t take them long to start competing over who could be the most far-left, as they quickly touted their ideas to pack the Supreme Court with activist liberal justices, fine businesses over Biden-fueled inflation, and implement socialist policies like government-run health care and the Green New Deal. You can read our statement on the event [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0dw8isG0tkIdsqzYn69lEmHWUhKYVUocO6cvDdz7w-qjNs0I8KiyapQVxetJLOdkx9nXbu5q2HgnK9pF7g_fo92-On9U12XLH212xl_A0fbb&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=7). | |
While Wisconsin Democrats held their State Convention in La Crosse at the end of June, the WisGOP was out in full force and holding Democrats accountable. In addition to our three [**billboards**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0Zg2IYhNgmeJ-zqoThCSP4zh8IdIayK5k040rsyWXHGXKYVPf7pMYZn2JR1T5xyv3xVAMfM9x6hzy_UneGA-uWI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=8) bringing attention to Democrats’ failures on inflation and crime, our [**mobile billboard**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TrLCdjL6HzWBUqPfp7F3TiWllKDVKUBeDyCMo_ZWFMBEYrFAGnmHKaiQdUcQdgcg-ou2I1coTpEXrsQfzS-njL4fDz5zmFhJe4rzzWB1yUkx&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=9) drove around the convention site and our field staff distributed [**“gas cards”**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TrLCdjL6HzWBUqPfp7F3TiXJfML-BOx7sBOI6E3ld2f58d3EtLzdv3Zf6G64_nPsILDdSNBFr1BVEiTZ-gM7Cu4GltdzTuLOTsITiUeabXvA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=10) to Western Wisconsin voters who were tired of high gas prices. Read this Twitter [**thread**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TrLCdjL6HzWBUqPfp7F3TiWDSIvI-5Op9BjGTGuu2MjQiFv-MEgzNhaZC7318qHenB_banigQoW3mZ9jmWngi86_IKiggq787pQChsao-bjq&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=11) for a recap! Over the Fourth of July weekend, Wisconsinites joined together to celebrate the independence of our nation and honor the sacrifices of those who have fought our freedoms. But in a [**video**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=nV7BfVKeJi0zWKBWeoL2El5uI2cTAgHpDbS6q5lUu-vebymCRBYrWeyRpIyl2wezzjuraovZhQuJtROaiq5mnnbquol5I742NKaphmvi_a-6k5sUZish9kcJkDo_C6V819qjTUcYEA8gcJ1O6ypa7zMF3fOW55w_nJbMrodXd-5HZK8h8y1YuDEFaqyYNWvmrBUM82CWVhm-cErIuc3fvQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=12) uncovered by Dan O’Donnell, AOC-endorsed Senate candidate Mandela Barnes said that when America was founded, “things were bad. Things were terrible. The founding of this nation? Awful!" Democrats like AOC and Mandela Barnes are ashamed to be Americans, which is why they want to dismantle our institutions by packing the Supreme Court, defunding the police, and forcing their woke CRT agenda into our schools. We need to elect a U.S. Senator who will defend America – not work to cancel it.
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=13) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=14)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**SHOT/CHASER: Anti-“Big Money” Mandela Barnes Begs for Help from Super PACs**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0VTgV0Q9fWPZI29_lOTZX6RGETc29fGmUgEeDYqAEDwonvyC4wIk6BnSWYHIfcXEGoUXxogTvLydRiBagt9noy3eWKIBPIENOZ3xozNNSO4s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=15)_
On Mandela Barnes’ campaign website, voters can read about Barnes’ disdain for “big money” in politics and “corporate special interests [that] dump millions into Super PACs to influence our elections.” On the same campaign website, Barnes also instructs Super PACs to share his talking points with “Democratic primary voters, especially those in the Milwaukee, Madison and the Green Bay media markets.”
### _[**Democrats Are Wrong for Wisconsin**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bahKKlBD1BEgUuZ7JCjMxeELxUeZDBcszvwGgnULg1UPlxp8NifqV2pmgJ4YCtriA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=16)_
At the end of June, Wisconsin Democrats gathered for their first State Convention in three years. Despite holding the governor’s office and the White House, Democrat leadership has been devoid of accomplishment as Wisconsinites continue to struggle with sky-high prices, a crippled supply chain, and rising crime.
### _[**Dems Unable to Control Crisis on Southern Border**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0WyKbxCni-JClU-5oEtEh3OGxep_PoMB7cFlaIBlPX2OfZlZCmbP-V5PvT3GcpcQBSYE6LLDkKKVIZPBvMBUk_E&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=17)_
In a 5-4 decision, the Supreme Court ruled that President Joe Biden has the authority to repeal the Trump administration’s “Remain in Mexico” policy, which has been used to limit the flow of migrants and drugs across the porous southern border. This would only make the crisis on the border even worse for our border security, law enforcement, and communities.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwNZhwym6thyTGRVj0bx_vg1BO9Qovo6X_xE3KziFUENl_bSMujLrb6kLAiCCgSsAuWOYaHqodOqiOJPJ-UAvlpjX-SjWGOAOl0Lk6ARM7dlh&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=18) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=Oxetox6b01gIF0LfYtJzIltgS1r4TGW_yJzVGlxI4wiOauwAOiCft6CFcN1xqQyOhawNGF1CUJb_tM50H6Dz6uT_feZm-btq4H72I3QXJK9z0aqsXvC3sZdxH56Hv_H69m2rtr9LrW9L954YxkfS4smjEzrQW26ameMfmoHNnj1wZYuxas26DsAcFdl2MMvYhffbdU0ZJPU3ecEB4afZ7w&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=19) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouOV2KboXRy4Y9QenqkDQGqtijcTUFmLSJY9D2AKeJMv-38SZuDgjxoPHkcjiDXxqLoRjV4zlK9L1LBdiKn3idJq_9wZvoqfILaI36MU62lkemGlxpJ9wB9Yq9LGQUvEZBvjIPROUqfmu-DA3vyQlGGs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=20) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwJbi2M7NthYW5tZxJTxoyzfWzeLF9w6h4gdOrm6SNl7_XG8pnSzSFq8DfjETcNqtM1-in_PRWQOH9lRs_0ISoxjwNdwfdCiWndqTlmD03udq&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_8_22_v1&n=21)

clean_body: The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin | | July 8, 2022 Friend -- We hope you had a great Fourth of July weekend! It’s been an exciting week for election integrity and a bad news week for Democrats as the headlines pile on against their Senate candidates. As we approach the midway point of the summer, Wisconsin Republicans are knocking on doors, holding , and speaking to voters in every corner of the state. If you would like to join us in our efforts to further secure election integrity and mobilize in support of Republican candidates up and down the ballot, you can sign up to volunteer on our website . As always, thanks for all you do! \- Team WisGOP | Today, the Wisconsin Supreme Court that the use of ballot drop boxes and ballot harvesting is illegal. The Republican Party of Wisconsin has long disputed the abuse of ballot drop boxes as creating a massive risk of fraud by allowing additional individuals to handle ballots, and joined the RNC and NRSC in an amicus brief in this case. This is a massive win for election integrity – but we can’t stop here. We need to elect a Republican governor who will stand up for voter confidence and sign the election integrity vetoed by Tony Evers. If you want to help us send Tony Evers packing, you can sign up to volunteer . This week, Democrats gathered for their first official debate hosted through the Dane County Democrats. As expected, it didn’t take them long to start competing over who could be the most far-left, as they quickly touted their ideas to pack the Supreme Court with activist liberal justices, fine businesses over Biden-fueled inflation, and implement socialist policies like government-run health care and the Green New Deal. You can read our statement on the event . | | While Wisconsin Democrats held their State Convention in La Crosse at the end of June, the WisGOP was out in full force and holding Democrats accountable. In addition to our three bringing attention to Democrats’ failures on inflation and crime, our drove around the convention site and our field staff distributed to Western Wisconsin voters who were tired of high gas prices. Read this Twitter for a recap! Over the Fourth of July weekend, Wisconsinites joined together to celebrate the independence of our nation and honor the sacrifices of those who have fought our freedoms. But in a uncovered by Dan O’Donnell, AOC-endorsed Senate candidate Mandela Barnes said that when America was founded, “things were bad. Things were terrible. The founding of this nation? Awful!" Democrats like AOC and Mandela Barnes are ashamed to be Americans, which is why they want to dismantle our institutions by packing the Supreme Court, defunding the police, and forcing their woke CRT agenda into our schools. We need to elect a U.S. Senator who will defend America – not work to cancel it. ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... On Mandela Barnes’ campaign website, voters can read about Barnes’ disdain for “big money” in politics and “corporate special interests [that] dump millions into Super PACs to influence our elections.” On the same campaign website, Barnes also instructs Super PACs to share his talking points with “Democratic primary voters, especially those in the Milwaukee, Madison and the Green Bay media markets.” At the end of June, Wisconsin Democrats gathered for their first State Convention in three years. Despite holding the governor’s office and the White House, Democrat leadership has been devoid of accomplishment as Wisconsinites continue to struggle with sky-high prices, a crippled supply chain, and rising crime. In a 5-4 decision, the Supreme Court ruled that President Joe Biden has the authority to repeal the Trump administration’s “Remain in Mexico” policy, which has been used to limit the flow of migrants and drugs across the porous southern border. This would only make the crisis on the border even worse for our border security, law enforcement, and communities. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content**

Peter,

Up until just recently, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “**self-hating Hispanic** ,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its **HISTORY**.

** PLEASE LET ME EXPLAIN WHY I'M EMAILING YOU TODAY.**

**First:** Three short weeks ago, my friend Mayra Flores made history by flipping a **South Texas U.S. House seat Republican for the first time** , sending a loud message to the entire political class in Washington that as suspected, Hispanic voters are leaving the Democrat Party in DROVES.

**Then:** _Politico_ called my race “**central** ” to Republican’s efforts to flip the House. If you recall, the district I’m running to represent in Congress has **NEVER elected a Republican** to serve our interests in Washington. Democrats have a 100% winning streak dating back to **1903**. ** **

**Now:** I officially have an opponent. After waiting more than a year to find out who my general election opponent is going to be, I’m writing to tell you that I’ll be facing off against Michelle Vallejo. **She’s a far-left Democrat and she just won her primary by a mere 35 votes.**

To be frank, that’s almost incomprehensible. **35 votes**. I’ve been trying to let that sink in. I could easily fit **35** people into my home for an open house. **35** people have been at my campaign headquarters making phone calls and strategizing how to win this pivotal Congressional race.

**[I'm asking 35 conservatives reading this right now to make a gift to my campaign before midnight. The race between Michelle and I could be equally as close as her primary race; we MUST be prepared for that possibility.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=f2bedfff44be4002ad6d37365f5e8735&_e=dV9wdBgyyJIT5B_3hRXNDDkprG52v6GRBtKGdbnWwi_DDmXqFujeCzm9KESQdGsnoA3zhDExNnYNVFxpyL43EJEUAy5B_vXu681gwWY6Q-V2gUhxXBg7Zyp3UkUOSdDcYO4L3M6OFvCPigEesHV3K1bxLLthbLIZ-SK57eKJaXGYmBypJ8x-F3GVzzBcOyNglvKp9UJnteIcp7xus21JPod7AwbwyRKsLRbM02ebZtxG3g9bxWTEz0kqpPAQHt0upLFKR5eluu1TxELoHyTEScmWgfTwUDAajGSZQWZZgBDe3ezycAPW3GqZZbtfg2954gGFEGSbIcQxLoYdvSFQndF4EkYDbzuaIy_LnYj0wAsGADdpjeggYUC43pueQuKMOOkj7KTHrSsQnuRihn36VgScGKZPEm5wpStKUzZGhryygFz8mpdsoxuMiX-aQTf7DL16gXo0tkjEbroe9KW5R3VkzI4LRhecDnrYx62pD04%3D) **

[** 35 Donations
Needed by Midnight ➞ **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=f2bedfff44be4002ad6d37365f5e8735&_e=dV9wdBgyyJIT5B_3hRXNDDkprG52v6GRBtKGdbnWwi_DDmXqFujeCzm9KESQdGsnoA3zhDExNnYNVFxpyL43EJEUAy5B_vXu681gwWY6Q-V2gUhxXBg7Zyp3UkUOSdDcYO4L3M6OFvCPigEesHV3K1bxLLthbLIZ-SK57eKJaXGYmBypJ8x-F3GVzzBcOyNglvKp9UJnteIcp7xus21JPod7AwbwyRKsLRbM02ebZtxG3g9bxWTEz0kqpPAQHt0uej7iVIjqP9FlZq06b34FIhu9mrtaoB631VMJIq5NHijTWppQOb2M3bOe44OGziTR7TOiqloB9hPLbixbfRACBLsrSBPY5fNrTq_NqfDVBNdFR_60e0kfFJiMIGKvT3Cto5nZZjjFyV6uY1yddIhBiFTP1bMWipb1tmevLZIcUrEdD_SoJFHR58Bl0_h5kJaFDuj8jnemynWvkksQ9wirXndwV8QPSTq1zlm5LbHhxeU%3D)
I won’t lie to you – the general election race between me and Ms. Vallejo is going to be cutthroat. **Can you imagine if the margin of victory in November in our race comes down to less than 100 votes?

** WITH my eye on November, I’m determined to flip this district RED for the first time in more than 100 years. Equally as determined are the Democrats who know that once they lose this seat, it’ll be gone for good. **That’s why I’m coming to you today with an urge plea:**

**I need 35 donors to chip in $10 or more by midnight tonight. I don’t want to take any chances of not having the money to win this race and help flip the House. The close nature of my own race in 2020 (**__I fell short 6,000 votes__**) and the 35 votes my opponent won by last month has me worried.**

[** 35 Donations
Needed by Midnight ➞ **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=f2bedfff44be4002ad6d37365f5e8735&_e=dV9wdBgyyJIT5B_3hRXNDDkprG52v6GRBtKGdbnWwi_DDmXqFujeCzm9KESQdGsnoA3zhDExNnYNVFxpyL43EJEUAy5B_vXu681gwWY6Q-V2gUhxXBg7Zyp3UkUOSdDcYO4L3M6OFvCPigEesHV3K1bxLLthbLIZ-SK57eKJaXGYmBypJ8x-F3GVzzBcOyNglvKp9UJnteIcp7xus21JPod7AwbwyRKsLRbM02ebZtxG3g9bxWTEz0kqpPAQHt0u_4Ig7hLSuDFy50DkIkQUpU-_qeSvXMXs19MTQe7xdEtpqT_S_MK_fSzFamakEJzWcQXsTiVwOoubK25XymezAPyTvRxGVTJkODj_1Zoj1SKA868ErrC_ilJs7ouF62wDwvfFye2Q4CoqJKu_1_VIhD1GsZ1S-aChafvHK4I-97UVF99lDLfx7tqhBreb9On4pgNPM40jif2FnkOzkuM5U9-4pms21bPZ73XKm5QDkLQ%3D)

South Texas is finished with the empty promises and failed leadership of the increasingly socialist Democrat Party. **[Are you with me?](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=f2bedfff44be4002ad6d37365f5e8735&_e=dV9wdBgyyJIT5B_3hRXNDDkprG52v6GRBtKGdbnWwi_DDmXqFujeCzm9KESQdGsnoA3zhDExNnYNVFxpyL43EJEUAy5B_vXu681gwWY6Q-V2gUhxXBg7Zyp3UkUOSdDcYO4L3M6OFvCPigEesHV3K1bxLLthbLIZ-SK57eKJaXGYmBypJ8x-F3GVzzBcOyNglvKp9UJnteIcp7xus21JPod7AwbwyRKsLRbM02ebZtxG3g9bxWTEz0kqpPAQHt0u2dZz43Bx8rKB7MWhNQ_wV6qNSvEbFOnDXCPqMTpRunYQ4xCl7gRxQjC5Yo_29rgz_Rp0Za7hXvb5lYuP7JChinSWlME1gTiCWJwkVIKefaKPAuSsPEBS_OTu-j2IvRxWPZg-KJmwTwNp8g-EFiqVK0CE1ZEJ-pcgK3GxvZ2a0o7L3Q9SHDs77tYn8kexiTMIpcqt8MFkgG7BqOb1ceHBZwKH3j10iKHVHS_gnkfHbD0%3D)**

Thank you!

Monica De La Cruz!
Republican for Congress - TX-15

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, I recently had the opportunity to sit down with WBAL to discuss my plans to make Maryland safe, steady and prosperous, and I wanted to share it with you. We are two days into early voting I am humbly asking for your support today, and asking you to vote EARLY! Early voting in Maryland runs from July 7 - July 14 from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM (including Saturday and Sunday). We are not only battling my primary opponent but we are also battling the Democratic Governors Association. Voters aren't buying it and we need your help to continue to spread our message, and let the DGA know they have no business playing in the Maryland Republican Primary. Your support means the world to me. Let's do this! Thank you, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

Peter,

After successfully getting our television ad up, there’s been a powerful surge in our grassroots movement.

Team Bolding is still fighting to have our message heard and we need your help to keep our ad on the air.

**[We need to raise a total of $5,000 if we want to get more ads out to the people of Arizona and we need your help to do it. Could you rush a donation of $10 to help us meet our goal?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xge0pMVtDvl17n3LmhcoY0pPf73Jrky9_3-I8f9sXnncYV3_09B4MmrlSlQQgwvaqPVuQ9yZE-2GZ5JMolW8ekH5C7L7woR4ISHOIZnFTDWC3xZo0nIF6oz4Xb_FDgeApsYuCv2LepL7Hqsw9eDPu6RsaeYa2d4R5vnSCc45hbpupnGODwB_qbGIEPZMEZ99DNV5TIB5OOqIyl1T0KPt245pjXMuQJ1sPwwKqEVTxNurDzk2Err4tyrvsxhwNcxMCgGSXYLFEmNbuFSypfVH5wQ2pKe5B9x6uO8LYlwn6OXA/3nl/vDiVYgURRGieYYb8rL1TNA/h1/jGMtCJwJwDu-5VQZ-6DaDgLCNpVooLCxSR_TEV460Ec)**

The Arizona Secretary of State has an important job of keeping elections free and fair and right now, far-right extremists are trying to take this election away from us.

If these extremists win, they can change the course of all elections. We can’t let this happen.

If we don’t raise $1k **every single day** until Monday, we won’t be able to keep our message on the air– and extremists will be the only voice on the airwaves!

**[Please, Peter, donate anything you can to help us reach our goal!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xge0pMVtDvl17n3LmhcoY0pPf73Jrky9_3-I8f9sXnncYV3_09B4MmrlSlQQgwvaqPVuQ9yZE-2GZ5JMolW8ek0Chr98SXyDnOZG2rsZdtbR3UQ6_6YGZE5770CcY2frcyK02aVvCcgeOT4E6H5nd0ynjnSFyt2YrGo4r8eoL5SA7hrabVyZjLU3uZq163YecelDefhmvfAN22pH60fEdRwIsg82aAZq1Iz_Pn79epCOi4BZwtR_S4LcVP8kq3Mzm0UjPCLwYQnZrtCa5ySG3jPSJ1JwBown7QVHhykAXydA/3nl/vDiVYgURRGieYYb8rL1TNA/h2/hNP2golVqeFACo4sc1EQNsIdE4Mu6rpIQUqWschknPk)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Reginald Bolding is running for Secretary of State to strengthen democracy in Arizona. As the Democratic leader in Arizona’s House of Representatives, Reginald fought for economic relief, criminal justice reform, public education, and led the charge against right-wing voter suppression. **Reginald will continue to defend every Arizonan's right to free, fair, and secure elections as Arizona Secretary of State.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, After successfully getting our television ad up, there’s been a powerful surge in our grassroots movement. Team Bolding is still fighting to have our message heard and we need your help to keep our ad on the air. The Arizona Secretary of State has an important job of keeping elections free and fair and right now, far-right extremists are trying to take this election away from us. If these extremists win, they can change the course of all elections. We can’t let this happen. If we don’t raise $1k every single day until Monday, we won’t be able to keep our message on the air– and extremists will be the only voice on the airwaves! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, this is our chance to change history and protect the freedom to vote. We couldn’t do this without you, Team Bolding Reginald Bolding is running for Secretary of State to strengthen democracy in Arizona. As the Democratic leader in Arizona’s House of Representatives, Reginald fought for economic relief, criminal justice reform, public education, and led the charge against right-wing voter suppression. Reginald will continue to defend every Arizonan's right to free, fair, and secure elections as Arizona Secretary of State. Paid for by Friends of Reginald Bolding. Fellow American,

I have some good and bad news.

| **THE GOOD:** thanks to the help of generous Team Herschel supporters, we've finally launched our FIRST TV ad of the general election!

**THE BAD:** we're not up on as many stations as we originally planned. We had to make some cuts to our media plan - but you can help us change that.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Do you still watch the local news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Will you help Team Herschel get our new ad up during tonight’s local news? |
---
Fellow American,

If you watched local news in Georgia, you'd know Raphael Warnock has been attacking me non-stop.

While some folks don't watch local news anymore, many still watch it religiously. And those who watch local news broadcasts are very likely to vote.

As you may know, we just launched our first TV ad of the general election. **[You can view it here:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0340a9a42d9645808e7938c1038052a6&_e=ANaWruo4LvKgjDOGTwKkY7xTfB-ybITAkmkluCrpfpGZU4lMgBNMt35dZTcotWmU6I0dyGexhtwnVInk2zNetFPRZ_gUPb0jQY0cJtUcrY9wUrhjmoNgy470EEj17XZMmaZmoMj-8wFXmbSf91vWqN9XO978lr6DLba11mEyMYSGZViCslHv9-FflDYQHgkX6i8A9Iw8migxNjUKgifStXYQQTevyeRkswf0-ijQdlsNbbLM_8PrapRmWtb5LVeXfVRcrNnxflxf7M-3F8ZjHMgZy85bIh7Qw7fgKrMjW-cwpi5cCY5Do-NU3pOH6rbALiXdIBhwXe9ipVqbg5T2Pc1NJLM4rfeVcTEgyT14eW23WaxW-cDjjoly7LMWMYBKhY4xeZi6-gMNRBpRlERh5ioPvknVZl7toQgNJ5S54mA1d4gCm7p9QqahtrurHnTZFoKggjGG-ECkUv9dL3Qzufbtlb6iwquFhPPjbHH0W7NNaP-aCvs0iko01GF8VCkKpRM9X12OA3H3OB_q-ySH5w%3D%3D)**

Our ad is running on several stations, but we need to expand our advertising buy to run it more often in more areas.

It costs $265 to run one ad during the local evening news on WRDW-TV in Augusta, Georgia. And it's not enough to do it just one night of the week because some might not see it. We need to run it seven nights per week during that time slot. That's $265 x 7 = $1,855.

**[Would you please consider sponsoring our new ad on WRDW-TV with a donation of $265- or be 1 of 26 people who chip in $10 to help us cobble the money together before noon tomorrow?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0340a9a42d9645808e7938c1038052a6&_e=ANaWruo4LvKgjDOGTwKkY7xTfB-ybITAkmkluCrpfpGZU4lMgBNMt35dZTcotWmU6I0dyGexhtwnVInk2zNetFPRZ_gUPb0jQY0cJtUcrY9wUrhjmoNgy470EEj17XZMmaZmoMj-8wFXmbSf91vWqN9XO978lr6DLba11mEyMYSGZViCslHv9-FflDYQHgkX6i8A9Iw8migxNjUKgifStXYQQTevyeRkswf0-ijQdlsNbbLM_8PrapRmWtb5LVeXfVRcrNnxflxf7M-3F8ZjHMgZy85bIh7Qw7fgKrMjW-dgfOaEYGa7-fzqyJhwM70Qilb4gAC9p-HzFXomJjMjNcINYJrnu43MsB_THc_GO85xvzLuf8m_kwW1I-eZyd7ML9NkT1nG8402Mjdaw3sxVautgDTWwbBkFl97mwuO4lJLrFHsFAy0a8dYm8-Ye7YFtqQDLByUZagbOBtiR7AoJsvK3n8wm_R9Cp_xKsapYCepS7R3lpqkRxQfk40XJO7wiagdAs_2QakwRnm89TJLHA%3D%3D)** It's critical that we expand our media buy and talk directly to more voters.

Our opponent in this race has had the Georgia TV airwaves to himself for months and has spent more than $10 million attacking me since I became the Republican nominee on May 24.

**WE WILL LOSE if we can't get in front of voters and set the record straight.**

Your contribution by noon tomorrow will allow us to tell folks watching the local news why I'm running and why I'm asking for their support. **[Your gift of $10, $265, or something in between will help us expand our advertising buy in Augusta and put a vote or two in my column that may not have been in there otherwise.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0340a9a42d9645808e7938c1038052a6&_e=ANaWruo4LvKgjDOGTwKkY7xTfB-ybITAkmkluCrpfpGZU4lMgBNMt35dZTcotWmU6I0dyGexhtwnVInk2zNetFPRZ_gUPb0jQY0cJtUcrY9wUrhjmoNgy470EEj17XZMmaZmoMj-8wFXmbSf91vWqN9XO978lr6DLba11mEyMYSGZViCslHv9-FflDYQHgkX6i8A9Iw8migxNjUKgifStXYQQTevyeRkswf0-ijQdlsNbbLM_8PrapRmWtb5LVeXfVRcrNnxflxf7M-3F8ZjHMgZy85bIh7Qw7fgKrMjW-f05D_9D6-AzYpKDmj2fDxLr2VBl04p7Q4v-UWxCY0TAfSqUEDl1DfYJA7UnhxAqotHVcaIbrDF9TX9ep0metooasZQoqEiEvuGQ3hkGZHlOj9WABsMu3Oobrq94c1Um6M9MsWhGmhv6DvBP-5qtoLDCpJpk31rWNKOlT4WERmWHeW-0UokNE062ump0SGJq909mlOvIJSjMaR0RL7QaHdWAeWnPgnZJyKvDUklgRrMCQ%3D%3D)**

| |

| | With all the excitement and news surrounding the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , you may have missed the court’s other big conservative victory. Here’s a recap: Religious freedom and school choice scored big wins last month thanks to the Supreme Court's decision in [_Carson v. Makin_](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c8a963496b964751b80d34fab3e9b747&_e=6qgL5ifkd-w_i7ruEal--ecI8GH4CH-GsTDp8XcjLV4DgGUpd21_8rpkupzQwLA7nhFz-JqSUUY7IsJMMoVAMmO18sgFrGqUreNOG51vgoDGMwVWrfM3xmCfQ1Q9ra_d5b2rGy403XGLKJ8cNdQSOSCOV6df5BPHlUlM1R53IOp_nhgVLQ7s880LtiKiZKXQQyabr67pgcHiAR9Rwk30MfzmO8me2ivOJGbCiRnZ4TmLi5vsy-sEige01RIjv7ylL_CcWjmy_LK5cIiTevHlzVUXKCNXNWJAwGn0wyHLeRBXTvKbWrwJVi0F82Mw3ij4nn8NMPGQFy2zjAyDOcGF6UkgGNgg4IuQb7P1ANQDmkK2oFnXWk5__gS10EKJ0Chn1rFm3268xBfYqE-4yf7unQ%3D%3D). The court ruled that a Maine law prohibiting parents from using school tuition vouchers at religious schools amounted to religious discrimination. Amen to that. This decision delivers a strong blow to the dangerous anti-religious sentiment creeping across America. It’s also a huge step forward for education freedom. Too many students are trapped in failing schools simply because their parents don’t have the means to afford a better school. After two years of school shutdowns, it is clear that education funds should follow the child, not the school, and certainly not whatever the bureaucrats decide.
Predictably, liberals are [freaking out.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c8a963496b964751b80d34fab3e9b747&_e=6qgL5ifkd-w_i7ruEal--S8ZIFuAZv6lYVvMw4oDsjYLQiF15c_UDh4AHyfcCZ4PgKY2Ms8aA7oc6nqZqyid1t-JHosPJXDvRhdiOOpU33vZ8PSt4u_8tIvxyi5Mkl4hGdUfmy2QoY6sbKmBjzBfUKGNgNWFMzWiSLZWmTjuvDWbRN6rUKmdZ9R8ua-J37vTerAUQgeoc7QubufWwPxnxYUtGNj5BlN2Qtf2Wj3dLKz_09xPToB2qvN8bjG6Pd0tkY0MZzYGn8iIcuikIZ1SwLeifB4nwRgnaet-G_rZOqc%3D) Funny how none of their overblown tirades express any concern for the kids who are falling behind in basic reading and math skills. Mind you, many of these elites have the resources to send their children to the fanciest private schools. God forbid they give all children — regardless of their parents' income — the same opportunity to learn.

Grayson Vaughn, a military policeman with the Tennessee Army National Guard’s 252nd Military Police Company, is [representing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c8a963496b964751b80d34fab3e9b747&_e=6qgL5ifkd-w_i7ruEal--dQr4YobEWdILV_tjA9UokklmK4YrIR2VFNqFjSRUSK6YIPrH_CL6vI_1guOGZN3a1FRBa2pf6ZoHzQSyGdeYxG3LAS-uk6lygCxpRWdrBOfffzGaOjvd0CRrefyptyAVH63eieme31TdtMDoVFluVNny9zmESziHHURnl3xlosmFc1VuCe_zBjLYqvnkUvxUbrtgOjszONtmwJA-qI08DHMY15GRI_eVzveJiheKPPb3AXoke2A7K14dp79tvyWyfX9z4KNJlxnUXUSvZMfBO7Op6YIPOlgLc9lfYvDENh4ch4ap2AjirxVm8lkezCInW2TlarIvNpBGQR21KppBxY%3D) our great state in the 2022 National All Guard Best Warrior Competition — a six-day contest that has over 30 obstacles to test the competitors’ mental and physical fitness. Earlier this year, Grayson received Tennessee’s Best Warrior title, where he won front rank after competing against his peers all over the state. That win fueled his desire to keep pushing and has led to his coveted spot amongst the top 14 National Guard Soldiers and Noncommissioned Officers from seven regions. Bring home the win, Grayson!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | SCOTUS For Schools 👏 | | | | With all the excitement and news surrounding the overturning of Roe v. Wade , you may have missed the court’s other big conservative victory. Here’s a recap: Religious freedom and school choice scored big wins last month thanks to the Supreme Court's decision in . The court ruled that a Maine law prohibiting parents from using school tuition vouchers at religious schools amounted to religious discrimination. Amen to that. This decision delivers a strong blow to the dangerous anti-religious sentiment creeping across America. It’s also a huge step forward for education freedom. Too many students are trapped in failing schools simply because their parents don’t have the means to afford a better school. After two years of school shutdowns, it is clear that education funds should follow the child, not the school, and certainly not whatever the bureaucrats decide. Predictably, liberals are Funny how none of their overblown tirades express any concern for the kids who are falling behind in basic reading and math skills. Mind you, many of these elites have the resources to send their children to the fanciest private schools. God forbid they give all children — regardless of their parents' income — the same opportunity to learn. | | | | | Best Warrior 💪 | | Image courtesy WATE Knoxville native, Spc. Grayson Vaughn, a military policeman with the Tennessee Army National Guard’s 252nd Military Police Company, is our great state in the 2022 National All Guard Best Warrior Competition — a six-day contest that has over 30 obstacles to test the competitors’ mental and physical fitness. Earlier this year, Grayson received Tennessee’s Best Warrior title, where he won front rank after competing against his peers all over the state. That win fueled his desire to keep pushing and has led to his coveted spot amongst the top 14 National Guard Soldiers and Noncommissioned Officers from seven regions. Bring home the win, Grayson! | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Who says TV rots your brain? 😮❤️ () → Little moment caught on camera 🌧🚲 () → Staying on beat 😂👌 (-) | | | | | | | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Thank you for joining our movement. It's because of Patriots, like YOU, that we will take back the Senate and the House in 2022. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we're going to succeed, and in order to do that, we need to provide them with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. If you would like to It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Peter that we will WIN BIG in 2022!

name: Rebekah Jones for Congress
subject: Will you help me defeat Matt Gaetz?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign
body:
Now Endorsed by: International Brotherhood of Teamsters Florida Young Democrats College Democrats of Florida Progressive Democrats of Americ
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=I7cTb_rc9p9qx2zavZt8zKhLxqSDZotYsYyYV8sAHkk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Meet the woman taking down Matt Gaetz.
---
| | Now Endorsed by:International Brotherhood of TeamstersFlorida Young DemocratsCollege Democrats of FloridaProgressive Democrats of AmericaProgressives for Democracy in AmericaFreethought EqualityVietnam Whistleblower Daniel EllsbergClimate scientist Dr. Michael E. MannActor and activist Mark Ruffalo[and many more...](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=_Nzhc_q2gGZVV62qYSSpw3m1uxCRhyrnVdhjZpXEwKk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL2VuZG9yc2VtZW50cyIsInIiOiI1ZjBkOTgwNi02ZDA5LTQ3NzItM2IxNS0yODgyY2VlNWMyNGMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| |
---
| | My name is Rebekah Jones and I’m the presumptive Democratic nominee for Congress in Florida’s 1st Congressional District – currently beating GOP incumbent Matt Gaetz in the polls by 6 points. I’m reaching out to ask that you support read this letter about who I am and what I'm fighting for, and if you're able support my candidacy for Congress. My journey to becoming a congressional candidate looks nothing like most candidates out there. I grew up poor on the Mississippi Gulf Coast, the second of four kids to teenage parents who worked as a front desk clerk and a truck driver. My large family often didn’t have enough to cover food and a roof over our heads, so sometimes we went without either. Throughout my childhood, my mom taught my sisters, brother, and I that education was our only escape. All four of us became first-generation college students with full academic scholarships. My older sister and younger sister both went to the University of Southern Mississippi, my brother went to the University of Miami, and I went to Syracuse University (undergrad), Louisiana State University (Master of Science), and Florida State University (Ph.D, ABD). We each became a teacher, a nurse, a scientist, and a police officer, devoting our careers to public service. While I don’t come from money, had no political connections before 2020, and dedicated my education and career to Earth science, I am on track to defeat Matt Gaetz here at home because my upbringing looks more like the everyday person than anyone else in this race. I have been fighting for Floridians for years- first as a scientist with the state, and then as [Florida's COVID-19 whistleblower](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=x8S5NEx2jhbzD-p6GOGKwDlRghY90KI4GN22xtPYW4w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWlhbWloZXJhbGQuY29tL29waW5pb24vZWRpdG9yaWFscy9hcnRpY2xlMjUxNzgxMjczLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiODJkOTgzMGQtYzdiZS00NTRjLTI4ODYtMWJhNmY1NGRjNzQ5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0). During the last two years, I’ve done a lot of press, won some [unexpected](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=GbZ7XdfM99gFE9NtTZkYWQn8qI5Y3VHPB3_f6IhBfSc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mbG9yaWRhcG9saXRpY3MuY29tL2FyY2hpdmVzLzM5MDk5My1yZWJla2FoLWpvbmVzLW5hbWVkLWZvcmJlcy10ZWNobm9sb2d5LXBlcnNvbi1vZi10aGUteWVhci8iLCJyIjoiODJkOTgzMGQtYzdiZS00NTRjLTI4ODYtMWJhNmY1NGRjNzQ5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) and [truly humbling awards](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=-vXn-vs5vs8fROzIEMYD3rZJDmOkZ3S20Tsriouei8k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9yZWJla2Foam9uZXMuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tLyIsInIiOiI4MmQ5ODMwZC1jN2JlLTQ1NGMtMjg4Ni0xYmE2ZjU0ZGM3NDkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ), appeared in everything from [TIME](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=taGwt658CB8lMZlrNw1NEMoyNazLQBe3304_Z6ZhHIQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aW1lLmNvbS81ODUzMzk4L2Zsb3JpZGEtZmlyZWQtc2NpZW50aXN0LWNvcm9uYXZpcnVzLWRhdGEtcmViZWthaC1qb25lcy8iLCJyIjoiODJkOTgzMGQtYzdiZS00NTRjLTI4ODYtMWJhNmY1NGRjNzQ5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) to [Cosmopolitan Magazine](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=Zk8gNg5Ksqp_LfmzVEWkp-sS0rRrCRFtOhOTHXNr4pY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29zbW9wb2xpdGFuLmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy9hMzU3MTQ2NDcvcmViZWthaC1qb25lcy1mbG9yaWRhLWNvdmlkLTE5LWRhdGEtd2hpc3RsZWJsb3dlci1hcnJlc3QvIiwiciI6IjgyZDk4MzBkLWM3YmUtNDU0Yy0yODg2LTFiYTZmNTRkYzc0OSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9), and made my name by being an honest and trusted resource for apolitical information in times of crisis. And we are certainly in a crisis right now. We need to start electing people who work hard and know the stakes, who are mothers, leaders, and decent human beings; women who stand for more than just themselves, and would sacrifice their [safety, freedom, and even their life](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=0JGEJT5mjw6uY3-NlCPlIKix_aP_IghNUYcZ2Kxl8Ac.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmV3c3dlZWsuY29tL3JlYmVrYWgtam9uZXMtdmlkZW8tcG9saWNlLXJhaWQtdmlyYWwtMTU1MzA1MiIsInIiOiI4MmQ5ODMwZC1jN2JlLTQ1NGMtMjg4Ni0xYmE2ZjU0ZGM3NDkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) if necessary. I’ve already proven that’s who I am and what I’m willing to do for a state and nation I still want to believe can be saved.
---
| |
---
| | When I was asked to present misleading data to the public during COVID-19, I refused. As the head of Florida's public COVID-19 data and surveillance systems, my oath was to the people of Florida -- not politicians. [So they fired me.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=UAd8EuguWVgGt__nyNdLUzMGIUojEgpDG7qwVAVDULg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWlhbWloZXJhbGQuY29tL25ld3MvcG9saXRpY3MtZ292ZXJubWVudC9zdGF0ZS1wb2xpdGljcy9hcnRpY2xlMjUxODM4OTEzLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiMWYxNDlhMmItYzg3NS00Njc2LWRlNWQtYTZhNDAxYjA2NzU0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) Governor Ron DeSantis then outed me as the Florida COVID-19 Whistleblower to the world days later. He defamed me, attacked me, and continued his lies about how safe the state was to reopen - even though every expert inside and outside our Department of Health agreed it was disastrous. And it was.
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=mZHj_9A3hF8NWg0MfMrW1CVGfXA6juQiHEqHVQV-1io.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiIzY2VlZjI5ZC03N2M0LTQ0ZTAtYjljMC0zZmM3ZjEyYzMyYWMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | Despite the attacks, the threats, the harassment, I[ stepped forward to lead the state](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=DVcA_nsaDaN3rdR9s1120y-P8UEJAfQv3LKZqLih5Gc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3J0dW5lLmNvbS80MC11bmRlci00MC8yMDIwL3JlYmVrYWgtam9uZXMvIiwiciI6IjAzY2U5OWFmLTcxMjctNGU1MS00NDY0LTVhNDZkNzFlYzVmYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9) through the cloud of misery DeSantis inflicted on our people and our state during the pandemic. I continued that work for nearly two years - first by helping organizations and governments in East Africa build their own data and surveillance systems, then by creating the[ only national tracking database for COVID-19 cases in schools](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=jUGKnYKztJR8qubXOO2-kkC4gQygit2DAchcl9sx6e4.).
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=0nB7IIcTz5YzKB2xvUvbKUaygQSpZQN_DgpHZmwmqQQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiJlNDhiNWQ0ZS05MWQ1LTRkNGEtYTExNS0yMWYwMTMxNjY0NDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | The success I found in filling the role our state and federal leaders failed to do became a constant reminder to DeSantis how weak and vulnerable he was. After all, if a "girl with a laptop," as he called me, can do that much damage to his reputation, then he wasn't all that popular to begin with. He became obsessed. He sent more than 4,000 emails specifically about me and my whistleblower case against the state in the year after I was fired just to his core staff and administration. Seven months after I was fired, my home [was raided at gunpoint ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=Ld3pHPlZz8Ietp5B7NEXbNz2ZzH_8w-yZ6HS6oATfBk.)by nearly a dozen officer who did not have a warrant. They held us hostage for three hours while they waited to get a warrant, not handing it to me until they were finally leaving.
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=gtGfkz9yYcAA9USbBByVDQ0M-NJtYEYVY30UkbwGZFU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiI0ZDM0YTZiOC01NWM5LTRmYjgtOTY3MS04MTEwMDc5MzZmYjUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | They made my kids wait outside in the cold. They threatened to shoot us. They pushed around my then-11 year old son in the doorway with an AR-15 to his back.
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=wSJGzxPNb4R320KX2mDPO9avlcuJRDhwEDAQ4bydZZU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiJhYTljN2JiNy05YjY4LTQ1MTktZDgyYi1kNTUwYTY0MWQ5YjYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| |
## I fought back.
I was not going to let an autocrat with his eyes on the White House silence any scientist -- especially not me. I worked hard to earn my education and my place in the scientific community. I grew up in one of the poorest counties in Mississippi - the second of four kids to teenage parents with no money. I earned a full scholarship to Syracuse University. Then I earned my Master's degree at LSU. Then I moved to Florida to start my Ph.D. No K-Mart Hitler wanna-be was going to kill the people in my state and scare me into never speaking out again with his failed strong-man intimidation tactics. Challenging a state is never easy. It can be lonely, isolating, terrifying -- especially when you already know that they'll break into your home without a warrant and point semi-automatic weapons at your young children. [But I kept fighting. ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=Qg1qq6lolXsTur8JDBmja2Sti0OAwHwDBPodmkpHBu8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29zbW9wb2xpdGFuLmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy9hMzU3MTQ2NDcvcmViZWthaC1qb25lcy1mbG9yaWRhLWNvdmlkLTE5LWRhdGEtd2hpc3RsZWJsb3dlci1hcnJlc3QvIiwiciI6IjlhMzQzNDBkLWE3ZjctNGRkMy00NGY4LTgwYjY1N2MyYWY3MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=z8GTsViAW83az5572oTEUh-d2VT8bHz0Vu8e4spPayg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiIyZmUxZTZiNi1kOWY0LTQ4YTEtNDcxNC00ZTlhZmI5YzcwYmIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| |
## And I won.
[The state granted me official whistleblower protection ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=cd-RtWUpXbXXZaMuIZiMb4Wcx1s2SS5TpNl6lMWrDUM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWlhbWloZXJhbGQuY29tL29waW5pb24vZWRpdG9yaWFscy9hcnRpY2xlMjUxNzgxMjczLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiNTQ2MDFhNmMtN2U1OS00YWRiLWI0MzktMjEyYWRmOWU5YTg3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0)\- almost one year exactly from when I filed my complaint. The complaint itself is still pending with the Florida Commissions on Human Relations (two years and counting) but getting protection was a massive victory - not only for me, but for oppressed scientific voices everywhere. More recently, an i[nternal audit of COVID-19 data ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=8BPl01N3JRx9gW42VVoqWlESHq-NJ1x86Hu8mpG95pQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2ZsYS5jb20vY29tbXVuaXR5L2hlYWx0aC9jb3JvbmF2aXJ1cy9mbG9yaWRhLWNvdmlkLTE5LWRhdGEtd2FzLWluYWNjdXJhdGUtc3RhdGUtYXVkaXQtZmluZHMvIiwiciI6IjU0NjAxYTZjLTdlNTktNGFkYi1iNDM5LTIxMmFkZjllOWE4NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)found everything I said was true - [to a degree even I had not appreciated before the report was issued. ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=hSFe8_cUrZnHqZ7QR6FigFvasvMlwCyF-30-t9LxgAA.) I had spent two years watching politicians not only lie but also kill to try to climb the ladder. The worst among them - DeSantis - made it his personal mission to try to destroy my life but failed at every possible turn. I felt at times like I had an invisible layer of kevlar around me because every shot DeSantis took missed or barely scraped the skin.
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=-GvdDfkCG3m6nyeCZVmEUmDk_KwYF3fUf1J6lzYgL1U.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiJhMWI4ZDRiOS01YTQzLTQwMzAtMDYyNS03ZTU0Y2FmZjgwNzEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | Now I'm back home in Florida, where I've been running a freak-of-nature campaign against Matt Gaetz that currently has us [leading him in the polls by six points.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=SgFspu0WbXi6xFnxUVoRgJmgIc_JMBLDHLvYvdW_nNw.) We're turning the tide for Democrats in an otherwise blood red area, though our efforts haven't gone without resistance from within the party. Though DeSantis' cronies couldn't find anyone who lives in the district to primary me, they did find someone from another district - who has never lived in what is now District 1 - to run a sham campaign that does nothing but harass, stalk and spread the same debunked DeSantis propaganda from two years ago. We're here to save our democracy from predators like Matt Gaetz and dangerous dictators like Ron DeSantis. This isn't the time to play, and when I fight, the gloves are always off. With the war-chest Matt Gaetz will be bringing into the general election, we need to start pulling in major funding now so we're not playing catchup in the leadup to November. Which is why I need your help.
---
| | | [**Donate to Rebekah's campaign now**](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=ve_E1O5Ncy55y23XxzAC2cPUlPa2i9daI5oBCMX3jPQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiI5YWE2MjE1MS00YmRmLTRiMjgtN2NjZi04ZjVjODdkMzU2MDkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | [](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=fR1PIB1afj5uPonf5uZh5WcsXC1ob4xufnFOlP_vF8M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2MzTzdXVWFyVD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiJhMWZkNjJkZC01MjQ2LTQzMmQtOTRkMS1kYTk4ZTQ2Zjk5YjQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | Because let's face facts: America has never really been a friendly place to women and girls. Not really. Sure, there are certainly worse places, but why is the United States settling for the bottom of the developed world when it comes to protecting girls and women? The laws governing our bodies, our families, our choices, our daughters, our futures continue to erode our faith in and hope for this nation, taking our freedoms and permitting the government to make decisions for us that are, frankly, none of the government’s business. This isn’t just about pregnancy or birth control. It’s about a culture of objectifying women from a young age, permitted and even promoted under a quilt of uneven, unequal, and unjust laws across our nation. Consider child marriage, which is legal across most of the United States. The data show that 87% of child marriages occur between underage girls and adult men. Some girls have been married as young as 10. In most of those states, minors cannot legally divorce or even separate from their spouse once married. They’re trapped. In Florida, there is no minimum age for child marriage, so long as either the parents and judges approve, and there are loopholes and legal exceptions made for pregnant girls. So, if an 80-year-old-man wants a child bride, he can escape charges related to his pedophilia if he simply gets a judge or the parents of young child to agree to a marriage. Our region of Florida sees some of the highest rates of human and sex trafficking in the nation. Perhaps the issue is so pervasive because we have an incumbent representative who [was the only person in congress](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=QQA7jkWCUX_M69UHXqxku7h-jcAJwxpX28qib-vEgoc.) to vote against a bill to crack down on trafficking, who was been the target of a [sex-trafficking investigation for](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=cmmkiEmk0ecJpW76B9IhakoigAWCEX-z6bcUHGuDC6k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5kZXBlbmRlbnQuY28udWsvbmV3cy93b3JsZC9hbWVyaWNhcy91cy1wb2xpdGljcy9tYXR0LWdhZXR6LWp1c3RpY2UtZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1jcGFjLWIyMDI0MTg2Lmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiMzk0ZmVlYTEtZjJlNy00MjkwLWVkMWUtY2NlNWE4MmU4YTVkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) more than two years, and whose new sister-in-law even came forward to protect her family, [calling Matt Gaetz a “literal pedophile](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=UIKUdVnTRJVSwK5g6fq8Aay7GL0NQ-QyVuU_pG-B_lQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnVzaW5lc3NpbnNpZGVyLmNvbS9tYXR0LWdhZXR6LWZpYW5jZWUtc2lzdGVyLXJveGFubmUtbHVja2V5LWNhbGxzLXdlaXJkLWNyZWVweS0yMDIxLTciLCJyIjoiMzk0ZmVlYTEtZjJlNy00MjkwLWVkMWUtY2NlNWE4MmU4YTVkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0).” And without getting too far into the statistics on rape in America, we’re first in the developed world for rates of sexual harassment, assault, and battery. [Nearly half of women](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=sEmWTIdKgkTE2q4vCFvvTOTUsM3Hy5jZvitnpT75bhA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi92aW9sZW5jZXByZXZlbnRpb24vZGF0YXNvdXJjZXMvbmlzdnMvMjAxNU5JU1ZTZGF0YWJyaWVmLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiMzk0ZmVlYTEtZjJlNy00MjkwLWVkMWUtY2NlNWE4MmU4YTVkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) in the United States reported experiencing some form of sexual violence in their lifetime. 1 in 5 women report being raped in their lifetime. Nearly half of those rapes occurred when the victims were minors. How have we gotten to this place, where girls’ lives matter so little and women are forced to carry such heavy burdens for a society that does not value them? Did you know that women hold only one-quarter of the seats in Congress? Even though women outnumber men in the general population, voter registration and voter turnout, we make up less than one-fourth of elected officials in nearly every level of office. Married women are less likely to vote than women who are divorced, widowed, separated or have never been married, though female turnout generally increases with both age and education level. We’re not electing women. In the shadow of Roe v Wade and protections we once had, the consequences of electing too few women to positions of power could not be clearer. If we don’t stand together and fight for our autonomy, our dignity, our independence, then our daughters may very well find themselves without any of it. I will write legislation to end child marriage, crack down on trafficking, and see that sexual predators who target children are charged with hate crimes and never able to return to society. I will vote to codify rights that protect and respect our right to make decisions about our own bodies, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, and finally make us equal in the eyes of our constitution. Matt Gaetz not only doesn’t support those measures – he was the only person in Congress to vote against some of them. We need your help. And it couldn't come fast enough. With the election only four months away, we're putting our faith in YOU to make the difference in this race. In solidarity,
Rebekah Jones [Click here to sign up to receive emails and important campaign updates in the future.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=cvKtcWSEa0Mnz57rDOKvvo2qti-NoWOw43Fl72P50nc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tLyIsInIiOiIzOTRmZWVhMS1mMmU3LTQyOTAtZWQxZS1jY2U1YTgyZThhNWQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) [Click here to volunteer.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=-CyRNZ5I9WPO7ZNBcvdnNm6490PQJTUOg2muduhmzSg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL2dldC1pbnZvbHZlZCIsInIiOiIzOTRmZWVhMS1mMmU3LTQyOTAtZWQxZS1jY2U1YTgyZThhNWQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) [Click here to check or update your voter registration information.](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/c3O7WUarT/c?w=uehkfeg5RV31SRn_IJKLLTmMPCCggG3EBSkLDH__m9g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9yZWdpc3RyYXRpb24uZWxlY3Rpb25zLm15ZmxvcmlkYS5jb20vZW4vQ2hlY2tWb3RlclN0YXR1cy9JbmRleCIsInIiOiIzOTRmZWVhMS1mMmU3LTQyOTAtZWQxZS1jY2U1YTgyZThhNWQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)

MannActor and activist Mark Ruffalo | | | | My name is Rebekah Jones and I’m the presumptive Democratic nominee for Congress in Florida’s 1st Congressional District – currently beating GOP incumbent Matt Gaetz in the polls by 6 points. I’m reaching out to ask that you support read this letter about who I am and what I'm fighting for, and if you're able support my candidacy for Congress. My journey to becoming a congressional candidate looks nothing like most candidates out there. I grew up poor on the Mississippi Gulf Coast, the second of four kids to teenage parents who worked as a front desk clerk and a truck driver. My large family often didn’t have enough to cover food and a roof over our heads, so sometimes we went without either. Throughout my childhood, my mom taught my sisters, brother, and I that education was our only escape. All four of us became first-generation college students with full academic scholarships. My older sister and younger sister both went to the University of Southern Mississippi, my brother went to the University of Miami, and I went to Syracuse University (undergrad), Louisiana State University (Master of Science), and Florida State University (Ph.D, ABD). We each became a teacher, a nurse, a scientist, and a police officer, devoting our careers to public service. While I don’t come from money, had no political connections before 2020, and dedicated my education and career to Earth science, I am on track to defeat Matt Gaetz here at home because my upbringing looks more like the everyday person than anyone else in this race. I have been fighting for Floridians for years- first as a scientist with the state, and then as . During the last two years, I’ve done a lot of press, won some and , appeared in everything from to , and made my name by being an honest and trusted resource for apolitical information in times of crisis. And we are certainly in a crisis right now. We need to start electing people who work hard and know the stakes, who are mothers, leaders, and decent human beings; women who stand for more than just themselves, and would sacrifice their if necessary. I’ve already proven that’s who I am and what I’m willing to do for a state and nation I still want to believe can be saved. | | | | When I was asked to present misleading data to the public during COVID-19, I refused. As the head of Florida's public COVID-19 data and surveillance systems, my oath was to the people of Florida -- not politicians. Governor Ron DeSantis then outed me as the Florida COVID-19 Whistleblower to the world days later. He defamed me, attacked me, and continued his lies about how safe the state was to reopen - even though every expert inside and outside our Department of Health agreed it was disastrous. And it was. | | | | Despite the attacks, the threats, the harassment, I through the cloud of misery DeSantis inflicted on our people and our state during the pandemic. I continued that work for nearly two years - first by helping organizations and governments in East Africa build their own data and surveillance systems, then by creating the. | | | | The success I found in filling the role our state and federal leaders failed to do became a constant reminder to DeSantis how weak and vulnerable he was. After all, if a "girl with a laptop," as he called me, can do that much damage to his reputation, then he wasn't all that popular to begin with. He became obsessed. He sent more than 4,000 emails specifically about me and my whistleblower case against the state in the year after I was fired just to his core staff and administration. Seven months after I was fired, my home nearly a dozen officer who did not have a warrant. They held us hostage for three hours while they waited to get a warrant, not handing it to me until they were finally leaving. | | | | They made my kids wait outside in the cold. They threatened to shoot us. They pushed around my then-11 year old son in the doorway with an AR-15 to his back. | | | | I fought back. I was not going to let an autocrat with his eyes on the White House silence any scientist -- especially not me. I worked hard to earn my education and my place in the scientific community. I grew up in one of the poorest counties in Mississippi - the second of four kids to teenage parents with no money. I earned a full scholarship to Syracuse University. Then I earned my Master's degree at LSU. Then I moved to Florida to start my Ph.D. No K-Mart Hitler wanna-be was going to kill the people in my state and scare me into never speaking out again with his failed strong-man intimidation tactics. Challenging a state is never easy. It can be lonely, isolating, terrifying -- especially when you already know that they'll break into your home without a warrant and point semi-automatic weapons at your young children. | | | | And I won. \- almost one year exactly from when I filed my complaint. The complaint itself is still pending with the Florida Commissions on Human Relations (two years and counting) but getting protection was a massive victory - not only for me, but for oppressed scientific voices everywhere. More recently, an i everything I said was true - I had spent two years watching politicians not only lie but also kill to try to climb the ladder. The worst among them - DeSantis - made it his personal mission to try to destroy my life but failed at every possible turn. I felt at times like I had an invisible layer of kevlar around me because every shot DeSantis took missed or barely scraped the skin. | | | | Now I'm back home in Florida, where I've been running a freak-of-nature campaign against Matt Gaetz that currently has us We're turning the tide for Democrats in an otherwise blood red area, though our efforts haven't gone without resistance from within the party. Though DeSantis' cronies couldn't find anyone who lives in the district to primary me, they did find someone from another district - who has never lived in what is now District 1 - to run a sham campaign that does nothing but harass, stalk and spread the same debunked DeSantis propaganda from two years ago. We're here to save our democracy from predators like Matt Gaetz and dangerous dictators like Ron DeSantis. This isn't the time to play, and when I fight, the gloves are always off. With the war-chest Matt Gaetz will be bringing into the general election, we need to start pulling in major funding now so we're not playing catchup in the leadup to November. Which is why I need your help. | | | | | | | | | | Because let's face facts: America has never really been a friendly place to women and girls. Not really. Sure, there are certainly worse places, but why is the United States settling for the bottom of the developed world when it comes to protecting girls and women? The laws governing our bodies, our families, our choices, our daughters, our futures continue to erode our faith in and hope for this nation, taking our freedoms and permitting the government to make decisions for us that are, frankly, none of the government’s business. This isn’t just about pregnancy or birth control. It’s about a culture of objectifying women from a young age, permitted and even promoted under a quilt of uneven, unequal, and unjust laws across our nation. Consider child marriage, which is legal across most of the United States. The data show that 87% of child marriages occur between underage girls and adult men. Some girls have been married as young as 10. In most of those states, minors cannot legally divorce or even separate from their spouse once married. They’re trapped. In Florida, there is no minimum age for child marriage, so long as either the parents and judges approve, and there are loopholes and legal exceptions made for pregnant girls. So, if an 80-year-old-man wants a child bride, he can escape charges related to his pedophilia if he simply gets a judge or the parents of young child to agree to a marriage. Our region of Florida sees some of the highest rates of human and sex trafficking in the nation. Perhaps the issue is so pervasive because we have an incumbent representative who to vote against a bill to crack down on trafficking, who was been the target of a more than two years, and whose new sister-in-law even came forward to protect her family, .” And without getting too far into the statistics on rape in America, we’re first in the developed world for rates of sexual harassment, assault, and battery. in the United States reported experiencing some form of sexual violence in their lifetime. 1 in 5 women report being raped in their lifetime. Nearly half of those rapes occurred when the victims were minors. How have we gotten to this place, where girls’ lives matter so little and women are forced to carry such heavy burdens for a society that does not value them? Did you know that women hold only one-quarter of the seats in Congress? Even though women outnumber men in the general population, voter registration and voter turnout, we make up less than one-fourth of elected officials in nearly every level of office. Married women are less likely to vote than women who are divorced, widowed, separated or have never been married, though female turnout generally increases with both age and education level. We’re not electing women. In the shadow of Roe v Wade and protections we once had, the consequences of electing too few women to positions of power could not be clearer. If we don’t stand together and fight for our autonomy, our dignity, our independence, then our daughters may very well find themselves without any of it. I will write legislation to end child marriage, crack down on trafficking, and see that sexual predators who target children are charged with hate crimes and never able to return to society. I will vote to codify rights that protect and respect our right to make decisions about our own bodies, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, and finally make us equal in the eyes of our constitution. Matt Gaetz not only doesn’t support those measures – he was the only person in Congress to vote against some of them. We need your help. And it couldn't come fast enough. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Tom Fitton
