clean_body: | Friend -- The radical conservative majority on the Supreme Court has officially stolen away the right to an abortion. The decision -- made possible by Trump’s three appointees -- now leaves this fundamental right up to state legislatures. More than 60% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal in all or most cases. In 29 of 50 states, a clear majority of people hold this view. And yet, experts predict that 26 states are likely to criminalize abortion. That shouldn’t happen if state legislatures actually represent the will of the people. And now, conservative justices on the U.S. Supreme Court have agreed to hear a North Carolina case that tests a new legal “theory.” The nonsensical “independent state legislature theory,” could give state legislatures complete control of congressional redistricting and federal elections. Under their theory, it is possible that neither governors, nor courts, nor independent commissions get any say in the process. Are you sensing a pattern? One can only imagine what our fundamental rights will look like if we lose this fight. Shameless Republican state legislatures will create maps that exclude marginalized communities and pack them into districts to dilute their vote, cementing their ability to create laws that go against the will of the people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Fairer maps are an important way of ensuring that America’s broad, pro-Roe and pro-human rights majority’s voice is heard. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9331%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2bNRroERPuGkJ17uvAPUqTw&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fZuW2%2fDkv%2fwF8bO34lRgPA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fZuW2%2fDkv%2fwF8bO34lRgPA&sysid=1)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37253%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QdgH%2bbozL%2bY59jYhMzaX3A&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hqq%2fiG88f95i9hnWAuJc6A&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: What protein does to osteoarthritis in seniors
body:
Is calcium actually good for your bone health? Bad news...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8drgr1foi4r6e40fkeecnujcq9olbqvbblve8p8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe6cjmekrb6cbmeop68sb0mmq70oj2m9prao74cpqb8crlm8pn8t3im6qm2sbnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbdhnm9r6cd72mdgefc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljmcor3c9j68oh5u)
Is calcium actually good for your bone health? Bad news... In one of the largest bone health studies ever, women who took calcium and vitamin D every day were **no less likely** to break their hips... Meanwhile, a recent study found that women who ate [**THIS protein**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf0e6nkb59rhlb8s0h12uib4rui6l6lko6toq3o8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cphm6oj6chh2bs) or 6 months **gained 7% more bone density**... Which is how much density the average person loses in SIX YEARS! [**⇒ Eat THIS protein if you want stronger bones](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za4fpiaucccs25ra1n2pdrm0sdiih3vvn74fv2ag_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cphm6oj6chh2bs)** Talk soon, Dr. Chad Walding

name: Connor Boyack
subject: 10 times socialism actually worked?
body:
If you’re like me, you love the Babylon Bee’s satirical take on the news.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6j26deteuhh76git56oes12sklae6h3d5e14or0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbob1cj7cqqr8d3mc6pb8plk64qm8dhhe9ojcpjk66qe9p3j6dqr1o30suq38tjn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbdhnm9o6ct32mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljmcor0s1j66oh5u)

| | | Hey Customer,
---
If you're like me, you love the Babylon Bee's satirical take on the news. Last week, I sponsored an article called "10 Times Socialism Actually Worked," and I wanted you to see the list we came up with. Here's the list below.
Bernie Sanders famously said that "real" socialism has never been tried. Frankly, we're shocked he would ever suggest such a thing because there are numerous examples of real socialist utopias that we have to pull from.
Here are just a few:
_1.**Star Trek's Federation of Planets:** There's no money, but people still work for some reason. Workers of the world, set your phasers to Social Contract!
_
_ 2\. **The Borg Collective:** Like a more efficient Federation that tears through freedom-loving planets and subjects them to the will of the collective.
_
_ 3\. **In the wonderful dream AOC had last night:** Elon Musk even made an appearance.
_
_ 4\. **In John Lennon's "Imagine":** Everything works perfectly when you imagine it! Even marriage to Yoko Ono.
_
_ 5\. **Smurf Village:** Cheerful workers in a heavily regulated population. Just like China.
_
_ 6\. **In Bernie Sanders serial fanfic:** He's been writing Social Thunder for three years now. It's a big hit on his Substack.
_
_ 7\. **A beaver dam:** Everyone chips in or they all die.
_
_ 8\. **The nuclear family:** Too bad the nuclear family is RACIST.
_
_ 9\. **An ant farm:** It worked great until a kid came and shook it up.
_
_ 10\. **Whatever South American country Che Guevara ruled:** We're sure socialism worked there, otherwise people wouldn't still be wearing the shirt_
_You see! Socialism is alive and well today. You only have to open yourself up to the imaginary world behind you and seize the means of production for the proletariat!_
Now, I want to be clear that this is a joke -- you and I know that socialism doesn't work. But kids are being told the opposite every day by their teachers and in the books they are given at school.

We all laugh at the list, but you are right to be angry about it. Now, let's do something about it.

I wrote a series of books that help kids understand that socialism and communism have always failed and why freedom is so important. These books -- the Tuttle Twins series -- help teach kids about the government, economics, liberty, and much more.

Here's where I need your help: I want to distribute Tuttle Twins books to school classrooms and libraries, so when a teacher shows up ready to champion socialism, the kids in her class can discover that history has proven her wrong over and over again.

Will you help us send Tuttle Twins books to more schools before the new school year begins? It costs $10 to distribute one book to a school. If you can give today, we'll do our best to get one in a school in your local area.

**[Click here to help us distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools across the country, with your tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $100, $500, or even more.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf7j202v0glop9erud9bbrbnioc2l76qiblhmqh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cphm1o36cdh2bs)**
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

PS For those interested in seeing the full Babylon Bee article, here is the **[link.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjqv11iu7g2anmh514j2ubasmdrkmra7jjahc6l8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cphm1o36cdh2bs)**
| 1234 Main Street, Anywhere, MA 01234, USA
Unsubscribe | View this email in your browser
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaj4hbhua8sono5k6c823sesc1onmkucgnn94t60_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5ctj66o70cphm49fg)

Is calcium actually good for your bone health? Bad news... In one of the largest bone health studies ever, women who took calcium and vitamin D every day were **no less likely** to break their hips... Meanwhile, a recent study found that women who ate [**THIS protein**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6atedtjtq78kr4aaa18kmeuue0cghkng226skfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cphm1o33cph2bs) or 6 months **gained 7% more bone density**... Which is how much density the average person loses in SIX YEARS! [**⇒ Eat THIS protein if you want stronger bones](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp0hhro22lvb7tg37t6lgt9gg1l5dg91fs6gj1a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cphm1o33cph2bs)** Talk soon, Dr. Chad Walding

body:
Glenn Youngkin seems to be preparing his presidential bid...already

|
---
Talk about failing up... Despite his lackluster first six months in office, it seems that Glenn Youngkin has already given up on the challenging job of governing Virginia. Instead, it looks like he’s taking his brand of conspiracy theory campaigning and utter lack of competence in governance on the road. In other words, all signs point to Youngkin for America 2024. In the last week alone, we’ve learned that Glenn Youngkin:
* Is meeting with influential out of state Republican donors - a sign that he’s building a campaign slush fund
* Is headlining the Nebraska Republican convention and is planning on supporting GOP candidates across the nation in 2022
* Is making regular appearances on _Fox & Friends_ and other conservative tv and radio shows Someone has to lead Virginia while Glenn Youngkin kicks off his 2024 bid for the presidency. The good news is that we’ve got Virginia Democrats to do that while Glenn Youngkin is busy.

_**Someone**_ has to lead Virginia while Glenn Youngkin kicks off his 2024 bid for the presidency. The good news is that we’ve got Virginia Democrats to do that while Glenn Youngkin is busy. **[We need your help funding our Democratic leadership – and, later, defeating Glenn Youngkin as he sets his sights on the presidency in 2024. Hello,
Well, that didn’t take long. **Less than an hour after I was declared the Democratic nominee for Senate in Iowa, the attacks from Chuck Grassley began.**
_“The most liberal nominee in Iowa Senate history”
“Radical”
“Socialist”_
Gotta love it!
Chuck Grassley doesn’t know what to say about me. He’s never faced an opponent like me before. I’m his political nightmare, so he’s just throwing cow pies at the wall and hoping something sticks.
Calling me “radical” is laughable when Chuck Grassley supports a complete ban on abortion and letting literally anyone buy an AR-15 without even a background check. **But there’s one attack that I absolutely won’t take lying down, and that’s Chuck Grassley’s attacking me for serving our country for 36 years in the U.S. Navy.**
Grassley is already trying to say that because I enlisted in the military at age 19, because my deployments meant that my family had to move from state-to-state and country-to-country... that I’m not an Iowan anymore.
Chuck Grassley wants to pretend that I wasn’t raised in rural, northwest Iowa. He ignores the enormous sacrifices that my family – my wife and my kids – made to allow me to serve in the Navy.
**Grassley’s attacks denigrate every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, spend holidays away from each other, and be absent from life’s big events like weddings and the birth of a child.**
**And if Chuck Grassley thinks that I will stand silent while he says that every Iowan who puts on our country’s uniform stops being an Iowan... he’s delusional.**
These are the kinds of attacks I’m going to be up against. Nasty stuff from Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and the Fox ‘Entertainment’ News propaganda network.
There’s one reason why: The GOP is scared. They’ve seen the polls, and they know that if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.
**In order to fight back, we need to raise another $150,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**Please, can I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47586811/354887122/-42398318?refcode=em20220709am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDBmOTMwZC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NcgV9S48HTAx2c-ivQmbtDFygDB_Vlu9FYOhJ9LM7r4=)

body:

I ain't gonna lie to you, friend – if Catherine Cortez Masto loses in Nevada, **_it’s game over._**
We can kiss our 50-50 Senate majority goodbye, and we’ll have to watch Mitch McConnell tear down all of our hard-fought progress. It’s a nightmare, and it will soon be our reality unless we ALL step up for Catherine right now.
**I just personally reviewed the polling out of Nevada, and it shows Catherine LOSING by 1 point to her Trump-endorsed opponent.** Mitch McConnell’s allies have already spent more than $22 MILLION on vicious, nasty, lying attack ads to defeat Catherine and they seem to be working: **Nate Silver just declared Nevada as Republican’s best pickup opportunity.**
Here’s the bottom line: What we do right now, in this critical moment, will make or break Catherine’s campaign and our Democratic Senate majority. **So I promised Catherine I would help her raise the $26,592 she needs to close the polling gap before her deadline. Friend, I'm personally counting on your $5 in the next few hours:**
**[Will you chip in $5 right now, split between Catherine and Jacky Rosen, to defeat her Trump-endorsed opponent and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47587453/354889494/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1878-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDRiNjFjMC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zuEfTtmwl0fMSB4V8bse26TDh9SER4j68NVwGqh6kLI=)**
Thank you for stepping up at this crucial moment.

James Carville

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: People are losing confidence in the Supreme Court. And for good reason.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It deeply troubles me to think how six justices could care so little. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47587498/354889681/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ6O_SCO_E_20220709_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ0OTYwNS04OGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8A8tlN1289A0eUo2pj5lDt6qhogtHsIs6SXtV7N41Ag=&emci=cc570777-87ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0b449605-88ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
The Supreme Court’s extreme conservative majority is out of touch, out of control, and creating a legitimacy crisis for themselves. The American people are losing confidence in the Court. And for good reason, with the Court’s dangerous decisions on abortion rights, climate action, gun safety, and more. They’re anti-union, they’re anti-consumer, and they've empowered corporations more than ever before — giving them religious liberty rights and letting them spend gobs of money to influence the political process. The Court is tossing aside settled law and saying they're just going to substitute their own personal views and make the rest of America bend to it. Pure and simple, a tiny group of far-right radicals are trying to impose their unpopular views on the rest of us. And they’re not stopping — Clarence Thomas already said he’s coming after the LGBTQ+ community and coming after contraception. And I’ll just say this: As a former law professor, if I were to grade the legal argument that was presented for overturning Roe v. Wade, it would get an F. This opinion basically cites a bunch of folks from the 1700s and says, "Boy, that's the way we want to go.” To a time when aristocrats ran the world. When the only people who had voices were white men. When slavery was a way to make money. It deeply troubles me to think how six justices could care so little about the people who will pay the price. So now is the time to be angry. And now is the time to channel that anger into action. Let’s remind ourselves the Supreme Court doesn't get the final word. The final word rests with We The People. So I’m going to keep fighting to rebalance this hijacked institution by expanding the Court — think of it as a democratic recalibration. Congress has already used that power seven times before, and it’s time to use it again. I’m also going to stay focused on holding onto the House and electing two more pro-choice, anti-filibuster Democratic senators — because that’s what we need to codify Roe nationwide and reverse the Court’s horrifying injustice. And we cannot let Republicans seize power. If they do, we’ve already seen their wishlist — and right at top, circled and underlined, is a nationwide ban on abortion. That means no safe havens anywhere. There is still a path out of this. It is not a guaranteed path, but I guarantee you this: You don't get what you don't fight for. So I’m staying in this fight all the way. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47587501/354889684/921386962?refcode=EMZ6O_SCO_E_20220709_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ0OTYwNS04OGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8A8tlN1289A0eUo2pj5lDt6qhogtHsIs6SXtV7N41Ag=)

Folks,

I am not one to tell people how to run their operations, but if you’re going to visit the great state of Louisiana, can you at least spell it correctly? Is that really asking too much?
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zimsp8c44kg0mnpigrhe35asi6bk9ik00s6cikuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpjm8or5c5h2bs)

I’m glad that the Vice President visited our fine state. Now, if we could only get her to visit the border then we’d be doing even better. But we all know that won’t happen.

_As they say, always remember to dot your i’s and cross your t’s (and make sure they’re all where they’re supposed to be!!)._

God bless the great state of _**Louisiana!**_

| | Peter —

The Fourth should have been a day of celebration to mark our collective freedom. Instead, we are yet again left mourning American lives lost to a senseless act of gun violence — this time in Highland Park, Illinois.

We MUST do more to stop these mass shootings. Enough is enough.

I’m running for Congress to stand up to the gun manufacturers and dealers who put profits over people’s lives. Politics as usual is no longer working. [**Rush a $5 donation now to help send me to DC to bring sanity and safety back to Congress >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47588383/354893531/1596566914?refcode=em_GLD_FR_gunviolence_070922_cl_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmY4MzYyNi04OWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EiN5kxi5L_LdIlI79lW3dxMa0nECq2mVAmwM2Sz-h7g=)

Assault weapons were once banned by Congress. And the Second Amendment allows them to be banned again.

So why does the GOP oppose that ban?

Gun manufacturers and dealers. The NRA’s powerful lobbyists. Greed, pure and simple.

The right to safety — in schools, at parades, in houses of worship — is something I will fight for at the federal level. New Yorkers deserve nothing less.

[**But I need your help to get to Congress. Please, contribute $5 or whatever you can to join me clean_body: Our country deserves better. | | | Peter — The Fourth should have been a day of celebration to mark our collective freedom. Instead, we are yet again left mourning American lives lost to a senseless act of gun violence — this time in Highland Park, Illinois. We MUST do more to stop these mass shootings. Enough is enough. I’m running for Congress to stand up to the gun manufacturers and dealers who put profits over people’s lives. Politics as usual is no longer working. = Assault weapons were once banned by Congress. And the Second Amendment allows them to be banned again. So why does the GOP oppose that ban? Gun manufacturers and dealers. The NRA’s powerful lobbyists. Greed, pure and simple. The right to safety — in schools, at parades, in houses of worship — is something I will fight for at the federal level. New Yorkers deserve nothing less. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can change politics as usual in Washington. Our democracy, our basic rights, and our safety depend on it. Dan Goldman = = | Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both. * | Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NEW YORK Dan Goldman for New York PO Box 3306 New York, NY 10008 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: John
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Let me tell you exactly why I got into this race and why we email you so much asking for your support.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47588441/354893628/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220709&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=49f83626-89ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY4MzYyNi04OWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQLwuc6_DrH5d1ZUUNtGVxx5k1_h7yXCS1p1_xVENlQ=)
---
| Peter, There are just 10 days left until Primary Election Day, so let me cut to the chase and tell you exactly why I got into this race and why we email you so much asking for your support. This is a longer email, so if you would rather take action now, [_**please consider giving just $10 to help us reach the over 20% of likely voters here in Maryland who are undecided and will decide this election >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47588442/354893629/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220709&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=49f83626-89ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY4MzYyNi04OWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQLwuc6_DrH5d1ZUUNtGVxx5k1_h7yXCS1p1_xVENlQ=) My great-grandfather and his family were enslaved in a cabin not 25 miles from where I currently live with my wife and two daughters in Silver Spring. It’s difficult to fathom what my ancestors lived through, but because they survived with faith in a future they could not see, I am here today. Their perseverance ushered in new opportunities for entire generations to come and my family is the realization of their hope. And the thing is, not even in their wildest dreams could they have ever envisioned that just three generations later, their great-grandson would serve in the cabinet of our first Black President. **Now, I’m running for governor for them, and for every one of our predecessors who fought to make the American dream one we can all realize.** I’m running for you and your family. For your right to be true to who you are, whether by hanging a pride flag in your classroom or seeking life-saving gender-affirming care. For your right to decide if and when you are ready to start a family. For juvenile justice reform, worker protections, accessible public transit, world class public schools, and bold investments in affordable housing. **For a better Maryland for all of us.** **Let me be clear: we cannot wait to begin building a better future for our children.** The next governor of Maryland will be charged with determining what trajectory Maryland will take as we face the defining challenges of our lifetimes, from climate change to criminal justice reform to public health and safety. **I am up to the challenge and I am ready to lead our state on the path to progress.** But right now, I am relying on folks like you to help guide our campaign across the finish line. We have to hustle to raise the resources we need to spread the word about our campaign to undecided voters on the airwaves, through direct mail, at the doors, and online. [_**So if you are in a position to contribute today, please make a donation to support our campaign. Together, we can build a Maryland that works for everyone.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47588443/354893630/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220709&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=49f83626-89ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY4MzYyNi04OWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQLwuc6_DrH5d1ZUUNtGVxx5k1_h7yXCS1p1_xVENlQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | [$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47588444/354893631/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220709-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220709&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode2=49f83626-89ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY4MzYyNi04OWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQLwuc6_DrH5d1ZUUNtGVxx5k1_h7yXCS1p1_xVENlQ=)

clean_body: Let me tell you exactly why I got into this race and why we email you so much asking for your support. | = | Peter, There are just 10 days left until Primary Election Day, so let me cut to the chase and tell you exactly why I got into this race and why we email you so much asking for your support. This is a longer email, so if you would rather take action now, = My great-grandfather and his family were enslaved in a cabin not 25 miles from where I currently live with my wife and two daughters in Silver Spring. It’s difficult to fathom what my ancestors lived through, but because they survived with faith in a future they could not see, I am here today. Their perseverance ushered in new opportunities for entire generations to come and my family is the realization of their hope. And the thing is, not even in their wildest dreams could they have ever envisioned that just three generations later, their great-grandson would serve in the cabinet of our first Black President. Now, I’m running for governor for them, and for every one of our predecessors who fought to make the American dream one we can all realize. I’m running for you and your family. For your right to be true to who you are, whether by hanging a pride flag in your classroom or seeking life-saving gender-affirming care. For your right to decide if and when you are ready to start a family. For juvenile justice reform, worker protections, accessible public transit, world class public schools, and bold investments in affordable housing. For a better Maryland for all of us. Let me be clear: we cannot wait to begin building a better future for our children. The next governor of Maryland will be charged with determining what trajectory Maryland will take as we face the defining challenges of our lifetimes, from climate change to criminal justice reform to public health and safety. I am up to the challenge and I am ready to lead our state on the path to progress. But right now, I am relying on folks like you to help guide our campaign across the finish line. We have to hustle to raise the resources we need to spread the word about our campaign to undecided voters on the airwaves, through direct mail, at the doors, and online. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = With gratitude, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
I’m asking you to join me in this fight |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47590155/354900467/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220709_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDA0OTVmMi04YmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Jd1hTtG98dyVOVOJ9VctERUXW8vFH2EwisM3cJrZ_c=)
---
Folks,

It’s been a tough summer so far, both here in Florida and across the United States.

Nationally, the right-wing majority on the U.S. Supreme Court shredded half a century of settled law and overturned _Roe v. Wade_.

Here in Florida, Gov. Ron DeSantis has continued pushing his far-right agenda. He’s signaled his potential support for a full abortion ban, suppressed our vote, silenced companies like Disney for exercising their right to free speech, and endangered our families with lax gun safety laws.

I know it can feel overwhelming. I know it can feel like nothing we do makes a difference. **_But that’s not true._**

[_Right here, right now, we have a very real opportunity to correct the course of Florida’s history. Despite what DeSantis wants you to think, he’s vulnerable — and we have the polls to prove it.

So, today, I’m asking you to join me in this must-win fight. If you’ve never contributed before, will you do that now? And if you have, will you consider contributing again? Together, we _can_ defeat DeSantis and build a Florida for All._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47590156/354900468/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220709_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDA0OTVmMi04YmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Jd1hTtG98dyVOVOJ9VctERUXW8vFH2EwisM3cJrZ_c=)

Thank you and God bless,
Charlie Crist

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Humbly asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9347%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2bdcD3%2f1doMua5a8Bk2wSxw&sysid=1)
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message.

| | Friend,

It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I’m asking if you can help.

_**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37267%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kWMrdiOGkdU4HeBz8BwsRA&sysid=1)**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37268%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fM4ILvu8BOGAC8GG9rQWVA&sysid=1)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That’s $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37269%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UhLJJgGwGNY3ffJV48W6CQ&sysid=1)**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we’re virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer’s Super PAC announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we’re going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37260%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fMCCN8RGLlBTP2Ub1evVjA&sysid=1)**_

When you donate, you’ll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37268%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fM4ILvu8BOGAC8GG9rQWVA&sysid=1)

I'm furious. I’m heartbroken. But I’m not giving up, Peter. Our worst nightmare has come true:**the Supreme Court has officially overturned Roe v. Wade,** but we can’t yield a single inch in the fight for women’s reproductive freedoms.
Anti-choice extremists like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked the Supreme Court with ultraconservative justices, and now their horrific agenda has become our reality – a country where women don't have the freedom to make our own decisions about our own bodies.

[Look, here's the truth. We're not going to lie: As Democrats, we have the odds stacked up against us this year. Election experts, political pundits, and Republicans agree that, historically, the party that holds the presidency _almost always loses seats in the midterm elections_. This combined with redistricting and current economic trends means **we're facing some serious trouble**.

body:
DEMOCRATIC ASSOCIATION OF DEMOCRATIC SECRETARIES OF STATE

The Supreme Court is about to take on the Moore v. Harper case. The outcome of this case could have an apocalyptic impact on our Democracy. We need to fight back immediately by electing Democratic Secretaries of State nationwide. It’s the only way to protect our freedom to vote. Rush anything you can afford now to elect Pro-Democracy Democrats Nationwide and then read why this is critically important below. This is an emergency: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=15]
Rush a donation now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=5]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=15]We watched SCOTUS repeal gun safety measures.
We watched them overturn Roe v. Wade.
And we watched them undermine the EPA’s power.
Now, things are going from bad to worse: If SCOTUS rules in favor of the state legislatures, which they’re anticipated to do, then partisan, gerrymandered state legislatures will have complete control over running elections in their states.
Harsh Reality: If state legislatures have complete control over their elections, the checks and balances of the governor and state courts will no longer apply. Republican state legislatures will be able to gerrymander with impunity. They will be able to throw out or invalidate votes that go for the candidate that they don’t want to win.
The ONLY way to defend our elections from extremist Republicans is to elect Democratic Secretaries of State. They are the LAST line of defense in our elections. And right now, it’s critical we protect our elections from Trump’s Supreme Court Puppets. Please rush a donation right now to elect pro-democracy Democrats: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=15]Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=5]
Chip in $35 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=35]
Chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070922_B1_MoorevHarper_30AC&amount=15]
Together,
Democratic Association of Secretaries of State

Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State.

We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions.

There are 27 Secretaries of State races this year. We're fighting to reelect 13 Democratic Secretaries of State, win in battleground states, and flip red seats blue. But we're relying on grassroots supporters to provide us with the resources we need to win nationwide.

Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda:

The fact of the matter is that our nation's highest court no longer represents logic, equal justice or the will of the American people.** And it's all because Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked the Supreme Court with their hand-picked ultraconservative justices.**

clean_body: | | | The Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade — ripping away reproductive rights from millions despite nearly 50 years of clear legal precedent. As this ultraconservative majority — stacked with Trump-appointed justices — goes directly against the will of the American people, we need to know where you stand, friend: Do you approve of the Supreme Court? | | | | | Friend: The Supreme Court just cleared the way for Republican extremists to attack our reproductive freedom across the country — and opened the door to roll back even more of our most fundamental freedoms. The fact of the matter is that our nation's highest court no longer represents logic, equal justice or the will of the American people. And it's all because Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked the Supreme Court with their hand-picked ultraconservative justices. We need to know what grassroots Democrats think about the most conservative Supreme Court in decades. But we're still missing 47 responses from OH, and we're waiting for you to let us know where you stand before this urgent poll closes at midnight, friend: Do you approve of the Supreme Court? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . GILLIBRAND FOR SENATE 126 C Street NW 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20001 United States © 2022 | Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate. |

name: Team Lira
subject: There’s a new candidate in TX-23:
body:
Peter, there’s a new candidate running in TX-23. | Peter, there’s a new candidate running in TX-23. [**Here’s what that means for us: it means we have a clear path to victory and to electing John to Congress. Before we explain why, will you make a donation to our fight so we can keep fighting to address the needs of TX-23?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597057/354926729/1997192115?refcode=em20220709&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFhYjg3MS05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJGa3jDn6DbVQlesDF3WbM28hZ7wZod7rL6kMrlPOrk=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597058/354926730/1997192115?refcode=em20220709&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFhYjg3MS05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJGa3jDn6DbVQlesDF3WbM28hZ7wZod7rL6kMrlPOrk=)** The Texas Secretary of State has confirmed that former Val Verde Republican County Chair Frank Lopez Jr. is now on the ballot for TX-23 as an independent candidate. **Two things are clear from this revelation — first, Republicans are deeply fractured in our district. Support for Tony Gonzales is failing, even inside the GOP.** **Second, Texans are ready for change and they’re ready for someone like John Lira to represent them.** John is the candidate who is ready to bring common-sense solutions that actually represent the people of this district — to protect and serve real Texas families on the ground and fight for their interests alone. [**Out of all three candidates, there’s no competition. John is the best person to represent TX-23. Our path to victory is clear, we just need resources to get there. Will you chip in now so we can take this fight to Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597059/354926731/1997192115?refcode=em20220709&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFhYjg3MS05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJGa3jDn6DbVQlesDF3WbM28hZ7wZod7rL6kMrlPOrk=) Let’s get to work, Team Lira **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597060/354926732/1997192115?refcode=em20220709&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFhYjg3MS05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJGa3jDn6DbVQlesDF3WbM28hZ7wZod7rL6kMrlPOrk=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597061/354926733/-593876365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFhYjg3MS05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJGa3jDn6DbVQlesDF3WbM28hZ7wZod7rL6kMrlPOrk=&emci=2ea220ce-3dfe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e41ab871-95ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597062/354926734/-1869672870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFhYjg3MS05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJGa3jDn6DbVQlesDF3WbM28hZ7wZod7rL6kMrlPOrk=&emci=2ea220ce-3dfe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e41ab871-95ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212)

name: Emmy Rossum
subject: Fighting for accessible abortion — for everybody, everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
This is about our lives and our freedom to control our own destinies.
| | |
---
Folks,

This year, I celebrated my first Mother's Day. A month later, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade – telling this country that my daughter will have fewer rights than my mother had.

It is absolutely unacceptable. But in the face of this devastating decision I am recommitting to the fight for accessible abortion — for everybody, everywhere.

This fight begins with electing fiercely pro-choice leaders who will stand up for the right to abortion. Senator Maggie Hassan is one of these leaders, and we absolutely cannot afford to lose this seat in New Hampshire.

**[But here's the thing: Republicans have spent over $10 MILLION attacking Maggie in New Hampshire, and she is down 2 points to an anti-choice opponent. Can you please rush a donation to help her fight back and close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597128/354927009/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQzYjMwMC05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwBLGSWLrq_Zf4lmuXPmnCb7ougBmiYqdaOb9NF61MQ=)**

Maggie has fought for women and families her entire career. But friend, she needs our help now more than ever. Republicans know that control of the Senate runs through New Hampshire, and they will do – and spend – just about anything to win this seat. We need to do more.

**[We need all hands on deck, and that’s why I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can and stand with me in supporting Maggie Hassan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597129/354927010/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQzYjMwMC05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwBLGSWLrq_Zf4lmuXPmnCb7ougBmiYqdaOb9NF61MQ=)**
Our razor thin majority in the Senate is all that stands between us and the nationwide abortion ban Mitch McConnell has threatened. Republicans are counting on us backing down. But we won’t back down because we can’t. Neither will Maggie Hassan. This is about each of our lives and our freedom to control our own destinies.

Thank you for your support,

Emmy Rossum
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47597130/354927011/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQzYjMwMC05NWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwBLGSWLrq_Zf4lmuXPmnCb7ougBmiYqdaOb9NF61MQ=)
| | _Emmy Rossum is an actress, director, producer, singer, and activist. She is best known for her role as Fiona Gallagher in the television series Shameless. _

clean_body: This is about our lives and our freedom to control our own destinies. | | | Folks, This year, I celebrated my first Mother's Day. A month later, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade – telling this country that my daughter will have fewer rights than my mother had. It is absolutely unacceptable. But in the face of this devastating decision I am recommitting to the fight for accessible abortion — for everybody, everywhere. This fight begins with electing fiercely pro-choice leaders who will stand up for the right to abortion. Senator Maggie Hassan is one of these leaders, and we absolutely cannot afford to lose this seat in New Hampshire. = Maggie has fought for women and families her entire career. But friend, she needs our help now more than ever. Republicans know that control of the Senate runs through New Hampshire, and they will do – and spend – just about anything to win this seat. We need to do more. = Our razor thin majority in the Senate is all that stands between us and the nationwide abortion ban Mitch McConnell has threatened. Republicans are counting on us backing down. But we won’t back down because we can’t. Neither will Maggie Hassan. This is about each of our lives and our freedom to control our own destinies. Thank you for your support, Emmy Rossum = | | Emmy Rossum is an actress, director, producer, singer, and activist. She is best known for her role as Fiona Gallagher in the television series Shameless. | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Liz Cheney needs to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter:

It's never been more critical that the America First movement fire Liz Cheney.

Liz Cheney didn't just impeach Donald Trump.

**Liz Cheney played a starring role in Nancy Pelosi's January 6 Committee's Soviet-style show trial.**

With the help of one of the fake news media's top hatchet men, Cheney, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the Trump haters, TV staged managed a primetime Hollywood show full of deceptively edited, out-of-context, and misleading video.

_And Liz Cheney and the rest of the Democrats made it clear their goal is not just to block Donald Trump from running for re-election in 2024_...

... Their goal is to smear you and the other 74,000,000 Trump voters as domestic terrorists and lock up anyone that questions the 2020 election or opposes the Biden regime.

**Liz Cheney is facing a primary on August 16.**

I need your help to rally the America First movement to fire Liz Cheney from Congress and kick her out of the GOP.

**[Will you chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 to help me defeat Liz Cheney](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60449821:sQHJbyhNb:m:1:2365227053:6E05B9FAAC7954F5EE8274C8DEA9C429:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60449821:sQHJbyhNb:m:1:2365227053:6E05B9FAAC7954F5EE8274C8DEA9C429:r) **The stakes are simple.**

If Liz Cheney remains in Congress, the witch hunt against Donald Trump will drag on.

And if there is one thing Liz Cheney excels at, it is waging an endless war.

Liz Cheney even wants to run for president in 2024.

**Liz Cheney proved that by helping run the January 6 witch hunt, her loyalty is to the D.C. swamp and Nancy Pelosi.**

That's why I'm asking for your help to rally the America First movement to fire Liz Cheney and end the witch hunt against President Trump and his supporters.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60449821:sQHJbyhNb:m:1:2365227053:6E05B9FAAC7954F5EE8274C8DEA9C429:r).**
[_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIRE LIZ CHENEY
CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60449821:sQHJbyhNb:m:1:2365227053:6E05B9FAAC7954F5EE8274C8DEA9C429:r) Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60449821:sQHJbyhNb:m:1:2365227053:6E05B9FAAC7954F5EE8274C8DEA9C429:r)

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Third-Generation Sandblaster
body:
I know many of you have already heard my story, but I wanted to take a minute to remind you why I am here today.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016PTypOweQc0SYcYYVhpNGU1vfG4nduRVhXUML4Nc4H3-MsLnQi4hjDgM6oRxNY3vsQ-2UED-0rtd8RT5OwPz1YmC3rp1ooUIBSreY7un9oSvy-1FxSMNua0SDCqhIuiuQZDQr79XsUhSZEJqfqV1w41uzAvHQOGgyMKC1q4YOZYO274F5rilSwzX8V-D_u588i6D7-GWDK_WJCVSB52Dq7syEt2228WX&c=XLnXQXWXc-kKxoZLAhOag__dt3p_6_rRtphbC-jYnzQsqhaeXA0OeA==&ch=oAgqNbn5uDxW8pCQ3BEd9LolBecJI_8T7zvO779pZZ1OUBY3OVUKQQ==)
---
| Friend
I know many of you have already heard my story, but I wanted to take a minute to remind you why I am here today. I am a third-generation sandblaster who grew up on a small cattle ranch. Therefore, I understand the hard work and determination it takes to run a small business, and it's not easy.
Check it out:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016PTypOweQc0SYcYYVhpNGU1vfG4nduRVhXUML4Nc4H3-MsLnQi4hjDgM6oRxNY3vsQ-2UED-0rtd8RT5OwPz1YmC3rp1ooUIBSreY7un9oSvy-1FxSMNua0SDCqhIuiuQZDQr79XsUhSZEJqfqV1w41uzAvHQOGgyMKC1q4YOZYO274F5rilSwzX8V-D_u588i6D7-GWDK_WJCVSB52Dq7syEt2228WX&c=XLnXQXWXc-kKxoZLAhOag__dt3p_6_rRtphbC-jYnzQsqhaeXA0OeA==&ch=oAgqNbn5uDxW8pCQ3BEd9LolBecJI_8T7zvO779pZZ1OUBY3OVUKQQ==)
---
| I learned early on that the Federal Government should not be a debilitator, but rather a facilitator. Remember this: The best thing our government can do to support our entrepreneurs, small businesses, and grow our economy is to get the hell out of the way.
I know I have what it takes to help hardworking Americans, and I've proven it as the youngest Republican Congresswoman in this Congress. These past two years, I have been working around the clock to stop reckless spending, support small businesses during COVID, and block the tyrannical Left's overreach into our wallets. We need Conservative leaders now more than ever because Biden's war on our economy has made it difficult for every hardworking American and small business owner.
We're seeing a Red Wave like no other across the country because patriots like you, are supporting the fight. You know what's at stake. Come November, we have to show the Liberal suits we will not be put last any longer! Americans need leaders who have the experience, determination, and grit to protect our freedom. Friend if you have the means, [will you help me continue my fight to bring this leadership to the House?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016PTypOweQc0SYcYYVhpNGU1vfG4nduRVhXUML4Nc4H3-MsLnQi4hjDgM6oRxNY3vsQ-2UED-0rtd8RT5OwPz1YmC3rp1ooUIBSreY7un9oSvy-1FxSMNua0SDCqhIuiuQZDQr79XsUhSZEJqfqV1w41uzAvHQOGgyMKC1q4YOZYO274F5rilSwzX8V-D_u588i6D7-GWDK_WJCVSB52Dq7syEt2228WX&c=XLnXQXWXc-kKxoZLAhOag__dt3p_6_rRtphbC-jYnzQsqhaeXA0OeA==&ch=oAgqNbn5uDxW8pCQ3BEd9LolBecJI_8T7zvO779pZZ1OUBY3OVUKQQ==)
For our future,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016PTypOweQc0SYcYYVhpNGU1vfG4nduRVhXUML4Nc4H3-MsLnQi4hjDgM6oRxNY3vsQ-2UED-0rtd8RT5OwPz1YmC3rp1ooUIBSreY7un9oSvy-1FxSMNua0SDCqhIuiuQZDQr79XsUhSZEJqfqV1w41uzAvHQOGgyMKC1q4YOZYO274F5rilSwzX8V-D_u588i6D7-GWDK_WJCVSB52Dq7syEt2228WX&c=XLnXQXWXc-kKxoZLAhOag__dt3p_6_rRtphbC-jYnzQsqhaeXA0OeA==&ch=oAgqNbn5uDxW8pCQ3BEd9LolBecJI_8T7zvO779pZZ1OUBY3OVUKQQ==)
---
| Kat Cammack

subject: How do you feel about POTUS?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
https://www.thefairnessproject.org/ [https://www.thefairnessproject.org/]
Team,

Today, we’ve got a simple question for you: how do you feel about the President? Our state-level ballot measure campaigns are often direct responses to action — or inaction — at the federal level. So it’s important to us that we have a gauge on how folks feel about this administration’s job performance.

Will you help Fairness Project with this by taking our one-click poll?

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: What are your thoughts on the Jan. 6 Committee?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
|
---
Friend,

We continue to hear more from the House Jan. 6 Committee as its investigation into the circumstances surrounding the attack on the U.S. Capitol uncovers new information. What they’ve revealed so far is damning to Trump and his loyalists in the GOP. **In advance of two new hearings announced by the committee for next week, I wanted to check in to see what you think of what the committee has presented so far.** I’m curious to know how much you’ve been tuning in, who you thought had the most compelling testimony, and any other thoughts you’ve had about what we’ve heard so far. [**Take this 7-question survey to share with us what you think about the Jan. 6 Committee.**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWxcvW1-Ps_LW4d7Bs97rSTw9W46ZLVZ4Mh8tvN50kgPk3q90pV1-WJV7CgZhhW5FFgjR7r1_73W1ShM2769cjLgW93fK303dVMbfW4RcRc41xg5WWW6fVNb72wv52FW7zcWF31btvTRW994nkM9khCTSN3R61SLGFF4NW3svHYy7BsYyBN4-vzm24SjWXW3HnVwv2PktJYW69MbkW2ktCB4W5QbNbD23Q4bCVhq6g42cCNycW2nmM861SdXTqN8PJyg1fycmMW57d7Y26jp6gfW3M-0H36-F0kdN1ngxPM3_syxW527S-_1fCXCBW94R-NP6cw6PkW2jMTjN8sgphwW67zg9P4tnQ_lW1hyxxT7x1V6zV1GKQf5XftkrW5m-XyC3lcYgj39xh1) We’ve been telling you what we think are the most important highlights of the committee’s hearings these past few weeks. But we want to make sure our strategy is in step with our audience. More hearings and explosive details are on the way, and your thoughts will be a huge help in informing our work as we cover the committee’s next steps.
Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: message from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47598726/354934518/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc2NTE4NC05OGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdg_kK_Ltm7N1cB-HT9OTFue5aBa7HFZ3iEchegk8pc=)
---
Peter, these past few months on the campaign trail have been jam-packed – and I've loved every minute of it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47598727/354934519/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc2NTE4NC05OGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdg_kK_Ltm7N1cB-HT9OTFue5aBa7HFZ3iEchegk8pc=)
**I have been traveling all over the Show Me State, going to round tables, parades, protests.** I've met with hundreds of Missourians, hearing their stories and listening to their concerns.
I've had a wonderful time, but make no mistake: Meeting voters is serious business. We've talked about our country's future and the type of leadership we need in Washington. **I've learned so much from these conversations, and they'll guide our campaign in the months to come.**
But sometimes, after a long day on the road, I am able to convince my team to take a quick pit stop to grab some goodies for my grandkids. During those moments, I remember exactly who I'm in this fight for.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47598728/354934520/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc2NTE4NC05OGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdg_kK_Ltm7N1cB-HT9OTFue5aBa7HFZ3iEchegk8pc=)
**I've spent my entire life trying to secure a better future for our children**** – as a nurse, as a volunteer, as an advocate, and as a mom. Now I'm running for this seat to bring this work to the Senate. **There's so much we must do to ensure that our children, our grandchildren, and future generations have the chance to achieve their own American Dreams. And it means the world that you're in this with me.
**[So please, if you have a little bit extra to spare today, could you pitch in to help me continue to travel across our state and meet voters? Your grassroots donation will build the people-powered coalition we need to win in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47598729/354934521/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc2NTE4NC05OGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdg_kK_Ltm7N1cB-HT9OTFue5aBa7HFZ3iEchegk8pc=)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, these past few months on the campaign trail have been jam-packed – and I've loved every minute of it. = I have been traveling all over the Show Me State, going to round tables, parades, protests. I've met with hundreds of Missourians, hearing their stories and listening to their concerns. I've had a wonderful time, but make no mistake: Meeting voters is serious business. We've talked about our country's future and the type of leadership we need in Washington. I've learned so much from these conversations, and they'll guide our campaign in the months to come. But sometimes, after a long day on the road, I am able to convince my team to take a quick pit stop to grab some goodies for my grandkids. During those moments, I remember exactly who I'm in this fight for. = I've spent my entire life trying to secure a better future for our children – as a nurse, as a volunteer, as an advocate, and as a mom. Now I'm running for this seat to bring this work to the Senate. There's so much we must do to ensure that our children, our grandchildren, and future generations have the chance to achieve their own American Dreams. And it means the world that you're in this with me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for being on my team. – Trudy | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate PO Box 11826 Clayton, MO 63105 United States

name: Dave Giles
subject: My PLAN
body:
Hello Peter! My Plan Dave is the strongest constitutional Candidate in Arizona Congressional Distr
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=5772223.6374.1.fb4cfb428e307247d1cdc13c3ba235e1)
---
**Hello Peter!**
---
**My Plan** **Dave is the strongest constitutional Candidate**
**in Arizona Congressional District Four.** He supports the Constitution as being the foundation of making America the greatest country in the world. Government overreach has grown to such a degree that we are now faced with huge debt, an invasion, and a faltering economy.
We need to stop government overreach and bring the federal government back into conforming to the Constitution. 10th Amendment states “What is not specified reverts to the states or the people”. **Push-back is beginning.**
We are seeing the overturn of “Roe vs Wade”
The People have seen children indoctrination and are taking back school boards.
Today the Supreme Court struct down NYC concealed carry ban.
The Supreme Court struck down banning praying in public. **It is time to make the Constitution the “Law of the Land” again.
America First!** **ON DAY ONE- Dave Will:** 1\. Fight government overreach by **initiating legislation** to Limit the duration of presidential executive orders to one week. FDR in his speech on the Day of Infamy is not permitted to declare war. That is specified in the Constitution as a Congressional duty. Congress declared war within the hour. Proving that if the people want a law, Congress will make it law, not the president or the supreme court.
2\. I will **begin legislation** to repeal the “Patriot Act”. America does not take political prisoners. The “Patriot Act” seemed good for finding international terrorist. After the January 6TH rally citizens were targeted, and a huge misuse of this act has violated citizen rights. Such as the 4th amendment. Release all prisoners now!
3\. Finish securing the border is a must. I will **lead other legislators** in legislation to override presidential orders stopping the finishing of the border wall. Even if supporting the states in “Declaring an Invasion” and closing their borders as specified in the Constitution.
4\. Initiate legislation to support our veterans and homeless by **redirecting funds** from foreign aid to needy Americans.
5\. Begin legislation to **enforce the “Remain in Mexico”** policy. Change immigration law to remove automatic asylum by stepping foot on US Soil and removing the visa lottery.
6\. **Repeal the department of education.** This department is not in the constitution and belongs to the sates or to the people.
7\. Initiate legislation to **modify the tax law** to a fair tax flat tax. The more you make, the more you pay.
8\. **Begin legislation to override presidential orders** limiting our economy. Such as the XL pipeline.
9\. **Reevaluate all foreign aid.** America and Americans first! Americans can freely donate to aid any organization they wish.
10\. **Begin legislation to override presidential orders** limiting our military. America must have the strongest military in the world.
11\. **Initiate “Term Limits” legislation** – I signed the term limits proposal and will initiate term limits for congress as follows: already the President is 2 terms = 8 years; senate 2 terms = 12 years and congress 5 terms = 10 years.
12\. **Create Hot head law** – preventing law makers from creating laws by emotions... need a waiting time to allow for emotions to cool and clear decisions. Protecting our constitution.
| 1. | Fight government overreach by **initiating legislation** to Limit the duration of presidential executive orders to one week. FDR in his speech on the Day of Infamy is not permitted to declare war. That is specified in the Constitution as a Congressional duty. Congress declared war within the hour. Proving that if the people want a law, Congress will make it law, not the president or the supreme court.

After the January 6TH rally citizens were targeted, and a huge misuse of this act has violated citizen rights. Such as the 4th amendment. Release all prisoners now!

---|---

---|---

---|---
6. | **Repeal the department of education.** This department is not in the constitution and belongs to the sates or to the people.
---|---
7. | Initiate legislation to **modify the tax law** to a fair tax flat tax. The more you make, the more you pay.
---|---
8. | **Begin legislation to override presidential orders** limiting our economy. Such as the XL pipeline.
---|---
9. | **Reevaluate all foreign aid.** America and Americans first! Americans can freely donate to aid any organization they wish.
---|---
10. | **Begin legislation to override presidential orders** limiting our military. America must have the strongest military in the world.
---|---
11. | **Initiate “Term Limits” legislation** – I signed the term limits proposal and will initiate term limits for congress as follows: already the President is 2 terms = 8 years; senate 2 terms = 12 years and congress 5 terms = 10 years.
---|---
12. | **Create Hot head law** – preventing law makers from creating laws by emotions... need a waiting time to allow for emotions to cool and clear decisions. Protecting our constitution.
---|---
**Laws are made in Congress, approved by the senate, and signed into law by the president. All laws not following this path are unconstitutional and need to be re-examined.**
**I will protect and defend the Constitution unlike other candidates and those elected to office.**

name: Kevin Schilling, Team Kilmer
subject: Team Kilmer will be at the Tacoma Pride Festival today! Will you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Proud to be fighting to defend Derek's seat!
Hey Peter -- Kevin here, Derek's Political Director.

**The Tacoma Pride Festival is today, and I 'm happy to say that a lot of Team Kilmer will be there!** This summer, we brought on a lot of Democracy Summer Fellows and new interns to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket this November.

As you might know, I'm a proud member of the LGBTQ+ community, and our campaign has had the chance to work with a group of LGBTQ+ fellows and interns who are fired up about re-electing Derek this year!

Now, perhaps more than ever, we need to stand with leaders like Derek who are fighting to defend LGBTQ+ rights and liberties in Congress. It's no secret that there has been an increase in recent anti-LGBTQ+ attacks. From the "Don't Say Gay" bill in Florida to the various copy-cat bills that have followed in other states, and even attempts to criminalize parents who seek gender-affirming care for their children.

A proud original co-sponsor of the Equality Act, I know Derek will never stop fighting back against these regressive and harmful attacks on our community.

**That 's why the choice this election year is clear - it's crucial that we elect Democrats like Derek Kilmer, because our democracy and our basic freedoms depend on it.**

Our interns and summer fellows have been hard at work knocking on doors, talking to voters, and encouraging our community to VOTE this August and November.

We're counting on you to turn out and make your voice heard by using your vote to say NO to these far-right attacks. We can't afford to lose our majority in Congress - or Derek's leadership - which is why it's important to double and triple-check your voter registration ahead of time. If you're not already registered, _there 's still plenty of time to do so: _
[CHECK MY VOTER STATUS](https://act.myngp.com/el/k2Rbt49d3Ci2zaHer2pk2r6m7UN4mC7iwHvHdW_IKnE=/OJVlGAvEHi1BQuCrQSuAFk4cvpslh0-TdQ17zV2WWWM=)
[REGISTER TO VOTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/k2Rbt49d3Ci2zaHer2pk2r6m7UN4mC7iwHvHdW_IKnE=/OJVlGAvEHi1BQuCrQSuAFk4cvpslh0-TdQ17zV2WWWM=)
Thanks for your support, and for always standing by our side. We'll see some of you at Pride today!

Kevin Schilling
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/k2Rbt49d3Ci2zaHer2pk2r6m7UN4mC7iwHvHdW_IKnE=/X5TgPgwVDm_kKStjvm3oPz1S-3y8lgjL8WGjurue8XU=?refcode=em22_220709_pride_engg_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220709_pride_engg_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

clean_body: Proud to be fighting to defend Derek's seat! Hey Peter -- Kevin here, Derek's Political Director. The Tacoma Pride Festival is today, and I 'm happy to say that a lot of Team Kilmer will be there! This summer, we brought on a lot of Democracy Summer Fellows and new interns to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket this November. As you might know, I'm a proud member of the LGBTQ+ community, and our campaign has had the chance to work with a group of LGBTQ+ fellows and interns who are fired up about re-electing Derek this year! Now, perhaps more than ever, we need to stand with leaders like Derek who are fighting to defend LGBTQ+ rights and liberties in Congress. It's no secret that there has been an increase in recent anti-LGBTQ+ attacks. From the "Don't Say Gay" bill in Florida to the various copy-cat bills that have followed in other states, and even attempts to criminalize parents who seek gender-affirming care for their children. A proud original co-sponsor of the Equality Act, I know Derek will never stop fighting back against these regressive and harmful attacks on our community. That 's why the choice this election year is clear - it's crucial that we elect Democrats like Derek Kilmer, because our democracy and our basic freedoms depend on it. Our interns and summer fellows have been hard at work knocking on doors, talking to voters, and encouraging our community to VOTE this August and November. We're counting on you to turn out and make your voice heard by using your vote to say NO to these far-right attacks. We can't afford to lose our majority in Congress - or Derek's leadership - which is why it's important to double and triple-check your voter registration ahead of time. If you're not already registered, there 's still plenty of time to do so: = = Thanks for your support, and for always standing by our side. We'll see some of you at Pride today! Kevin Schilling Political Director Derek Kilmer for Congress Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. name: Greg Stamps
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsTmWlyhNk

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osTmWlyhNk

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Dear Friend, Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism. But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism? This is precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. Simply click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism And Capitalism. Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. | , this is what we have to show for the last 4 years under Newsom.
* **Out of control gas prices**
* **Nearly the poorest education rates in the U.S.**
* **The highest crime rates in decades **
* **The highest poverty rate in the nation **
* **Planned electrical outages and water rationing (and more on the way this summer)**
* **A mass exodus of businesses and jobs **

All of these devastating issues could have been avoided by policy changes.

I’ve had enough.

And I’m fighting against the madness, to save Californians from living under these conditions.

But I need your help.
---
| [Support Brian Dahle in Taking Back California](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=55c96790fc&e=f9133ea432 "Support Brian Dahle in Taking Back California")
---
| , today marks 122 days until election day here in California.

So here’s my pledge to you:

**If you’ll help, I promise I will work tirelessly to fix our education crisis by putting parents back in the driver seat.

If you’ll help, I promise to implement economic policies that raise Californians out of poverty and preserve the California Dream.

If you’ll help, I promise to support the rule of law, and you’ll see the crime rates go down, not up.

If you’ll help, I promise to do everything in my power to make California affordable again. **

And my voting record supports it - so you know you can trust me to follow through.

But , none of this will be possible if we don’t reach our fundraising goals.

Can I count on you to help out?
---
