name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Show your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, President Biden signed our _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ into law after it passed the Senate with bipartisan support. **This is the most significant violence prevention law in over 30 years. ** It will save lives, reduce violence across the nation, and make our communities safer. Now that our legislation is law, states can implement measures to prevent crises and protect communities. Our _Bipartisan Safer Communities_ law provides funding for community violence intervention programs, implements crisis intervention programs in schools, creates advanced background checks for firearms purchasers under 21, and closes the “boyfriend loophole” — prohibiting all individuals convicted of domestic violence from owning a gun for at least 5 years. There is nothing more important than keeping families and children safe in our communities and in our schools. I couldn’t be more grateful for this moment and look forward to seeing our law in action in Arizona and across the country. [**As we work to implement our _Bipartisan Safer Communities_ law, please sign your name to show support for its life-saving provisions — including protections for domestic violence survivors, advanced background checks, and school and community violence intervention.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47601269/354946654/704135639?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220709_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWZjYjg1YS1hMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YHkGmDBsy0Jy4OLljkNLVXhj2h_ksyc9fqkTfql8AT8=&emci=5ece9554-a0ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a5fcb85a-a0ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47601270/354946655/704135639?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220709_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWZjYjg1YS1hMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YHkGmDBsy0Jy4OLljkNLVXhj2h_ksyc9fqkTfql8AT8=&emci=5ece9554-a0ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a5fcb85a-a0ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: We can't sit this out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
Dear Peter,
There's no easy way to say this...look what has happened to our home from only ONE term under Bill Lee.
We've seen the vilification of the unhoused and homeless, the stripping of women and gay rights, the regression towards religious fanaticism within our schools, and the suffering of everyday working Tennesseans who can't even afford to put food on the table, meanwhile Lee and his crooks are sitting on millions in unused federal relief for our state.
This is more than political party, ideology, or where you live in Tennessee. It's about a governor who is too inept to lead and is destroying the progress we have worked towards.
We must defeat Bill Lee.
All the best,
Dr. Jason Martin

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: a personal ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
what I need from you today:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47601902/354948633/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3680-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWQ3MzEzMS1hMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7upsP6ii4BYSU9s4Vi3SE7V0IAf7_eF-udQqhkxC3Bo=)
---
**I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help today, friend.**
When I first launched this campaign over a year ago, grassroots Democrats like you came out in droves to support me. This momentum has carried me far: **I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the polls****, The Cook Political Report upgraded my chances of winning and CNN called Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip blue!**
But Marco Rubio is trying to wipe away all of my momentum, running low-blow attack ads to defeat me by smearing my record. **I've got thick skin, but that doesn't change the fact Rubio and the Senate GOP have hauled in over $50 million. **
There's no way around it: My biggest obstacle to winning this race will be having the resources it takes to go toe to toe with Marco Rubio in what experts say will likely be the most expensive Senate race ever. That's why I set a $50,000 midnight fundraising goal – which is ambitious, but it's what it will take to compete with national Republicans and their dark-money allies.
**I'm counting on every person reading this email to help me out with a grassroots donation. ****With Senate control on the line in this tight race, the stakes could not be higher. **

When I first launched this campaign over a year ago, grassroots Democrats like you came out in droves to support me. This momentum has carried me far: I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the polls, The Cook Political Report upgraded my chances of winning and CNN called Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip blue! But Marco Rubio is trying to wipe away all of my momentum, running low-blow attack ads to defeat me by smearing my record. I've got thick skin, but that doesn't change the fact Rubio and the Senate GOP have hauled in over $50 million. There's no way around it: My biggest obstacle to winning this race will be having the resources it takes to go toe to toe with Marco Rubio in what experts say will likely be the most expensive Senate race ever. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: huge news
body:
Derek, this is huge: Recent polling shows me statistically tied with my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, right here in Georgia.
But with the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't surge ahead and defend this critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. That's why I'm urgently asking: Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood to win in Georgia and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock]
I was getting worried, friend. After CNN named me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot, the GOP started coming after me as its top target for defeat. They poured over $16 MILLION into Walker's campaign – then polls showed me 1 point down. But now, with the general election officially underway, we've got the wind at our backs.
Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that our race could decide Senate control, so there's absolutely zero room for error. That's why we need to meet our midnight fundraising deadline – so we can take FULL advantage of this moment, keep up our momentum, and win – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help.
Please, Derek, will you split an urgent donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and CommonGood so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220709_CGVA_Warnock]
Your support is what fuels our people-powered movement forward. Thank you so much.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://go.terrymcauliffe.com/p/kLtAki73Jk-9WaBIIAMDXQ2?unsubscribedata=LjOarmbWB6d%2FX6DXsRRmAbU7Vdek6NUPBgmUBMSMT27A0ULYogAYP0cicJme3QkmgKEHS7BoAhR%2BdZyU%2FRFT%2B0tT8GryMoFL3gqOEIfaMOtZRBc4i8r3wEOmmH7mvoYCo7%2FCb1APkJdUzDGqx7BjAs%2B9lWt0V6F1P5ra9I7HX0ecbFa%2Fww8gHGsvXXRflGbN3dbSVWZMQVXm28g8QHCUgdajV%2Fm1O6ynIGr06edF3mZtBmTWNSHiViK67mNBZb7gW3QLns%2FmgGrHDeF2mqlCYAOm70cR4QGhTfVCXyLiAzbDrvTZEJha66%2B7GH5038JUFrSvozzImSR%2BaSHDKu3VgPc1iOsBQQGCchGFaHGEx1tP4vr%2BwO3wxV10xPCY0Sm4VaVF2ue02X5zxZCgHHSGbIa4nm9T5Rkq4vp3G0ZWZ4A%3D .

They poured over $16 MILLION into Walker's campaign – then polls showed me 1 point down. But now, with the general election officially underway, we've got the wind at our backs. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that our race could decide Senate control, so there's absolutely zero room for error. That's why we need to meet our midnight fundraising deadline – so we can take FULL advantage of this moment, keep up our momentum, and win – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help. Please, Derek, will you split an urgent donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and CommonGood so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Donate ANY [] Your support is what fuels our people-powered movement forward. Thank you so much. – Rev. Raphael Warnock (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.) body:
Add your name today!
| Friend — **Republicans think they’ve won the fight over abortion. They’re wrong.** The right to reproductive health care is absolutely fundamental, and we won’t stop fighting until it’s RESTORED here in Texas and across the country. **But until then, our leaders need to have a plan.** You deserve to know exactly how we’ll stand up for your rights in office. That’s why I released my Plan of Action last month, outlining the steps I’ll take as Attorney General to fight back against the GOP’s cruel abortion ban and defend patients in our state. I’m passing it along again below. **_[Friend, once you’ve read the plan, would you take a moment to sign on to endorse my proposal? I would really appreciate your support. Click here to endorse>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603102/354952949/1784501954?refcode=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lqjwh_6gUUB818jvK8MJkq5IIW2DRfHIftu4KWiViTY=&emci=415d3eab-f3fe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21938367)_** **[ENDORSE THE PLAN »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603103/354952950/1784501954?refcode=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lqjwh_6gUUB818jvK8MJkq5IIW2DRfHIftu4KWiViTY=&emci=415d3eab-f3fe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21938367)** Thank you for your confidence, Rochelle
**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Rochelle Garza
**Date:** Jun 25, 2022, 9:01 AM
**Subject:** My Plan of Action to fight to restore reproductive rights:
> Friend, now that the Supreme Court’s conservative-majority has officially overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and Texas is set to criminalize abortion care, **I’m releasing my Plan of Action for the steps I will take as Attorney General to fight to restore reproductive rights in our state.** **_[Please, take a moment to read it below, and make a donation to my campaign for Attorney General so I can get to work fighting for our fundamental rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603104/354952951/612589568?refcode=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lqjwh_6gUUB818jvK8MJkq5IIW2DRfHIftu4KWiViTY=)_** **[CONTRIBUTE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603105/354952952/612589568?refcode=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lqjwh_6gUUB818jvK8MJkq5IIW2DRfHIftu4KWiViTY=)**
> * * *
> _Rochelle Garza’s Plan of Action_
> 1. **As your AG, I will refuse to prosecute anyone for seeking, obtaining, or helping someone else obtain abortion care.** We have to protect patients, doctors, and other health care facilitators from unjust criminal retribution.
>
>
> 2. **I will help protect Texans who suffer pregnancy loss from persecution.** In this post-_Roe_ world, patients who are experiencing a miscarriage may be accused of obtaining an abortion and might be unable to receive the health care they need.
>
>
> 3. **I will support Title X protections.** Reproductive care services are about more than abortion. Low-income Texans deserve to access routine wellness exams, cancer screenings, and contraception under Title X.
>
>
> 4. **I will join other Democratic AGs in supporting legal cases aiming to secure reproductive rights.** We won’t stop fighting until the constitutional right to access an abortion is reestablished.
>

> * * *
> Listen, this Supreme Court ruling is not the end of our fight. It’s only the beginning. **We will not go back.** **_[Help me get to work for Texas by making a contribution of any size right away>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603106/354952953/612589568?refcode=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.9c2ee861-a4ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lqjwh_6gUUB818jvK8MJkq5IIW2DRfHIftu4KWiViTY=)_** clean_body: Add your name today! | Friend — Republicans think they’ve won the fight over abortion. They’re wrong. The right to reproductive health care is absolutely fundamental, and we won’t stop fighting until it’s RESTORED here in Texas and across the country. But until then, our leaders need to have a plan. You deserve to know exactly how we’ll stand up for your rights in office. That’s why I released my Plan of Action last month, outlining the steps I’ll take as Attorney General to fight back against the GOP’s cruel abortion ban and defend patients in our state. I’m passing it along again below. Thank you for your confidence, Rochelle \----Original Message---- From: Rochelle Garza Date: Jun 25, 2022, 9:01 AM Subject: My Plan of Action to fight to restore reproductive rights: Friend, now that the Supreme Court’s conservative-majority has officially overturned Roe v. Wade and Texas is set to criminalize abortion care, I’m releasing my Plan of Action for the steps I will take as Attorney General to fight to restore reproductive rights in our state. = = Rochelle Garza’s Plan of Action 1. As your AG, I will refuse to prosecute anyone for seeking, obtaining, or helping someone else obtain abortion care. We have to protect patients, doctors, and other health care facilitators from unjust criminal retribution. 2. I will help protect Texans who suffer pregnancy loss from persecution. In this post-Roe world, patients who are experiencing a miscarriage may be accused of obtaining an abortion and might be unable to receive the health care they need. 3. I will support Title X protections. Reproductive care services are about more than abortion. Low-income Texans deserve to access routine wellness exams, cancer screenings, and contraception under Title X. 4. I will join other Democratic AGs in supporting legal cases aiming to secure reproductive rights. We won’t stop fighting until the constitutional right to access an abortion is reestablished. Listen, this Supreme Court ruling is not the end of our fight. It’s only the beginning. We will not go back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = = = = Thank you, Rochelle = = Rochelle Garza is running for Attorney General because it’s time for the people’s lawyer to actually serve the people — not a dangerous, ultra-partisan agenda. Rochelle will fight to restore rights that Texans have had stripped away — voting rights, the right to access safe and legal abortion — to hold the powerful accountable, and so much more. =** = = = Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas Rochelle Garza for Texas PO Box 5683 Brownsville, TX 78523 United States Our email program is an important way to reach our supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails, please =. Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, we continued to see the consequences of Joe Biden's failures at the southern border, with my home state of Texas suffering the brunt of this illegal immigration crisis. I also called out Joe Biden for his terrible response to our energy crisis that is depleting our emergency stockpile of oil.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:

| "DHS has operational control of the southern border."
That was the sworn testimony of Joe Biden's Homeland Security Secretary, Alejandro Mayorkas, just two months ago in May when he appeared before Congress to outline how the Biden administration plans to stop the illegal immigration crisis at our border.
Guess how many encounters with illegal immigrants there were at our southern border that month? More than 239,000. That's the highest monthly total in TWO DECADES and represented the 15th straight month with more than 150,000 encounters.
Does that sound like "operational control" to you? How about more than 500 illegal immigrants strolling across the border into Texas in ONE DAY, as was the case this week?
No, of course this administration doesn't have operational control of our border. They never did. Alejandro Mayorkas lied to Congress, he has failed to do his job and enforce our border laws, and his dereliction of duty has endangered our citizens and threatened our sovereignty.
He needs to resign or be impeached.

| | |

| The mess Biden created by his improper, nonsensical use of our emergency oil stockpile - the Strategic Petroleum Reserve - was entirely predictable. It was the action of a flailing administration trying to undo the damage of its own policies.
Here's why it's bad policy.
First, it's critical to understand exactly what the Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) does and doesn't do. It doesn't *store* gasoline, but reserves of largely light sweet and sour crude that can be used to make gas for our cars.
That's great. We're glad to have that for emergencies - like when a hurricane hits the Gulf Coast. But it was never designed for its current use under Biden: backfilling the entirety of the global oil market.
Biden is rapidly depleting this source of emergency crude, in a desperate attempt to trick Americans into believing that releasing 1M barrel per day (bpd) from the SPR can make a dent in a global oil market that produces 80M bpd. That's a lie, of course.
Republicans at the Energy and Commerce Committee, where I serve, actually warned Biden about this - that releasing barrels from America's emergency stockpile will do nothing to control prices, nothing to reduce the pain at the pump for Americans, and do long-term damage to our strategic reserves.
And now, while we deplete our reserves, China is *increasing* their fuel reserves almost barrel for barrel what we're decreasing from ours. China now controls the world's largest stockpile of oil at around 950M barrels. We weakened our stockpile and helped our biggest adversary.
This is the sheer incompetence of this administration.
---

| | |
---
| |

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, we continued to see the consequences of Joe Biden's failures at the southern border, with my home state of Texas suffering the brunt of this illegal immigration crisis. I also called out Joe Biden for his terrible response to our energy crisis that is depleting our emergency stockpile of oil. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | | | 500 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS STROLL INTO TEXAS | | | == | == | "DHS has operational control of the southern border." That was the sworn testimony of Joe Biden's Homeland Security Secretary, Alejandro Mayorkas, just two months ago in May when he appeared before Congress to outline how the Biden administration plans to stop the illegal immigration crisis at our border. Guess how many encounters with illegal immigrants there were at our southern border that month? More than 239,000. That's the highest monthly total in TWO DECADES and represented the 15th straight month with more than 150,000 encounters. Does that sound like "operational control" to you? How about more than 500 illegal immigrants strolling across the border into Texas in ONE DAY, as was the case this week? No, of course this administration doesn't have operational control of our border. They never did. Alejandro Mayorkas lied to Congress, he has failed to do his job and enforce our border laws, and his dereliction of duty has endangered our citizens and threatened our sovereignty. He needs to resign or be impeached. | | | | | | | | THIS IS WHAT THEY WANT | | | == | == | | | The mess Biden created by his improper, nonsensical use of our emergency oil stockpile - the Strategic Petroleum Reserve - was entirely predictable. It was the action of a flailing administration trying to undo the damage of its own policies. Here's why it's bad policy. First, it's critical to understand exactly what the Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) does and doesn't do. It doesn't store gasoline, but reserves of largely light sweet and sour crude that can be used to make gas for our cars. That's great. We're glad to have that for emergencies - like when a hurricane hits the Gulf Coast. But it was never designed for its current use under Biden: backfilling the entirety of the global oil market. Biden is rapidly depleting this source of emergency crude, in a desperate attempt to trick Americans into believing that releasing 1M barrel per day (bpd) from the SPR can make a dent in a global oil market that produces 80M bpd. That's a lie, of course. Republicans at the Energy and Commerce Committee, where I serve, actually warned Biden about this - that releasing barrels from America's emergency stockpile will do nothing to control prices, nothing to reduce the pain at the pump for Americans, and do long-term damage to our strategic reserves. And now, while we deplete our reserves, China is increasing their fuel reserves almost barrel for barrel what we're decreasing from ours. China now controls the world's largest stockpile of oil at around 950M barrels. We weakened our stockpile and helped our biggest adversary. This is the sheer incompetence of this administration. | | | | | | | | REMEMBER THIS? HERE'S WHY THERE'S AN ENERGY CRISIS | | | == | == | If you want to know why you're paying more for gas and we are depleting our emergency reserves of oil when we were an energy superpower just two years ago, watch this video by clicking the link above. And if you want to replace these people in power with Republicans who will actually boost American energy production and get out of this mess, turn that anger into action and click the link below to help me take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi. == | | | | | | | | THANKS TO EVERYONE WHO MADE SUMMER OF 1776 EPIC! | == | == | Great reminder last weekend that patriotism and love of country is alive and well! Thanks to everyone who came out. We had a blast. See you at the next Summer of 1776!! | | | | | | | | On Social Media | == | == | | | == | | | | | | | | | | Weekend Reads | NATIONAL REVIEW: == MILITARY.COM: == NEW YORK POST: == | | | Thank you for reading! Have a great weekend. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Boris, Ben & Mississippi – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/borisbenandms?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear #VALUE!,

**Ben Shapiro invited me on to his show to talk about the downfall of British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson.** [You can watch the interview here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d967cf4117&e=5703353baa)

Only a couple of years ago, Boris won a landslide election, giving the British Conservatives their largest majority since Margaret Thatcher. **So, what went wrong?**
---
|
---
_**Campaigning for Brexit**_
| **According to the media, Boris was brought down by scandals involving an office party and some cake.** There was also, of course, his rather unwise appointment of someone clearly unsuitable to be the deputy Chief Whip.

But was that really what lead to the removal of the most electorally successful Conservative leader in a generation?

**Boris’ real problem was that after accomplishing Brexit, he managed to get almost all of the big judgement calls wrong.**
* **Energy insanity:** Bizarrely, Boris signed Britain up to almost every kind of green energy lunacy. He banned fracking, and imposed all kinds of renewable targets on energy producers and households. Not only have energy prices soared, rising energy costs have created a cost of living crisis. Living standards are falling for the first time in half a century.
* **Taxation:** Britain now has the highest tax burden since the 1950s. Boris raised taxes more than any left wing government in Britain managed to do since the Second World War.
* **Aggressive lockdowns:** Covid was a challenge for leaders everywhere, but Boris’ government locked down hard and often. Laws were passed that made it a criminal offense to be outside one’s own home and families were prosecuted for going into their gardens / yards. You can’t lock down for two years, and pay people to sit at home, and not expect the country to become poorer. Even today, long after lockdown, the disruptive effect of shutting down has left Britain’s airports, hospitals and public services dysfunctional.
* **Too much regulation:** Having secured Brexit, Boris seemed reluctant to take advantage of it. No longer in the highly regulated European Union, there is no shortage of red tape to be eliminated. Several years after leaving the EU, the regulations are still there. Britain still imposes EU-type tariffs on goods that the country does not even make.

Ronald Reagan famously used to say that you should “dance with the one that brung ya." What he meant is that in politics, as in life, you should support those who got you to where you are. Big government Boris seemed to forget that.

**Boris’ downfall is more than a sad story of conservative failure across the pond. It shows what happens when leaders promise conservative government but govern left.**

Here in Mississippi, we have had a conservative super majority for about a decade. What is there to show for it?

To be fair, income taxes have been cut. A universal occupational licensing law has been passed. A Critical Race theory law has come into effect. We thankfully avoided the kind of draconian lockdowns we saw elsewhere. Oh, and the flag got changed.

**There is still much more that conservatives with a super majority ought to accomplish.**

The tax burden could be cut to make us competitive compared to Tennessee and Texas. Instead of expanding the size of the state bureaucracy, we could cut it by shutting down many of those boards and commissions that clutter up downtown Jackson.

Our state is overly dependent on federal handouts. **Rather than stimulating growth through cozy deals with big corporations, we need low taxes and light regulation to allow us to generate wealth. **If West Virginia and Arizona can introduce school choice, why can’t we?

Boris shows what happens to even the most electorally successful conservatives when they lose touch with their principles and people.

Don’t forget to dance with the folk that brung ya.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7d8331b910&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| |
---
| [Subscribe to our Podcast!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ba29d25994&e=5703353baa "Subscribe to our Podcast!")
---

---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=8d238f0b91) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=8d238f0b91).

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: Battleground Report: Pennsylvania Governor’s Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)
---
| Peter,
I'm Doug Mastriano, and I'm an America First conservative running for Governor of Pennsylvania.
But _I 'm not writing to you about Pennsylvania_, Peter. **This is about the _future of free and fair elections_ in this nation in 2024:**
* In 2020, **Pennsylvania 's Far-Left leadership _illegally_ rewrote our election laws** in the name of "Covid-19"...

* ...sacrificing our Election Integrity to **help Joe Biden and Kamala Harris win the White House.**

**If I don 't win the Pennsylvania Governor's race in November, _they 'll do the same thing again in 2024_**..._and conservatives will be shut out of the White House for good._
If you support **free elections in this nation** (and if you want to see a conservative have a _fair shot_ in 2024), **[I need you standing in my corner right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)**
**[Will you join the fight with $25 or more to fund this campaign and fuel this fight?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)** | | | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)
---
My plan to secure Election Integrity and restore confidence in voting is simple but effective:
* Immediately **end all contracts with compromised voting machine companies,**

* **Appoint a Secretary of State with experience** in securing elections from fraud,

* **Ban the use of private funds** (like Zuckerbucks) designed to influence our elections.

My race here in Pennsylvania is **one of the biggest TOSS-UP races of 2022**...and the latest poll has me trailing by just a couple points: **49-46**.

Considering we're running against a career politician with deep pockets and the full support of the Democrat Establishment and their allies in the Leftist Media, **we 're _exactly_ where we need to be right now...but we've got a _lot_ of work to do between now and November.**

If you care about Election Integrity, Peter, we as conservatives have GOT to start electing people on a state-level who are willing to fight to secure this Republic.

**I 'm that guy here in Pennsylvania.** I've got the momentum, I've got the support, and I've even got President Trump's endorsement.

But I _can 't_ win without your help. **[Will you pitch in $25 or more to help me WIN and make sure the 2024 Presidential Election is SECURE?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)**

**[Pitch in $25 or more right away (every dollar helps!)>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)**
| | | [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765372:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765373:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765374:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)
---
| | | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60765375:6cn6xRoVN:m:1:3253819041:CE71FBF675F058CCF66BCAA7364C0AB8:r)
---
Thanks,

Doug Mastriano

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Endorsed By Former Chair of Prince George’s County Council!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
New endorsement alert! I’m so excited to have received the endorsement of Kirk Wineland. As a former Chair of the Prince George’s County Council, Kirk spent many years delivering concrete results for Prince George’s working families. Kirk, I can’t thank you enough for your trust and support!
You can learn more about why Kirk is endorsing our campaign by watching our new video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=20.22]
We have the momentum in this race – and with the finish line in sight, now is the time to put our foot on the gas. Fresh off the heels of this latest endorsement alert, will you chip in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to raise $2,215 by 11:59 PM tonight, and a flood of grassroots donations can help us get there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement]
Any amount you can spare will make a critical difference to our campaign by serving as a force-multiplier in our efforts to reach out to voters in the final stretch before election day. We are the frontrunners in this crowded race, and with your help, we can pull ahead even further in these final, critical days before the July 19 primary.
My bold vision for Maryland includes protecting and expanding access to abortion care at the state level, combating the student debt crisis and climate change, leveling the playing field for Black Marylanders, and so much more. Together, we can lift our communities into the higher quality of life that they deserve.
Our challenges are sweeping – so too must be our solutions. Enough talk, let’s get it done! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kirkwinelandendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: make sure your voice is heard!

body:

After months of rescheduling, the Maryland primary is now just 10 days away: on Tuesday, July 19th. Please remember to cast your vote and ensure your voice is heard.
If you don't want to wait until July 19th, Maryland Early Voting sites are open and will stay open through **July 14th from 7:00 am until 8:00pm**. Click the LINK below for a full list of early voting sites across our state.
**[Early Voting Sites](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47606460/354956898/-625973431?refcode=em220709ev&refcode2=3cfca792-a8ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&contactdata=Zjy7hncXYWI4FzzG0VZJH0sRM2DIl8zRqRNFbnwwZz2LepzFeKDK1zFjn1clobPz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2ZjYTc5Mi1hOGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRhSLxWlL62S1UawFHkAhvHvD1sGh2O5aWGTFzs8Yqg=&emci=ae962abf-a0ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3cfca792-a8ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
If you’d like to receive your ballot by mail but have not yet requested one, all requests must be **received by this Tuesday, July 12th**.
The stakes could not be higher this election year and we need to build strong Democratic momentum in the primaries to lead to victories in November. As you know, democracy is not a spectator sport and we need every eligible citizen participating to protect It.
So I encourage you to check out the positions of the candidates on the ballot and access voting guides from groups and organizations that you respect. Confirm your polling place or early voting site and make a plan to vote at a certain date and time. Then follow through and cast your vote! Please also take a moment to remind your family members and friends to do the same.
Finally, I want to thank you for all of your support and respectfully ask for your vote for re-election to the Senate.
It will take all of us working together to protect and strengthen our democracy and, as John Lewis said, “the vote is the most powerful non-violent tool we have.”
All the best,
Chris
Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Senate majority.

name: Jasmine
subject: A really long but important email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47586979/354887436/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220709_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBmOTMwZC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHhr7sNShxarD2uO39iRLuTgUvZn3b9QoQpnklY4RoY=) Peter, This will be one of the longest emails I’ll ever send you, so I’d really appreciate it if you took a few minutes to read the whole thing. Supporters like you are the heart of our people-powered campaign. I want to give you an inside look at our organizing strategy and show you exactly how we plan to beat Republican Chuck Edwards and win this district. **This is our chance to show everyone watching that we can win this winnable race,[and I need to ask you if you’ll chip in $25 to help us hit our July fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47586980/354887437/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220709_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBmOTMwZC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHhr7sNShxarD2uO39iRLuTgUvZn3b9QoQpnklY4RoY=)** | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47586981/354887438/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220709_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBmOTMwZC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHhr7sNShxarD2uO39iRLuTgUvZn3b9QoQpnklY4RoY=)
---
**Step 1: Listen and focus on results**
Shortly after taking office as County Commissioner, I started a meet and greet coffee hour with another Commissioner. At the first event, the first day, a couple approached us and said "Our daughter overdosed two days ago. What are you going to do to make sure no more parents have to go through this?”
I listened to them and we got to work. I helped build a bipartisan coalition and we unanimously passed initiatives to respond to the opioid crisis 7-0. I also heard from working parents who struggled to balance childcare and work. I championed legislation to increase access to early childhood education and provide paid family leave for county employees that passed with 6-1 and 7-0 votes.
All politicians know how to talk (and some, like Madison Cawthorn, know how to lie.) But we need a leader who knows how to listen.
It’s time to deliver for Western North Carolina. And with my record, I’m confident that I can earn the trust of voters in our district to put them first.
**Step 2: Talk about real issues**
Chuck Edwards shares the same toxic brand of politics as Madison Cawthorn.
Between refusing to acknowledge January 6th as an insurrection and being anti-choice and anti-LGBTQ+, the last thing Edwards wants is to talk about the real issues.
_Roe v. Wade_ was just overturned and marriage equality could very well be next. In these very dark and difficult times, we need a leader that will take action to protect Western North Carolina families.
I will never stop advocating for our district and our values, and the best way I can do that is as NC-11’s Congresswoman. But Chuck Edwards has support from national Republican dark money groups and Trump’s network of donors, so I need your help to even the odds.
**Step 3: Organize, organize, organize**
I’m an organizer at heart. I believe in the power of person-to-person connection -- it’s how my organization, the Campaign for Southern Equality, defied the skeptics and helped win marriage equality in North Carolina and Mississippi. And years later, it’s how I won election as a County Commissioner even when some people had counted me out.
My team is already organizing in every corner of NC-11. On Saturday, June 18th, we launched our WNC Summer Tour with a team of more than 80 volunteers who were on the doors and phones with us. Now we are building for our July 16 Day of Action, where we’ll be knocking doors in Cherokee, Clay, Transylvania, and Buncombe Counties and calling folks all across the district. The energy here is palpable and it’s our job to build an organizing program that harnesses that to win this race and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
When you’re organizing, you learn one thing fast: “red” and “blue” labels miss what’s actually happening in people’s lives and our communities. At the end of the day, folks want better lives and concrete results from their leaders.
This is exactly how you overturn expectations, by going everywhere, talking with everyone, and organizing like everything is on the line.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $25 or more to help us hit our July fundraising goal, execute our winning strategy, and win this race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47586982/354887439/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220709_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBmOTMwZC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHhr7sNShxarD2uO39iRLuTgUvZn3b9QoQpnklY4RoY=)
| | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47586983/354887440/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220709_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBmOTMwZC04N2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHhr7sNShxarD2uO39iRLuTgUvZn3b9QoQpnklY4RoY=)
---

clean_body: | | = Peter, This will be one of the longest emails I’ll ever send you, so I’d really appreciate it if you took a few minutes to read the whole thing. Supporters like you are the heart of our people-powered campaign. I want to give you an inside look at our organizing strategy and show you exactly how we plan to beat Republican Chuck Edwards and win this district. This is our chance to show everyone watching that we can win this winnable race,= | | | = Step 1: Listen and focus on results Shortly after taking office as County Commissioner, I started a meet and greet coffee hour with another Commissioner. At the first event, the first day, a couple approached us and said "Our daughter overdosed two days ago. What are you going to do to make sure no more parents have to go through this?” I listened to them and we got to work. I helped build a bipartisan coalition and we unanimously passed initiatives to respond to the opioid crisis 7-0. I also heard from working parents who struggled to balance childcare and work. I championed legislation to increase access to early childhood education and provide paid family leave for county employees that passed with 6-1 and 7-0 votes. All politicians know how to talk (and some, like Madison Cawthorn, know how to lie.) But we need a leader who knows how to listen. It’s time to deliver for Western North Carolina. And with my record, I’m confident that I can earn the trust of voters in our district to put them first. Step 2: Talk about real issues Chuck Edwards shares the same toxic brand of politics as Madison Cawthorn. Between refusing to acknowledge January 6th as an insurrection and being anti-choice and anti-LGBTQ+, the last thing Edwards wants is to talk about the real issues. Roe v. Wade was just overturned and marriage equality could very well be next. In these very dark and difficult times, we need a leader that will take action to protect Western North Carolina families. I will never stop advocating for our district and our values, and the best way I can do that is as NC-11’s Congresswoman. But Chuck Edwards has support from national Republican dark money groups and Trump’s network of donors, so I need your help to even the odds. Step 3: Organize, organize, organize I’m an organizer at heart. I believe in the power of person-to-person connection -- it’s how my organization, the Campaign for Southern Equality, defied the skeptics and helped win marriage equality in North Carolina and Mississippi. And years later, it’s how I won election as a County Commissioner even when some people had counted me out. My team is already organizing in every corner of NC-11. On Saturday, June 18th, we launched our WNC Summer Tour with a team of more than 80 volunteers who were on the doors and phones with us. Now we are building for our July 16 Day of Action, where we’ll be knocking doors in Cherokee, Clay, Transylvania, and Buncombe Counties and calling folks all across the district. The energy here is palpable and it’s our job to build an organizing program that harnesses that to win this race and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. When you’re organizing, you learn one thing fast: “red” and “blue” labels miss what’s actually happening in people’s lives and our communities. At the end of the day, folks want better lives and concrete results from their leaders. This is exactly how you overturn expectations, by going everywhere, talking with everyone, and organizing like everything is on the line. = | | = Thanks for reading this far and thanks for being with us every step of the way. – Jasmine Beach-Ferrara | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Republicans tried to silence me and turn off my mic 🎤
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Friend,
Last night during a debate on constitutional amendment to ban abortion in Pennsylvania the Republican majority turned off my mic to try and silence me.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47608134/354959768/-1550121226?s=21&t=yAVKrteRNYkdJsXFqga33g&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzk1NGM2OS1hOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6e_8Sh-cJDwHiFS6KCsiJ2jkPC5oivMzd5S9Ff_wbcc=&emci=85e28763-a5ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=b7954c69-a9ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=18034979)

As I’ve warned for days, the PA Republicans are working overtime to ban abortion in the commonwealth by amending the constitution.

SB106 is an omnibus bill to amend Pennsylvania’s constitution in some radical ways.

It would effectively ban abortion, make it harder to vote, institute mandatory Big Lie election audits from the Republican Auditor General, and allow the legislature to overturn environmental regulations without input from the Governor.

All of these proposals are dangerous.

The Republican Party has controlled the Pennsylvania legislature for the last 30 years. If we don’t beat them so many of our basic freedoms will be gone.

[They can’t shut me up. Will you fight with me by chipping in what you can now to help me flip Pennsylvania for Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47608135/354959769/-180956798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzk1NGM2OS1hOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6e_8Sh-cJDwHiFS6KCsiJ2jkPC5oivMzd5S9Ff_wbcc=)

As I’ve warned for days, the PA Republicans are working overtime to ban abortion in the commonwealth by amending the constitution. SB106 is an omnibus bill to amend Pennsylvania’s constitution in some radical ways. It would effectively ban abortion, make it harder to vote, institute mandatory Big Lie election audits from the Republican Auditor General, and allow the legislature to overturn environmental regulations without input from the Governor. All of these proposals are dangerous. The Republican Party has controlled the Pennsylvania legislature for the last 30 years. If we don’t beat them so many of our basic freedoms will be gone. = = = = Thank you, Malcolm = * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 3254 Philadelphia, PA 19107 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Nobody else is doing it like this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, I’m going to share something with you. When I was younger, I wasn’t very politically engaged. I felt left out of the political process. Politicians weren’t knocking on my door, they weren’t calling my phone. And so I didn’t believe that it was for people like me. That changed when I started people doing the work of building a mass movement. Getting in the community, organizing working-class people, and trying to reach people where they are. So that’s what our guiding vision has been on this campaign since Day 1. Like other campaigns, we’ve been knocking on doors and making calls to the people who always vote (these are called “supervoters.”) But that’s not _all_ we’ve been doing. **We’ve also been reaching people where they’re at.** We’ve been canvassing workers and customers in discount stores, nail salons, and barber shops. Grocery stores, liquor stores, and cigar clubs. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUw_VPBJWejJnN1uZCJGt7Os0U2FnAedyVa0W3kU7-P6PJFS-b8u8nBLM5W_M5Yn8kSuDEx8OtDG6YE6gYFsc-Fm84Ky5YKpouR9ozZrrXYk9uUQMlQxfYIeZD1v_ybJ9epakBB9PBJ9nf0OKAViUYIxntzBM4FJesftYNSe14R-LSLB6DUedwupled5ow2ledZBgEQ91oEjersZcBHT_1lkQimakicxA6NOqRnpoXX8ZqUfsQ20xZAmmRbHHHdFrqmlTbHV6ghfG5eL2GRIRkHTkxMHGeg2xyD8zzsm8CRqeNpmwVWPFP6jpTjW2OcSmM0QIM8vvXPLVhqpJICIT4-y/3nl/khzPC67STviIS_Fqx_hgAg/h0/X_DvLHFH6dONOLQAWdtVVxMu4ciPNn4esIXbxbR_ZH4)
We went to Chesapeake Beach and canvassed voters right on the water. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUw_VPBJWejJnN1uZCJGt7Os0U2FnAedyVa0W3kU7-P6PJFS-b8u8nBLM5W_M5Yn8kSuDEx8OtDG6YE6gYFsc-Fm84Ky5YKpouR9ozZrrXYk9pcjdlvoad3eCu5PS5lNweJunNHUnbb5ndwjQ01jQmiYzvmwqOmxD1p0enZdXg25H5WAq9VyKu9Ov0E-CtehF_feQovy7OaIgk2mGs5q9jGE2gfFPFQnyuw_qzWXHRrE3Hp8j1g48Mua3oY-TpBvykKk_w9okJ2CssAjRCtxIuEyMt9VEY4IZqZgur0Zdaqz6eHFtbV1rjZEp2k1I2ttd4ZPmSP6ctmxI16gT2OS8W9Q/3nl/khzPC67STviIS_Fqx_hgAg/h1/j6l_rAxjzabPcwuTChRK9r__AndItERry5ylr2qDTjY)
I’ve even canvassed outside a jail – yes, a jail – to speak with the loved ones coming to visit the inmates inside. Whenever we canvass in these public places, the response is always the same: people are receptive because they’re not used to being listened to. They’re not used to their representative asking them what issues they care about. Because nobody else is doing it like this. Now, early voting has started – and all of these people we’ve met across the district? **_We need to make sure that they vote_** [**_Chip into our Get-Out-The-Vote Fund to help us do it!_** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wibNoIUvZEm1lbrPl8E8BqNKUZ4Gmumaj5nR8E0JKN67WlThTAJOCFVavwPUI-tctEbhNHFVCWVEbc0Jg9o5p0sLrre8gTT8BpDGGwEpSNpj0XMYULktDE7sLuF5MejVangwUbOj-gmLmGAQ6UFM6jZGyqw0q0XlEyiB3c7-uyDPSc3_ZUX_9HsuW41EHfbrEXQmqhDk9qEjhsIqizgmOYsdE2Ohjccqvse5AGSvDQZuwCnG7ZOmvmw0Z8LtvvUdCftuU-hnDXJPJ1te0E4DrtefQRnb6aKDtu2wdXDvOuAnbYBgSe26Q2jI7F7QUm9drnyjfCG6Ze5XSAVRwLC1mL/3nl/khzPC67STviIS_Fqx_hgAg/h2/oZIc1u7SQCTzolYfXJVHC-RgJbfE3fqfLvjLP_YSBZ0) [**_Or, volunteer with us at an upcoming GOTV event!_** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUw_VPBJWejJnN1uZCJGt7Os0U2FnAedyVa0W3kU7-P6PJFS-b8u8nBLM5W_M5Yn8kSuDEx8OtDG6YE6gYFsc-Fm84Ky5YKpouR9ozZrrXYk9m0nfEVv70NdGP1w6TOiQ0uqyjexz8LSctfl7_PROoAaVYxsUz960JWHiMWDmB1nGxEkBUhPiJpx1zhGVsWKTw9px-fUAVV3Q_3Y7JiFoJzblsmNt-KmfO251Vsaa1DfNf7Ix4LseiUCU-NnJyXrv-J8Qo9lR5_rdhnci7VseEFNwAwwqbBcHbBTCMPl6oggjKxl-6cXoWsEXNxTtd4AbAPWVTN7nmEJIaWrH1a3kLQe/3nl/khzPC67STviIS_Fqx_hgAg/h3/VssgLkBGfhi5ZP31ucB_Q5XbMOxwOcDmoNVzrHQ8kTc) Thank you so much for all your support. name: Team Putorti
subject: Help us buy yard signs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
Distributing yard signs to engaged voters is one of the best ways we can spread the word about our campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47609852/354962062/-563277125?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220709-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWI1MDhmMS1hYWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ZnaO1rXKmo6QNKVHODguCX25M5mOL3anzRTh1dQ7zw=)
---
| Hey there, it’s Team Putorti. It’s no secret election season is heating up with each day, and our team is bustling around the North Country to connect with voters about _**Matt’s vision for a brighter future.**_

While we’re doing everything we can to bring people up to speed on why Matt Putorti is the best candidate to lead Upstate New York forward, we can’t do it all alone.

body:
The DFL has no answers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mattbirk.com/extreme-jensen?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

The far-left DFL are running out of answers. They have nothing to run on, so they instead attack and tear down. The line of attack that makes me chuckle is how "dangerous" and "extreme" Dr. Scott Jensen is. The polling for Democrats in Minnesota must not be looking too good. I'm proud to be running with Dr. Jensen, but please [click the video](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e35b97e46b&e=33b11688c1) thumbnail below **and see JUST how "extreme" he is:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=bf9f0274be&e=33b11688c1 "Scott Jensen... "The Extremist"")
---
| I hope your weekend is off to a great start! [Please join us on Monday](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7e2604a17f&e=33b11688c1) for an event in St. Paul with Enes (Kanter) Freedom - a freedom fighter and NBA star!

And don't worry, no amount of name calling and false accusations is going to stop our message to Minnesotans: lower gas prices, lower taxes, safe streets and excellent schools. if you think Dr. Jensen is __just__ "extreme" enough to beat Tim Walz, please [consider a small donation of $5, $10, or $15](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ad0d32205e&e=33b11688c1). We need you!

In Freedom,

Matt Birk
Republican Candidate for Lt. Governor
Dr. Scott Jensen's Running Mate

name: Hollis King
subject: Doug Gansler fought for me
body:
Years ago, I was the victim of a horrendous crime where I was assaulted by a stranger in my own home. In the aftermath of my attack, I wanted justice and for a long time I thought I might not get it. That is, until Doug Gansler came along. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzujG2ZtOlF7e3Fnti3jP03M20qLtInkB30Ts9DSCVtApsHqXc22Zqs-oJ_yC3CNVZ_ajgsGW94WLPDffaMJbDlmQ5UelWZZZ640e72bIRwKimYPQJDg7N-vMHVyucOgCCPSPLOhT50w2K7j1LdUhKHGVpmyn9xXi4JuzhWJRb5838ZqWbnIM-qsHHNQgRdoVRGjoJivAcqVketZvpAXDbz5FoibvMm5KTw3X6Euh0uawvy37weYnUapDEvhTO3-_6IvOS-hLxs-w5n4rrLRG2iysa9foqGiz-LWmK4vSMcGAdoRfeniQISPGVjJpzfcIMzw/3nl/saZEIfWIRqahTQ3iGvkGBA/h0/NvqjbTcKvv_BJdPBlrSvVnGtfaulmm6v2lEk-zqHCOY)

Hi there, Years ago, I was the victim of a horrendous crime where I was assaulted by a stranger in my own home. In the aftermath of my attack, I wanted justice and for a long time I thought I might not get it. **That is, until Doug Gansler came along.** Doug and the police officer who took up my case after so many years will forever be my knights. Not only did Doug find my attacker and put him behind bars, but his work as Attorney General helped many others like me and made Maryland safer. I’m so thankful for Doug’s commitment to justice and dedication to my case. I know firsthand that he is the best choice for Governor because he is the only candidate who has what it takes to make Maryland safe. **Doug will fight for all of us just as hard as he fought for me all those years ago.** I am supporting Doug’s campaign for Governor _and I hope you’ll join me._ **[I f you’re able, please consider making a donation today so that Doug has the resources to win this race and bring safety and justice to the people of Maryland.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzujG2ZtOlF7e3Fnti3jP03M3fkkfygBeMWtsnWvPpchrEMd2TyjHXC35JXcnkCO2JnALQCczmiLjaZxAt1kSHKaCCkBSGxihpTMPLd3JWY_Vl33gVgZbo7j1OCZjDpZTo1WeJIoz9kaOAjWwrRINfmKSSwYgMIyjnJNI_LlYlWU_QXm44IX8zx4gOWJkKYA4TAS1id2usRh6J7NAMWv3qAyiNJhI64LNuw-ty9E2JmAnNHDKaGqyMzJ_g30W4ZS1dgAHpmssUc6v4x9cSHNnV4qIhFFTeIurnLOj3s90pxupUZxS_lQQFY9k7Li6qHEALmw/3nl/saZEIfWIRqahTQ3iGvkGBA/h1/0UqlWGipjHWrmA2hPTfi_ju93LQG1TYiQ_zuuJrsOfw)** Sincerely, Hollis King

If we can get Nikki’s people-powered message out to every corner of this district, we can overcome GOP attacks and elect a true champion for Illinois working families! Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country. Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: want to make sure you saw my ad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi Now that the ballot is set, and we know who my opponent is - it’s time to focus on November.

I know that my opponent, Frank Pallota, could not be worse for this district.

Frank Pallotta’s career has shown that he has no problem aligning himself with far-right extremists. His mission is to polarize New Jersey – and I refuse to let us go in that direction.

But you don’t have to take it from me, my opponent will tell you about his friends, the Oathkeepers, a domestic terrorist group that was intimately involved in the attack on the Capitol on January 6th of last year – in our new ad.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vid-0722-josh/jg-fr-eoq2206?amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vid-0722-josh/jg-fr-eoq2206?amount=20]
In a time when as a country, we are more divided than ever – it has simply never been more important to have bipartisan leadership. We need leadership that reaches across the aisle to discover where we find common ground, leadership that seeks to work together.

I’m not finished fighting for the people of NJ-05, and I am committed to continuing the bipartisan progress we have made thus far in Congress.

Will you watch our latest ad and then chip in $20 to ensure that my seat is safe from extremists? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vid-0722-josh/jg-fr-eoq2206?amount=20]

- Josh

Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: | | | Peter, Did you know Kyrsten Sinema has gone years at a time as a U.S. Senator without hosting ANY town halls for constituents ? Since taking office in 2018, she’s made time for fundraisers in Paris, vacation in Ecuador, and winemaking in Sonoma. (Yes, really.) But listening to voters? Returning their phone calls? Let alone explaining why she’s chosen the filibuster over protecting abortion rights, even though a majority of Arizonans support filibuster reform?It’s not even on her radar. Sinema’s approval rating in Arizona is at rock bottom because she continues to help Republicans strip us of abortion rights, voting rights, and meaningful gun legislation by supporting the filibuster. And she won’t even explain herself. We’re not going to let it slide. More soon, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4c9imtkt6qtuehntqfcfo51q5f89a8hl61fh7e8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn6t36eqr68thgslqmbdr4euqj2pjlear71ob6ctjb2t76e5h76crjm5hn4p776v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbdhnmtjmcdj4mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljmco77c3i62oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbs40gd7hdhbl27srloc558bv5out2re9a1k1f10_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbqjpi4p2nf527mvr2k0ts550sq91h24jfeuett0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3d5d225rlf2g013bq0ebsjflejskfdjb4149re8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Input Needed
subject: Was Trump the worst?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We’re waiting on your answer
| | |
---
**BREAKING via CBS News: Trump "considering announcing 2024 presidential bid"**

_We need to stand up to Trump BEFORE he announces another run, so tell us before MIDNIGHT:_

**Was Trump our worst president EVER?****
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8511?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-InputNeeded-WorstPresidentEverRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-InputNeeded-WorstPresidentEverRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5166%2E9716520%2EL58Pvt)
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8511?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-InputNeeded-WorstPresidentEverRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-InputNeeded-WorstPresidentEverRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5166%2E9716520%2EL58Pvt)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8511?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-InputNeeded-WorstPresidentEverRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-InputNeeded-WorstPresidentEverRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5166%2E9716520%2EL58Pvt)
---

FIRST, Donald Trump ran for president on a platform of vicious racism and baseless lies.

THEN, Trump spent his presidency lying to the American people, abandoning our allies abroad, and getting impeached TWICE for attacking our democracy.

NOW, Trump's election-denier cronies are trying to take over the Senate, and **his ultra-MAGA Supreme Court justices just OVERTURNED _Roe v. Wade_!**

But _**none**_ of that is stopping Trump from attempting a comeback, team. He wants power again, and we MUST stand up to him -- **so please answer our URGENT Live Poll before midnight:
**

clean_body: We’re waiting on your answer | | | BREAKING via CBS News: Trump "considering announcing 2024 presidential bid" We need to stand up to Trump BEFORE he announces another run, so tell us before MIDNIGHT: Was Trump our worst president EVER? | | | | FIRST, Donald Trump ran for president on a platform of vicious racism and baseless lies. THEN, Trump spent his presidency lying to the American people, abandoning our allies abroad, and getting impeached TWICE for attacking our democracy. NOW, Trump's election-denier cronies are trying to take over the Senate, and his ultra-MAGA Supreme Court justices just OVERTURNED Roe v. Wade! But none of that is stopping Trump from attempting a comeback, team. He wants power again, and we MUST stand up to him -- so please answer our URGENT Live Poll before midnight: Was Trump our worst president EVER? | | | Thank you for your input, Team DSCC by Gage Skidmore. . name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuk7v5flcctcd2lkpijfit4etthdfhi1v3sss5s8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1imdj3ctj4spij2sr4e1ob2db2m5g64olkshgnatble1gj2db56up70tpncuoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3ephgesqjadtnc5j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjp65anhro8unjmloto2nc3ial744a48prrv37i0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfjtur16j2mlgd247qor95gdfg2jaiecplj8rk3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74cdh2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdcuop19jre8k8esqiq6q89da2j89lga86fqboao_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74cdh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9bnm5jcskt1v0tucg8og4emiu6385fuegmnq7og_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpgeeo74cdh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If state legislatures get the power to overturn the popular vote, don’t be left wishing you’d done more to elect good people to them.
body:
Small dollars make a big impact in state legislative elections
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter Imagine winning the presidency. But losing. What do I mean? Imagine it's 2024, we all turn out, vote Democratic and win a huge electoral majority. Then state legislatures around the country convene and decide they disagree, overrule the voters and send their electoral slates for Donald Trump, Michael Flynn or Marjorie Taylor Greene to Washington. This is not fiction. I wish it were. The same Supreme Court that forced a 10-year old little girl to leave Ohio so she wouldn't have to carry a rapist's child has agreed to take a case, Moore v Harper, that could end with their declaring state legislative supremacy. A ridiculous and radical notion, authoritarian to its core, this would mean the will of gerrymandered Republican state legislatures can decide which electoral votes count, no matter for whom their constituents voted. It is pure insanity. And it absolutely could happen. [**Can you please join me, Stacey Abrams, Michelle Obama and other concerned Democrats in doing all we can to "keep it," by supporting the DLCC right now with a donation of $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29958b7f-f2ba-4059-88ed-33280d66f8fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is why even though it's not as sexy nor as covered on cable news, WE MUST win control of as many state legislatures as possible. It means supporting the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC), tasked with helping win state legislative seats across the country. **Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama just launched a huge campaign to raise funds for the DLCC, and we'd like to do our part to pitch in to winning these crucial races, which could determine if Republicans or Democrats control t****he state senate in Michigan, ****Minnesota, Colorado, Oregon and Nevada, ****the state house in Alaska and both the state house and state senate in Maine.**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC LEGISLATIVE CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd3fb1e8-14ce-4c3d-a03e-e7407992c5d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I can't stress how important it is that we take these chambers--all within a few seats of going either way. It not only builds a bench of talent (President Obama got his start as a state senator) and decides important policies in the states, **but can be a bulwark against Republican attempts to corrupt the 2024 election, declaring themselves victors when they lose the popular and electoral vote.** As Benjamin Franklin walked out of Philadelphia's Constitution Hall in 1787, an onlooker asked him whether we'd be "a republic or a monarchy." Franklin's rejoinder has echoed across time: "A republic. If you can keep it." [**Can you please join me, Stacey Abrams, Michelle Obama and other concerned Democrats in doing all we can to "keep it," by supporting the DLCC right now with a donation of $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T035bec35-a427-4db8-927c-4fe0e1e58227/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your tireless devotion to democracy. Cliff

---

name: Team Patty
subject: Here’s what you can do right now, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We’ve got to fight back.
#
Peter,
Patty is leading the fight every day in the other Washington to protect a woman’s ability to make her own health care decisions. According to _The Spokesman-Review_ , Patty has long “made access to abortion a top legislative priority,” but now, she’s turning up the heat.
**[We need 52 Democratic Senators to get Patty’s abortion rights bill to President Biden’s desk. Can we count on your support now to help us elect more pro-choice Senators?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47611117/354964327/-72461258?refcode=pm_em_220709_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2E5Yzc0My1iMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyetDVRvu_STZRxm7jZFoG3AZ3RvCn3DUPC2mMbaw4Y=)**
Patty is a key leader in the Senate and when it counts most, we know she’ll leave no stone unturned in the fight to protect the right to abortion and make sure everyone — no matter where they live or how much money they have — can get the essential reproductive health care they need.
With the threat of a national abortion ban if Mitch McConnell’s GOP retakes the Senate, we need to do everything we can to send Patty back to the Senate so she can continue this important work.

Folks—the race for Ohio’s open Senate seat couldn’t be closer,
with recent polling showing Tim with the smallest lead imaginable.

Senate control is hanging in the balance, and it’s time to double down in
Ohio.

If we can get Tim’s face and message in front of folks in every corner of
the Buckeye State, we can open up a larger lead en route to a huge victory
in November.

We need to run new TV ads to help spread Tim’s message far and wide, but
Ohio has several expensive media markets, meaning it won’t be cheap.

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47611156/354964968/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJhN2FmNy1iMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFgkD8n0BMBlJJNrnwZyPQX8bZBsQaLVezJ2Vqj1RdY=&emci=4e0e39ce-a2ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bdba7af7-b0ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first trackers of the campaign have begun showing up to all my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some pro-democracy Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $150,000 before our midnight deadline if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $18,709 short.**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before our critical midnight deadline to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47611158/354964970/-42398318?refcode=em20220709mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJhN2FmNy1iMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFgkD8n0BMBlJJNrnwZyPQX8bZBsQaLVezJ2Vqj1RdY=)
