clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office. “Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News. Well, the first trackers of the campaign have begun showing up to all my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.” Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some pro-democracy Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority. And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley! I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $150,000 before our midnight deadline if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $18,709 short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m running for Senate because I care about the people of Iowa. I want to help Iowans achieve their potential and make our state a leader again in manufacturing, education, and clean energy. And I believe I’ve got the experience to get the job done. But the only way I can get that message out and correct the lies they’re going to tell about me is with your donation now to my campaign. Thank you for being a part of the team, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Friends,

We cannot let America become a nation of conspiracy theories.

As Americans, **we must pay attention**. People must understand how easily our democratic system can unravel if we don’t defend it.

We have too many people now, especially within the Republican Party, who are not taking their responsibilities seriously and who have pledged their allegiance and loyalty to Donald Trump. Embracing a personality cult is contrary to everything conservatives believe. And yet, that is what so many people in the party are doing today. **_Not Liz Cheney_**.

The majority of Republicans across the country don’t want to see our Republic unravel. They understand how important it is to defend and protect the Constitution.

This moment is a test for the Republican Party. Our democratic system must have firm, unwavering, and truth-seeking representatives like Liz Cheney in Congress. If you agree, please rush your support to Liz Cheney's re-election campaign **[[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=2a1317dd8c8b4441b0d58320cca06838&_e=D6LiPRfRYMEHGlCdVjmzdishaBsXP6d1jb1OlWE_KBAGeupzxfrpRlT0qp8EcXFk4BjCv44PcuXVIoL1NmVXkoKNrEMFBPCUH2vgK8kmV0zotJw7VXEmhbg24wJiK8bmqERk2y0w3An76xl3PDzz69PayQiYaO_ysLJJq015NaCWGm69Is35xAC4EBXGEJb7oYqliRsq_0fiKDDnah-f_kK2YD0EDwMgsX8X3_h-xRisnYAdM6R3RwUfoGTfJ00SwF9pXXY3SahlEvPciklKdtOqchuiBhK_Ir1Y09HyNk92Hdbb4p7HF-QLuZEsT2Yr4GlkWQUOVlnhOgMvb5dXUUiyFkmAxfLNs3gEVp_Xkd31fbkFhGrrS83waTKHrZOvcsHwZw3fgA2XAVJ7GGVIDfQn4-nIc22y4P3Sv6VmQgMYHrpH-zTBlDtM2XGKk5kGAqxuAC43-oHMMeV6nCeo60dLdhhsSP_2qmKue9xH2luEOqT0sJN5fJdmaq1kqBPRr5pEedcrM7tWPYs60G8tzB2gRlCqr5Ztjh44LPzi5rqIW9553eNLRdRcP-UfxUDVnKNUBMBcEwrvVZp5TLrdJg%3D%3D)]**.

Thank you for your time and consideration,
Team Cheney
| Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming

Everything is on the line in November.

**_Roe v. Wade_ has fallen.** Women across the country and right here in Wisconsin are struggling to access the reproductive care they deserve.

Meanwhile, the GOP is preparing to steal the 2024 presidential election after failing in 2020 - and the Supreme Court is set to hear a case that could allow GOP-controlled state legislatures to throw their state’s electors to the Republican candidate regardless of the popular vote.

**Our democracy is hanging on by a thread.**

Defending our rights and our democracy depends on holding the House majority, Peter. Wisconsin’s 3rd district is one of the closest races in the country and could determine control of Congress. **We WON’T hold the House if we give up this seat.**

Republicans’ choice for this district, Derrick Van Orden, is a far-right radical who attended the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. He would support a national abortion ban and (obviously) allow the GOP to get away with ANYTHING to keep their candidates in power. He’s persecuted women and the LGBTQ community and harassed school boards.

**Democrats must send our best candidate into the general election to take on the GOP’s insurrectionist, extremist nominee.** Deb McGrath has served our country with a life-long obligation to democracy. She’ll stand up for reproductive rights and the rule of law. She’s the only candidate who can beat Van Orden in November.

clean_body: Everything is on the line. | = Peter, we’re just one month away from our primary election, and it’s NEVER been more important to elect the right candidate to take on the GOP in November. = Everything is on the line in November. Roe v. Wade has fallen. Women across the country and right here in Wisconsin are struggling to access the reproductive care they deserve. Meanwhile, the GOP is preparing to steal the 2024 presidential election after failing in 2020 - and the Supreme Court is set to hear a case that could allow GOP-controlled state legislatures to throw their state’s electors to the Republican candidate regardless of the popular vote. Our democracy is hanging on by a thread. Defending our rights and our democracy depends on holding the House majority, Peter. Wisconsin’s 3rd district is one of the closest races in the country and could determine control of Congress. We WON’T hold the House if we give up this seat. Republicans’ choice for this district, Derrick Van Orden, is a far-right radical who attended the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. He would support a national abortion ban and (obviously) allow the GOP to get away with ANYTHING to keep their candidates in power. He’s persecuted women and the LGBTQ community and harassed school boards. Democrats must send our best candidate into the general election to take on the GOP’s insurrectionist, extremist nominee. Deb McGrath has served our country with a life-long obligation to democracy. She’ll stand up for reproductive rights and the rule of law. She’s the only candidate who can beat Van Orden in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Let’s do this! clean_body: To quote President Obama, “The fight for fair maps is part of the fight to protect our democracy.” | A short history of how we got to this point, friend: | = That brings us to today. Not only are Republicans such as Governor Ron DeSantis clinging to their rigged maps, but they are continuing to spread Trump's Big Lie, suppressing the vote, and even waging attacks on election officials and processes! So our strategy is shifting in response. To quote President Obama, “The fight for fair maps is part of the fight to protect our democracy.” That's why we're now fighting both the threat of Republican gerrymandering and the anti-democracy forces trying to take hold in the states. And when we say this election could be our last chance to win,we're not exaggerating. We need you with us. If you're able, will you rush a donation today to support our democracy-saving work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Friends, one year ago this month, Congressman Tom McClintock voted _against_ federal funding to hire permanent firefighters and invest in forest fire prevention. _So Dr. Kermit announced against him._ McClintock was scared to lose, so he ran off to a redder district, and now we have a real chance to flip this district blue and elect a conservation champion. name: Jim DeMint
subject: Conservative Studios
body:
It was obvious it was true all along. Just like the Wuhan Lab Leak. And the safety of keeping schools open during Covid. That schools are teaching Critical Race Theory and trans extremism.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ksC6K1rwhoXcKfu4DB3hsQ/9KmUSQZeiYD763d9KqLrY16A) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Conservative Partnership Institute.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ksC6K1rwhoXcKfu4DB3hsQ/9KmUSQZeiYD763d9KqLrY16A)**.
---

---
| |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Like me, you probably weren't surprised when we learned the Hunter Biden laptop story was 100% true. Of course, it was true. It was obvious it was true all along.
Just like the Wuhan Lab Leak. And the safety of keeping schools open during Covid. That schools are teaching Critical Race Theory and trans extremism. That there were irregularities in the 2020 election. That inflation is the fault of big-spending politicians. And that liberals called for defunding the police.
The Left - in the White House, in Congress, in the media - lied about all those things. Conservatives may be outraged about this, but we're not surprised anymore.
There was never any question that they were lying. The question is: _**What is the Left still lying about today?**_
Climate change? A new Iran nuclear deal? China? Big Tech? January 6th? The correct answer is: All of the Above.
**That 's why the Conservative Partnership Institute launched CPI Studios - and why we are expanding them this year.**
**[Help conservatives defeat the Left 's lies!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ksC6K1rwhoXcKfu4DB3hsQ/9KmUSQZeiYD763d9KqLrY16A)**
CPI Studios is a state-of-the-art broadcasting hub located at CPI headquarters. And since we opened our doors, it has become the place for conservative members of Congress, senators, and grassroots leaders to get their message out, bypassing the Swamp's media filters.
The most influential conservatives in Washington use CPI Studios every week. It's home to 15 conservative podcasts, eight constituent video projects, and the go-to spot for interviews on radio and television. We finished 2021 with more than 1,500 total bookings. And we expect more than 2,000 in 2022.
---
---
Rep. Jim Jordan (Ohio)
---
---
Rep. Lauren Boebert (CO)
---
Conservatives never had anything like this before. And with a new generation of principled patriots poised to come to Washington next year, _**we have to grow**_. Their voices must be heard, and as you know, the mainstream media and Big Tech will try to silence them.
**The only way to get true conservative messages out of Washington is through CPI Studios. And the only way to grow CPI Studios is with your help. **
**[Support the Conservative Partnership and CPI Studios!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ksC6K1rwhoXcKfu4DB3hsQ/9KmUSQZeiYD763d9KqLrY16A)**
CPI Studios has to grow to prepare for the bigger debates coming in next year and beyond. If we want to fight for election integrity, border security, and school choice, we need a communications machine unlike anything Washington has ever seen.
With your help, that's what we're building. With your help, those are the fights we're going to win. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
**CPI Studios** _Helping Conservatives Spread the Truth_
---
---
Rep. Byron Donalds (FL)
---
---
Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (GA)
---
|
---
---

300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Their voices must be heard, and as you know, the mainstream media and Big Tech will try to silence them. The only way to get true conservative messages out of Washington is through CPI Studios. And the only way to grow CPI Studios is with your help. CPI Studios has to grow to prepare for the bigger debates coming in next year and beyond. If we want to fight for election integrity, border security, and school choice, we need a communications machine unlike anything Washington has ever seen. With your help, that's what we're building. With your help, those are the fights we're going to win. For Freedom, Jim DeMint CPI Chairman | CPI Studios Helping Conservatives Spread the Truth Rep. Byron Donalds (FL) Rep. name: Giffords
subject: Sign Giffords’ urgent petition to the Senate: tell them to vote to confirm Steve Dettelbach as the next Director of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Senate could vote on Joe Biden’s nominee, Steve Dettelbach, as soon as the next few days.
#

Friends -
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) is the only federal agency charged with enforcing our nation’s gun laws and regulating the gun industry.
But for far too long, the agency has operated in lockstep with the industry it is tasked with regulating.
The truth is, we haven’t had a Senate-confirmed ATF Director since 2015. As the gun violence epidemic in this country gets worse and worse, it’s never been more important to have a director who will prioritize public safety ahead of the profits of the gun industry.
Steve Dettelbach is Joe Biden’s nominee to serve in the post and he could get a vote in the next few days. And when we speak with Senators, they tell us how important it is to hear from their constituents. So it’s important to let them know you expect to see him confirmed.
The gun lobby defeated the president’s last nominee through lies and disinformation. We can’t let that happen again.
So please:
[**Sign Giffords’ petition calling on the U.S. Senate to vote and confirm Steve Dettelbach to serve as the next Director of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_dettelbachpetition_july22/?source=em220709-1-15&refcode2=2216.3935704.kEaNO1&t=1&akid=2216%2E3935704%2EkEaNO1)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_dettelbachpetition_july22/?source=em220709-1-15&refcode2=2216.3935704.kEaNO1&t=2&akid=2216%2E3935704%2EkEaNO1)**
Thank you very much. We really want to let members of Congress know there is widespread support for this critical appointment.
The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_dettelbachpetition_july22/?source=em220709-1-15&refcode2=2216.3935704.kEaNO1&t=3&akid=2216%2E3935704%2EkEaNO1)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2216%2E3935704%2EkEaNO1) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: How we're funding this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Alessandra is proud of the way we're funding this campaign. We hope you are too.
#

Friends — we wanted to share an honest email about how we're funding this campaign.
When Alessandra made the big decision to run for Congress, she knew she was never going to rely on the support of corporate PACs or special interests.
**The only way we win this race is together — and that means funding it together, too.** No corporate PACs, just lots and lots of people chipping in what they can, when they can.
Look, May and June were incredible months for us. We re-launched this campaign to take on the political establishment, and saw the energy of the progressive movement across New York and the entire country rally behind us.
But we need July to be our biggest month yet — and with just 6 weeks to go until Election Day, we have some important fundraising goals to hit if we're going to successfully mobilize our movement across NY-17.
If you could make a $3 donation today, we'll put it right to work funding the voter outreach, advertising, and staffing necessary to win this primary and send Alessandra to Congress. What do you say?
[**Can you donate $3 to Alessandra Biaggi and our people-powered campaign for Congress today? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important to our success.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905_59515_iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905.59515.iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905.59515.iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905.59515.iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905.59515.iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905.59515.iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)**

| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220709-1-t2&refcode2=905.59515.iWujWg&akid=905%2E59515%2EiWujWg)**

Alessandra is proud of the way we're funding this campaign. We hope you are too.
Thanks for chipping in today if you can.
\- Team Biaggi

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Segregation in the Military?! Read my latest op-ed.
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKaJUD3UUi2rIgIZk5ORt1C9_rRccr0KiOIJyO_13Ezlk53T8vwGzBbz_QyEs3Yd9fHFN-8YlZOkzIq-7W0waiRpvUx1zjsMOOjxXmITGpQZN4jXH3EyWAfg_vuJX15s85i2cto0d9JVtqP3e3TD6JHZQDCYyU3mo3vEWVu_ilyuz0LYHvi79rq97Mehpb0mJHCWeB9iMTU=&c=2l-HIRvwxSC7ZbVNRX28-VBrr1a8rm2lxZOMetdCHe-abuphvV5ifw==&ch=8Ov5xX2vjCNop9cZ09ms7EezhpsW2GktWmnetw6ukM_SvIPfE6946Q==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Right before our eyes, Democrats have become the very thing they claim to abhor - segregationists...
I'll explain: recently, places like my home state of Florida have passed laws that protect LIFE, that give PARENTS control over education, and that END attempts to indoctrinate our youth with Woke trans nonsense and far-left gender ideology.
The Woketopians' response?
Those in Joe Biden's DOD - including the failed, Woke General Lloyd Austin \- are actually considering moving military personnel from states if its laws don't conform with their ideology.
That means taking away the money and jobs that go along with this, too... They're seriously trying to punish and segregate us for our political views!
---
| | | [URGENT: HELP ME FIGHT FOR OUR MILITARY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKaJUD3UUi2rIgIZk5ORt1C9_rRccr0KiOIJyO_13Ezlk53T8vwGzBbz_QyEs3Yd9fHFN-8YlZOkzIq-7W0waiRpvUx1zjsMOOjxXmITGpQZN4jXH3EyWAfg_vuJX15s85i2cto0d9JVtqP3e3TD6JHZQDCYyU3mo3vEWVu_ilyuz0LYHvi79rq97Mehpb0mJHCWeB9iMTU=&c=2l-HIRvwxSC7ZbVNRX28-VBrr1a8rm2lxZOMetdCHe-abuphvV5ifw==&ch=8Ov5xX2vjCNop9cZ09ms7EezhpsW2GktWmnetw6ukM_SvIPfE6946Q==)

| Peter, my district in Congress has the largest concentration of military in the United States of America...
...I am not going to sit back and let them suffer while the Swamp turns the military into a POLITICAL WEAPON.
I penned this op-ed to help sound the alarm - [but we still need funding to spread this message further.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKaJUD3UUi2rIgIZk5ORt1C9_rRccr0KiOIJyO_13Ezlk53T8vwGzBbz_QyEs3Yd9fHFN-8YlZOkzIq-7W0waiRpvUx1zjsMOOjxXmITGpQZN4jXH3EyWAfg_vuJX15s85i2cto0d9JVtqP3e3TD6JHZQDCYyU3mo3vEWVu_ilyuz0LYHvi79rq97Mehpb0mJHCWeB9iMTU=&c=2l-HIRvwxSC7ZbVNRX28-VBrr1a8rm2lxZOMetdCHe-abuphvV5ifw==&ch=8Ov5xX2vjCNop9cZ09ms7EezhpsW2GktWmnetw6ukM_SvIPfE6946Q==)
Otherwise, they will succeed in segregating our troops along ideological lines, consolidating power and money into Blue states, and tearing our nation asunder in the process!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, | Right before our eyes, Democrats have become the very thing they claim to abhor - segregationists... I'll explain: recently, places like my home state of Florida have passed laws that protect LIFE, that give PARENTS control over education, and that END attempts to indoctrinate our youth with Woke trans nonsense and far-left gender ideology. The Woketopians' response? Those in Joe Biden's DOD - including the failed, Woke General Lloyd Austin \- are actually considering moving military personnel from states if its laws don't conform with their ideology. That means taking away the money and jobs that go along with this, too... They're seriously trying to punish and segregate us for our political views! | | | == | Read more about this in my latest op-ed below, and == | | | | == | == | | | | Peter, my district in Congress has the largest concentration of military in the United States of America... ...I am not going to sit back and let them suffer while the Swamp turns the military into a POLITICAL WEAPON. I penned this op-ed to help sound the alarm - == Otherwise, they will succeed in segregating our troops along ideological lines, consolidating power and money into Blue states, and tearing our nation asunder in the process! | | | == | | | == | Thanks for helping me fight back, | == | Matt Gaetz | | | | | == == | | | == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: This is a long but important email about our path to victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, in a
moment, I am going to lay out everything we have to do to defeat an
incumbent governor, elect Stacey Abrams and get to work for the people of
Georgia.

But first, I want to share some incredible news: our campaign announced
that we raised more than $28 million dollars and filed with $18.5 million
cash on hand combined between Abrams for Governor and the One Georgia
Leadership Committee for the fundraising period through June 30, 2022.

Derek, we
outraised an incumbent governor, which is no easy feat. To unseat an
extreme incumbent who has championed a dangerous and unpopular far-right
agenda, we know that we have to out-raise and out-work his built in
advantages of free media and doling out funds secured by federal Democrats
that he opposed.

I’m particularly proud of these numbers: since our campaign’s launch in
December 2021, more than 240,000 grassroots donors have made contributions
of $100 or less, with the majority giving $25 or less, to ensure that
Georgians have leadership that is committed to giving our families and
communities the opportunity to thrive.

But there is so much more work to be done to elect Stacey Abrams. We have
to continue this momentum so we reach millions of voters across the state.
And with these fundraising numbers, you can be sure that Brian Kemp,
national Republicans and outside groups are going to ramp up their
fundraising efforts and attacks against Stacey.

That’s why I want to lay out our strategy to win between now and November,
[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220709_B1_Numbers_S1_T1_LGW_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]and why I hope you’ll make your
first donation to
power our campaign after you read it. With so much on the line, we can’t
afford to lose momentum now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220709_B1_Numbers_S1_T1_LGW_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]DONATE

Derek, as we
look ahead to November, our campaign will continue to aggressively
fundraise and spend resources with a clear intentionality and demonstrated
return on investment. Because of Georgia’s closely-divided electorate,
victory depends on deep, continuous and thoughtful engagement with the
most diverse electorate in the state’s history. Our proven strategy in
2018, which was validated in 2020 and 2021, relies on an intense
combination of traditional outreach, innovative communication tools, voter
turnout operations and voter protection models that anticipate barriers to
participation.

Fully financing this strategy is vital to reach the levels of engagement
and turnout required for victory. Our approach ensures that we can reach
voters where they are: (1) reaching across demographics and geography, (2)
providing critical education about changes to their voting experiences,
and (3) effectively sharing Stacey’s vision for One Georgia and lifting up
the entire Democratic ticket.

Here are some key takeaways regarding our fundraising and investment
strategy:

Incumbency is its own financial advantage.
As the incumbent in this race, Brian Kemp has access and opportunity not
afforded to Stacey. As governor, he receives statewide earned media for
every announcement he makes, even if the announcement is the result of
something he once opposed. Despite calling the American Rescue Plan “a
slap in the face to hardworking Georgians” and urging Georgia’s majority
GOP Congressional delegation and U.S. Senators to oppose it, Kemp has
wasted no time taking credit for the federal funds it provided.

Moreover, the hypocrisy is rarely included in announcements about the
distributions. Instead, he often receives uncritical mentions that allow
him free advertising without meaningful contrast. The funds, secured by
U.S. Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, boosted state revenues and
the state budget by billions of dollars, which helped deliver $1.1 billion
for tax refunds, $422 million for water and sewer projects, $408 million
for rural broadband expansion and more. A new influx of surplus funding
will likely yield similar coverage, giving him visibility without context.

The net result is that we must spend advertising dollars to properly
characterize his actions and to generate equal coverage.

We cannot underestimate Brian Kemp’s fundraising capacity.
During the last reporting period, we were behind Kemp overall, with
approximately $6 million on hand compared to Kemp’s $10.7 million.
Although our current fundraising is ahead of Kemp’s, we do not have access
to several avenues afforded to him as a Republican incumbent.

Recent reports detail how he is already expanding his fundraising
apparatus in response to our network. The appropriate analog is Governor
Ron DeSantis, who has amassed a war chest of $124 million, including 42
billionaire donors. With a competitive race and the new normal of
unlimited contributions, we must assume Kemp can secure financing from a
number of those donors. In addition, he has several motivated and well
funded allies who spent over $6 million in advertising alone to support
Kemp in his primary fight against Perdue. These outside groups will likely
get into the general election fight as well on his behalf. In short, our
campaign must continue to fundraise aggressively to remain competitive.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220709_B1_Numbers_S1_T1_LGW_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]DONATE

Our campaign has made substantial investments in order to define our
candidate and anchor our campaign.
During the primary period, although we did not have an opponent, the Kemp
campaign and allied GOP entities outspent our operation on television, the
primary medium for communications. They purchased $12.1M in statewide
television, which included innumerable mentions of Stacey. This created a
two-track negative approach for Kemp, where he could marshal resources for
primary and general messaging due to the underwhelming competition between
him and Perdue. In this phase, we were outspent on the air by $5 million,
but instead focused our efforts on running a cost-effective media effort
that allowed us to push back on false Republican narratives and
reintroduce Stacey’s biography and accomplishments.

Kemp continues to selectively edit statements in order to misrepresent
Stacey’s positions on issues, and our obligation is to forcefully combat
his lies and counter with factual information. This typically requires
double the effort of the original smear, increasing our costs. For the
summer, we have built a large-scale effort to flip the script from the
primary period, running persuasive, culturally competent and relevant paid
media across all types of communication channels. In addition, we have
continued to ramp up our earned efforts and Stacey’s vigorous statewide
travel, all of which combine to sharply highlight Kemp and his top
vulnerabilities.

In addition, we are laser-focused on reaching a diverse coalition of
voters, articulating a positive vision for One Georgia, and presenting
Stacey’s credentials and capacity to lead. Again, while Brian Kemp can
rely on the advantage of incumbency to garner media attention, our
campaign has to spend money to get our message out. We have made an early,
deliberate and productive effort to ensure that our message is heard
across various mediums statewide, in multiple languages and in response to
regional or demographic concerns.

We must invest in educating voters about critical changes to their voting
experience brought on by the passage of Kemp’s 2021 voter suppression law,
Senate Bill 202.
Voters across Georgia will have to adjust to new, onerous requirements for
requesting and submitting vote-by-mail applications. The false narrative
that SB 202 had no effect due to high primary turnout will likely lull
voters and the media into misunderstanding how voting has changed. Most
voters are unaware of the new barriers to absentee ballots, polling
location changes, the elimination of Sunday voting in some areas, among
other impediments.

Worse, thousands of voters may not have the information they need to fully
participate in a close election. It is clear Kemp is counting on voter
confusion and suppression to aid him in winning this election. He even
bragged that he was “as frustrated as anyone else with the [election]
results, especially at the federal level. And we did something about it
with Senate Bill 202.” We aim to counter by building an operation that
educates voters about these changes, gets them behind our plans for
Georgia’s future and ensures they show up to fire Brian Kemp and elect
Stacey Abrams as Georgia’s next governor.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220709_B1_Numbers_S1_T1_LGW_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]DONATE

Our objective is truth-telling against the GOP echo chamber.
As a favorite of FOX News and other right-wing outlets, and due to his
refusal to decertify the 2020 election, Kemp benefits from the mutual yet
contradictory frame of being both anti-Trump and a hard-right
conservative.

In practical terms, this means our campaign must do the work of showing
Georgians who he truly is in terms of proven policy and continued rhetoric
— the real Kemp and his record are dangerous and very extreme hard right.
From his expansion of gun laws to his dangerous and extreme abortion ban,
Kemp has been unequivocal in his right-wing positions.

However, fewer understand or know about his refusal to expand Medicaid at
the expense of hospitals, doctors and jobs. They are unaware of his
refusal to deploy hundreds of millions of dollars to abate the state’s
housing and eviction crisis. His administration’s decision to destroy
thousands of canisters of baby formula barely raised a blip on the radar,
and his cancellation of summer lunches for children got scant attention.

Our campaign, then, has the traditional challenger’s role of amplifying
contrasts at a level that penetrates the public consciousness and
conscience.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220709_B1_Numbers_S1_T1_LGW_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]Derek,
the recent actions of the U.S. Supreme
Court spotlight how urgent it is in Georgia to have a governor who is not
beholden to the hard-right, extremist elements of the GOP.

The Court shows every intention of continuing to devolve constitutional
rights to the states, like abortion, LGBTQ+ protections and civil rights.
Similarly, the edicts show how essential the next governor will be as the
Court undercuts federal action on gun safety, climate change and voting
rights. A second term of Brian Kemp promises expansions of both ambitious
and extremist policies. Building voter understanding of this imminent
likelihood will require multi-pronged approaches and fast responses to the
changing landscape in this election cycle.

As we move into the remaining 17 weeks of this campaign, our fundraising
and investments will increase commensurate with the challenge and the
opportunity of this election. We will field an unprecedented campaign
infrastructure that leverages our proven models for turnout, all while
educating and engaging voters who are still buffeted by COVID, inflation,
exhaustion and the crises of gun violence, assault on our civil rights and
the political malaise that attends midterm elections.

We are working to support the Democratic Party of Georgia’s Coordinated
Campaign efforts and work to elect a strong Democratic slate that will
deliver for Georgians, protect our democracy and make our state the best
one for all families.

We are so grateful for everything you have done to get us to this point.

But we have to understand: this fundraising report is a sign of our
momentum, but is in no way a guarantee of victory in November.

Stacey will continue to articulate a clear, thoughtful and cohesive vision
for Georgia, one that tackles the core issues of healthcare, education,
public safety and economic security. She will argue for smart investments
that use our state’s surplus to do the job of the people rather than send
more money to millionaires.

She will address the exodus of teachers, the loss of healthcare workers,
the scourge of rampant gun violence and the shortage of law enforcement by
actually discussing the real issues and proposing achievable, economically
sound solutions.

Most importantly, Stacey and our campaign are committed to reaching every
voter — wherever they are — and bringing them into the campaign. Our
vision of One Georgia is within reach, and we are excited to make it so.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220709_B1_Numbers_S1_T1_LGW_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]But Stacey and I are counting on this grassroots team to make all of
this work possible. Will you make your
first investment to
keep growing our grassroots energy right now? Anything you’re able to give
— $5 or whatever makes sense for your budget right now —
will make a real difference.

Thank you,
LGW

Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=906%2E1862389%2EOyMHjR

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8kdt86gikakm6if0a6phk9kud42mf091ktlqm2g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u8qn1plic9pbad7161jr0ojkcspb3d5nccrjdcj569h64t1gmqor4otlcmo68c77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmaqrcc3nc5j35c5jcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5ctj69p34s9j649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7tktmn7c759r6s0nfg36f8vhmpkq87etkvak9e0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpie8p72cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9188t7rdvuo5a6bec8bo037b96pdikfv1kmkko_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpie8p72cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7bsohh3jrjc5p8g6l4gesgssimrac58m7f1sofo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7cpie8p72cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. body:
| | Peter, I have huge news about Texas' actions to secure our border in the wake of President Biden's failed leadership and dangerous open border policies.

_**I just issued an Executive Order that authorizes the Texas National Guard and Texas Department of Public Safety to RETURN Joe Biden 's illegal immigrants to the border. **_

While Biden refuses to do his job, Texas is once again stepping up to secure our border and protect our communities. Now I need to know if I can count on your support as Texas does what is necessary to secure our border.

subject: The summer slump is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eddie Geller for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47612689/354971593/380755282?refcode=gel_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczNWY1OC1iOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKmhHU1erv6xY6y18UCTGcBhiYrjB5C6-9iF03eANwM=)

| | [The summer slump is here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47612690/354971594/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220709_FR_SUMMERSLUMP_A1_send_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczNWY1OC1iOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKmhHU1erv6xY6y18UCTGcBhiYrjB5C6-9iF03eANwM=)

Summers are always tough for political campaigns — but this dip is happening at the worst possible time.

_Roe v. Wade_ is officially on the ballot in November, and we must flip Florida’s 15th to protect reproductive healthcare.

[But if we can't reverse the summer slump, we won't have the resources to flip this must-win seat. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47612691/354971595/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220709_FR_SUMMERSLUMP_A1_send_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczNWY1OC1iOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKmhHU1erv6xY6y18UCTGcBhiYrjB5C6-9iF03eANwM=)

Seriously. If this dip continues, we will have to cut back on ads, reduce our door knocking, and even minimize our staff.

This district is one of the most important in the entire country, and we must reverse course now.

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Can you take our quick issues survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Please take a few minutes to complete our July issues survey

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=636%2E61531%2EIWFszb)
Hello,
The primary election for Vermont’s Senate election is just one month away, and that means there’s a lot to do to make sure Peter is elected to this all-important seat.
But at the top of the list? Speaking directly with this grassroots coalition about which issues are impacting you and those closest to you. These conversations are essential because they help Peter to know how best to fight for us in Washington.
[**Please take a few minutes to complete our July issues survey. We promise it’ll be quick.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220709_s_t_survey&t=3&akid=636%2E61531%2EIWFszb)
[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220709_s_t_survey&t=7&t=8&akid=636%2E61531%2EIWFszb)
---
One of the reasons Peter will be a great Senator is because he really listens to Vermonters to understand what issues matter most to them. And we need more of that in Washington.
That’s why it’s so important that Peter hears from as many folks as possible. Your stories are why he’s running for this Senate seat, and we appreciate you taking the time to share them with us.
[**Take our quick issues survey and continue helping shape this campaign. Click here to get started.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220709_s_t_survey&t=4&akid=636%2E61531%2EIWFszb)
[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220709_s_t_survey&t=7&t=10&akid=636%2E61531%2EIWFszb)
---
Thank you!
Team Welch

---

body:
It’s time to elect someone new

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47612860/354972251/-1614295972?refcode=EM_FR_TamieWilsonWelcome2_N_TW_90do_10_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRjZGRiNmQtYjlmZi1lYzExLWI0N2EtMjgxODc4YjgzZDhhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YdILqobmLJBSdVXmMAV6-5WwEthlgI-mswrtPKOkMbM=)
Team,
**Jim Jordan has a long track record of failure.**
He has done nothing for his constituents here in Ohio. His only accomplishment is turning himself into a leader of the far-right extremists in Congress.
Instead of solving problems, Jim makes a clown show of everything he does. If Republicans take back Congress, Jim will be the new chair of the Judiciary Committee – and he’s almost certain to turn that respected committee into a circus.
But we have another option. We can beat Jim Jordan and we can end his extremism in Congress.
**[Team, my name is Tamie Wilson, and I’m a fighter who has spent years helping this district and its communities. We can show what it means to have someone working for you, and we can end Jim Jordan’s reign of extremism. I'm an entrepreneur and community leader here in Ohio. I’ve worked at the local and state levels to get legislation passed and to solve community issues.
Jim Jordan hasn’t ever done that.
Through hard work and connecting with local voters, I built a strong network and became the Democratic nominee. I plan to use that same hard work, my roots in the district, and the fact that 50 percent of the district is new to Jim Jordan to my advantage.
While we have hard work, Jim has Fox News. We don’t need to match him dollar for dollar, we just need enough to keep me on the road talking to the voters Jim ignores.

clean_body: It’s time to elect someone new = Team, Jim Jordan has a long track record of failure. He has done nothing for his constituents here in Ohio. His only accomplishment is turning himself into a leader of the far-right extremists in Congress. Instead of solving problems, Jim makes a clown show of everything he does. If Republicans take back Congress, Jim will be the new chair of the Judiciary Committee – and he’s almost certain to turn that respected committee into a circus. But we have another option. We can beat Jim Jordan and we can end his extremism in Congress. = = I'm an entrepreneur and community leader here in Ohio. I’ve worked at the local and state levels to get legislation passed and to solve community issues. Jim Jordan hasn’t ever done that. Through hard work and connecting with local voters, I built a strong network and became the Democratic nominee. I plan to use that same hard work, my roots in the district, and the fact that 50 percent of the district is new to Jim Jordan to my advantage. While we have hard work, Jim has Fox News. We don’t need to match him dollar for dollar, we just need enough to keep me on the road talking to the voters Jim ignores. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thanks for your support, Tamie Wilson = || || || Tamie Wilson For US 18 North Sandusky Street Delaware, OH 43015 United States ** | Paid For By Tamie Wilson For US

name: Shuwaski Young
subject: A promise to Mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91271/images/Young%20Email%20Header.png]
Friend,
My mom is my superhero. When times were tough, she wrapped pennies for me to make it through college. I owe her the world.
So it crushes me when I hear rumblings about Republicans like Michael Guest threatening her future. Planning to gut her Social Security — and payments for 416,500 other Mississippi seniors — for good.
Mississippi might be ranked the cheapest state to retire in. But under Guest's leadership, we're leaving our seniors behind. Too many are stuck deciding between paying their medical bills, putting food on the table, and filling up their tanks.
Michael Guest has shown us what he believes in. He’s voted down Medicare expansion and caps for prescription drugs and insulin. He refused to fund additional benefits for toxic-exposed veterans — many of whom fought in Korea and Vietnam.
With this record, Social Security will likely be on his chopping box next.
We need to address Social Security and Medicare on the national level. Federal funding runs out in 2035 for SS and 2026 for Medicare. We need to scrap the SS cap for millionaires and expand Medicare. If we don’t, Mississippi seniors will see their benefits significantly cut or axed. It’s a ticking clock.
When I started my campaign, I promised my mom that I would make sure she still got her Social Security check every month. That more seniors receive quality healthcare access. And that we look out for those who taught us, supported us, and made us who we are today.
Help me keep my promise to my mom and deliver real solutions for Mississippi seniors on Capitol Hill. Donate $50, $25, $15, or just $5 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_em_07092022_other]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_em_07092022_50] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_em_07092022_25] DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_em_07092022_15] DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_em_07092022_5]
Be sure to check out our website and social media pages to stay up to date with the campaign!
WEBSITE [https://www.shuwaskiyoung.com] FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/shuwaskiyoungMS] TWITTER [https://www.twitter.com/shuwaskiyoung] INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/shuwaskiyoung]
Thank you for your support.
-Shuwaski

Jackson, MS 39205-0151
United States

Michael Guest has shown us what he believes in. He’s voted down Medicare expansion and caps for prescription drugs and insulin. He refused to fund additional benefits for toxic-exposed veterans — many of whom fought in Korea and Vietnam. With this record, Social Security will likely be on his chopping box next. We need to address Social Security and Medicare on the national level. Federal funding runs out in 2035 for SS and 2026 for Medicare. We need to scrap the SS cap for millionaires and expand Medicare. If we don’t, Mississippi seniors will see their benefits significantly cut or axed. It’s a ticking clock. When I started my campaign, I promised my mom that I would make sure she still got her Social Security check every month. That more seniors receive quality healthcare access. And that we look out for those who taught us, supported us, and made us who we are today. Help me keep my promise to my mom and deliver real solutions for Mississippi seniors on Capitol Hill. Donate $50, $25, $15, or just $5 today. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $50 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $15 [] DONATE $5 [] Be sure to check out our website and social media pages to stay up to date with the campaign! WEBSITE [] FACEBOOK [] TWITTER [] INSTAGRAM [] Thank you for your support. -Shuwaski Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress Shuwaski Young for Congress PO Box 151 Jackson, MS 39205-0151 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6134%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=q4%2btw02h2AWo5g8ZHEkM0A&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63348%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F5af%2bwWotT%2bKsjalXmxmDg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63348%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F5af%2bwWotT%2bKsjalXmxmDg&sysid=1)
---

The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63340%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f2%2bNuZnP5pG2JqpJDQusWQ&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brno?=
subject: Let’s talk about ballot harvesting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/lets-talk-about-ballot-harvesting?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| **Have you ever heard of ballot harvesting?** It’s a practice where a political party pay workers to pick up ballots from your home. It’s a favorite tactic of Democrats across the country... And while it might sound innocent, it creates a **HUGE problem** ... Because if voting were left to ballot harvesting... Then whichever party could spend the most on ballot pick-ups would win every election. Oh and that’s just the start... Because these ballot harvesters could even instruct voters to fill out ballots in favor of the Democrats... Or just change Republican votes to Democrats outright. No bueno, right? And yet like I said, Democrats just seem to LOVE ballot harvesting... So much so, that **I had to fight them in the Supreme Court** just to stop it from happening in Arizona. It’s one of the things I’m most proud of in my career: **Brnovich vs. DNC (Democratic National Committee).** A case where I argued that Arizona’s anti-ballot harvesting law (H.B. 2023) did **not** violate the voting rights act. Which it obviously didn’t... This law simply prevents sketchy paid operatives from harvesting ballots. Well can you guess what argument the DNC made when we were arguing the case? **They said that H.B. 2023 was racist.** (You saw that one coming from a mile away, didn’t you?) Maybe one day the Dems will learn that simply labeling anything you don’t like as “racist” doesn’t actually make it so... But regardless, the Supreme Court sided with me and the people of Arizona in a 6-3 decision... **And ballot harvesting is illegal in Arizona, as it should be. ** The good guys win, right? Well, for now... Because here’s the scary thing: **What happens if Democrats try to nationalize all voting procedures** and make ballot harvesting the norm across the nation? Pile on the fact that corporate America will shell out billions to help them... And a Republican might never win another election. These are the kind of stakes we’re dealing with in this election... Which is why I NEED to get to Washington so I can represent you as the United States Senate. [**If you’ve got even 30 minutes a week where you can volunteer and help my campaign, let me know here.**](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=34d5d985e7&e=6dcd2506d1)** ** We’ve only got a few weeks until the primary, and there’s no time to lose. \- Mark
---
| | PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE.
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Brnovich for Senate, All rights reserved._

**Brnovich for Senate**
PO Box 497
Phoenix, AZ 85007

subject: Scheller for Congress Newsletter
body:
Happy Saturday #TeamScheller! Here is your Scheller for Congress Newsletter! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5aa7ed039df5/scheller-for-congress-newsletter-9038725?e=db8085a287)
---
# Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter!
Happy Saturday, #TeamScheller!I hope everyone had a Happy Independence Day. Unfortunately, this year’s July 4 was the most expensive in American history — the average cost of a family cookout was 17% more than last year. Staggering increases in the prices of ground beef (up 36% since last year), lemonade (up 22%), and ice cream (up 10%) all contributed to putting a hole in your pocket this Independence Day.As you know, runaway inflation has been enabled by my so-called “moderate” opponent Susan Wild, who has actually voted in line with the president’s careless spending initiatives 100% of the time. Also, just this week, Wild compared the Supreme Court’s ruling in favor of a football coach who prayed on the field after games to the Taliban leaders of Afghanistan. She said the ruling is something that happens in “theocracies” and “countries that we can’t imagine living in or being a part of.” Does that sound like someone who believes in our First Amendment or the values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness?
[](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=a7ab623b8f&e=db8085a287)
Comments like these are exactly why Republicans across Pennsylvania are making BIG gains in voter registration. According to our Department of State’s election statistics, more than 32,000 voters have changed their affiliation from Democratic to Republican so far this year, while less than 8,700 have flipped the other way. Additionally, the Democrats have lost more than 50,000 registered voters across the state this year.In just 122 days, we will retire Susan Wild and take back the House. We will end Democratic one-party control of Washington, and their disastrous policies that threaten the American Dream in the Lehigh Valley.I hope you will join me on this journey! -Lisa
| [Join the team!](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=82c5768a71&e=db8085a287)
---
|
---
# News from the trail!
“[Oil from U.S. reserves sent overseas as gasoline prices stay high](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=5a8771cd7d&e=db8085a287)” (Reuters)
As Reuters reported Tuesday, the United States exported more than 5 million barrels of oil from its Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) to Europe and Asia last month.The move, authorized by President Joe Biden, came as gasoline prices soared to record-high averages of nearly $5 per gallon across the country. As a result of these mass exports, the amount of oil in SPR’s reserves has fallen to the lowest level since 1986, Reuters reported.Biden has blamed the ongoing gasoline crisis on the greed of oil companies, but some notable figures have disputed this assessment.It appears Biden and one of his top allies in Congress, Susan Wild are content on blaming others for our high gas prices while only working to lower other the prices anywhere but America.
|

clean_body: Happy Saturday #TeamScheller! Here is your Scheller for Congress Newsletter! | | | Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter! Happy Saturday, #TeamScheller!I hope everyone had a Happy Independence Day. Unfortunately, this year’s July 4 was the most expensive in American history — the average cost of a family cookout was 17% more than last year. Staggering increases in the prices of ground beef (up 36% since last year), lemonade (up 22%), and ice cream (up 10%) all contributed to putting a hole in your pocket this Independence Day.As you know, runaway inflation has been enabled by my so-called “moderate” opponent Susan Wild, who has actually voted in line with the president’s careless spending initiatives 100% of the time. Also, just this week, Wild compared the Supreme Court’s ruling in favor of a football coach who prayed on the field after games to the Taliban leaders of Afghanistan. She said the ruling is something that happens in “theocracies” and “countries that we can’t imagine living in or being a part of.” Does that sound like someone who believes in our First Amendment or the values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness? Comments like these are exactly why Republicans across Pennsylvania are making BIG gains in voter registration. According to our Department of State’s election statistics, more than 32,000 voters have changed their affiliation from Democratic to Republican so far this year, while less than 8,700 have flipped the other way. Additionally, the Democrats have lost more than 50,000 registered voters across the state this year.In just 122 days, we will retire Susan Wild and take back the House. We will end Democratic one-party control of Washington, and their disastrous policies that threaten the American Dream in the Lehigh Valley.I hope you will join me on this journey! -Lisa | | News from the trail! “” (Reuters) As Reuters reported Tuesday, the United States exported more than 5 million barrels of oil from its Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) to Europe and Asia last month.The move, authorized by President Joe Biden, came as gasoline prices soared to record-high averages of nearly $5 per gallon across the country. As a result of these mass exports, the amount of oil in SPR’s reserves has fallen to the lowest level since 1986, Reuters reported.Biden has blamed the ongoing gasoline crisis on the greed of oil companies, but some notable figures have disputed this assessment.It appears Biden and one of his top allies in Congress, Susan Wild are content on blaming others for our high gas prices while only working to lower other the prices anywhere but America. | Pictures from the District Reading of the Declaration of Independence Macungie Bike Night Visit to AMPAL Manufacturing in Carbon County! name: Karen Bass
subject: Local government matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
Team,

Battles are going on across the nation in the name of reproductive rights. The end of _Roe v. Wade_ will likely lead to about half of the country placing restrictions on abortion.

As residents of Los Angeles, we have long been a sanctuary for women seeking access to abortion care. Our state has some of the most expansive reproductive rights laws in the country, and it's critical we keep it that way.

The recent Supreme Court rulings on reproductive freedom, climate change, immigrants' rights, and gun regulation prove exactly why **local government matters.** We must act on our own to stand against these attacks on our freedoms.

As your mayor, I will always stand up for the privacy of Angelenos. I will fight to make our city safer, and I will make tackling climate change and environmental injustice a top priority.

Meanwhile, my opponent has no environmental platform to stand on. And he has a history of supporting anti-abortion organizations and politicians who are **celebrating** the Supreme Court's disastrous ruling and already pushing for a national abortion ban.

This November, we will decide the type of city we want to be and what kind of mayor we want to lead us during these historic times.

[_**If you're ready to defend our civil rights in Los Angeles and protect our rights to reproductive freedom, contraception, clean air, and more – add your name next to mine, and commit to keeping Los Angeles a beacon of prosperity for all.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47613773/354977888/-184490622?ms=em22_220707_CRPF_adv_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em22_220707_CRPF_adv_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em22_220707_CRPF_adv_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220707_CRPF_adv_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=aIEWFy22WnXTVB%2BMSgGvZgif7dxtlTjkZdor43L3ZvqIAkgbg6V4lDQQ49rUlExWV3xp38wvhpq6Fb5TecP93dGzsT9ZLEcd35ARo%2Bh09E0H1TuTC4m0AbdqCz4SGyxTYSPvAtWmsb2PYv4%2F7d2PpQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWMyMmRiYS1jMWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x65IpEh-LhWqQFpr7fPSjSuJR2LJCkV7sk7QJuDgknE=&emci=0a060784-22fe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=35c22dba-c1ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)

We have the power to build a Los Angeles that protects, educates, and supports its people. That’s what makes our city so unique – and I look forward to accomplishing our goals together.

In solidarity,

Karen

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Warnock’s campaign is printing money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I want to give you a taste of what we are up against. |
---

| If you're skimming this email on your phone today, here is the crux of the content below. Our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is raising unbelievable sums of money following recent Supreme Court decisions that have energized the Left. Quite literally, _**he's printing cash.**_

We're having trouble keeping up.

We have 122 days until Election Day, and I'm calling on 122 of our most steadfast supporters to chip in any amount before midnight tonight.

| [** Help defeat Senator Warnock
CHIP IN WHAT YOU CAN >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73226d2323944f6895c2363d8a7e5e8a&_e=5cDucdZ4TpyH5onRf3qd7316MRX3ZU83LhFGi9fLpJ-wLzs2vX6NJawb7QOMYG-he85KuR-5BwyQThtduCP6yEq0Iht4iZunMWQ3O9aH49cRHWue0b488IAoUsA5ibG4UwPYG3yveBkWd7WgE-XSBRvpbKPUal-RtXd4bONqRmC0s64UTpIcT04y1QVVvaDdqjamrQVFwkSIPFNP7SR98J0N7EYC8NTZNeYxsYmmBi55qKWDqoGKFpmfsIpcuJjWq9mL1cqgnkpmT8o9V69Qo4iS0-SomuKHsGVaf9TCkDCleqHmHxLg9LNe6gvS-ZJb0RdfyVZiHPpgKrW131Omf3yzNTxJqEKLOErLRoGCo_ensUut9iMBg3d3YrhPxztu0kxaR4sg_yR_b1-RVmnqeXQWvptw5WMRDOkCb2uPl9E9rfo8dNMQEShxXdM2U147aMLVbEjx2QDCmF9nX6McIDnFDMglxiZAPJhtdtpLU6Y%3D)
---

**You can read the rest of the email in its entirety below.**

Peter,

Recent decisions handed down by the Supreme Court have energized the Left to new heights.

ActBlue, which is the online fundraising platform used by Democrats, reported a massive uptick in donations in recent weeks. They reported raising over $80 million for Democrats in just 7 days!

Our Senate race in Georgia is likely going to be **the most expensive Senate race in the nation this year** , so this uptick in donations is just making it easier for Senator Warnock and harder for us.

But that's not all. Senator Warnock's Facebook ads raised him over $152,000 in just five days. _It's like he's literally printing money online!_ **That's nuts!**

**Here's the deal** - we were already being outraised in this race, and now Democrat donors around the country are pouring EVEN MORE money into Georgia.

Every national news outlet in the country has identified our race as the one that **will decide control of the Senate.** Since I won the Republican nomination six weeks ago, Senator Warnock and national Democrats have spent more than **$2 million per week** attacking me on TV.

**What I'm asking from you:** I know that it's summertime and folks are busy - but the reality of the situation is that Election Day is 122 days from today; every day that we don't hit our fundraising target, we fall behind even further. _**[Therefore, I am asking for 122 donations before midnight tonight to set us on the right path for the next 122 days. clean_body: I want to give you a taste of what we are up against. | | If you're skimming this email on your phone today, here is the crux of the content below. Our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is raising unbelievable sums of money following recent Supreme Court decisions that have energized the Left. Quite literally, he's printing cash. We're having trouble keeping up. We have 122 days until Election Day, and I'm calling on 122 of our most steadfast supporters to chip in any amount before midnight tonight. | You can read the rest of the email in its entirety below. Peter, Recent decisions handed down by the Supreme Court have energized the Left to new heights. ActBlue, which is the online fundraising platform used by Democrats, reported a massive uptick in donations in recent weeks. They reported raising over $80 million for Democrats in just 7 days! Our Senate race in Georgia is likely going to be the most expensive Senate race in the nation this year , so this uptick in donations is just making it easier for Senator Warnock and harder for us. But that's not all. Senator Warnock's Facebook ads raised him over $152,000 in just five days. It's like he's literally printing money online! That's nuts! Here's the deal - we were already being outraised in this race, and now Democrat donors around the country are pouring EVEN MORE money into Georgia. Every national news outlet in the country has identified our race as the one that will decide control of the Senate. Since I won the Republican nomination six weeks ago, Senator Warnock and national Democrats have spent more than $2 million per week attacking me on TV. What I'm asking from you: I know that it's summertime and folks are busy - but the reality of the situation is that Election Day is 122 days from today; every day that we don't hit our fundraising target, we fall behind even further. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | Democrats may be energized right now, but I know that a wave of PATRIOTIC AMERICANS are ready to get involved, stop the Biden-Warnock agenda, and get our country back on the right track. Your friend in the battle, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What happens in New Hampshire will decide the future of reproductive rights.

body:
I'm asking for just $3.
| | |

Listen – I'm asking for just $3.

Here's why: Mitch McConnell is determined to ban abortion nationwide, and if he takes back the Senate, he will be poised to do just that.
**To put it simply, what happens in New Hampshire will decide the future of reproductive rights.** But political experts like Rachel Maddow are saying I have a tough reelection fight ahead of me. And a public poll shows me down by two points to an anti-choice opponent.
With extreme GOP groups spending millions against me, I'm hoping I can count on grassroots donors like you, friend. I know that in a race this competitive, $3 doesn't seem like much. But when everyone chips in, it quickly adds up.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I don’t care what the radical Supreme Court comes up with next
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614082/354980819/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220709_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhkNTNjZi1jM2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vREOODr8GduvRznGJw4cruleP8SmOUihrYDKOiiLvYo=)

Friends,

Like so many of you, I’ve been deeply troubled by the Supreme Court’s recent decisions.

Recent rulings issued by the majority-conservative court represent an attack on the values and interests of the people of Florida and our country, including:
* Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and attacking women’s right to choose

* Ruling that the Clean Air Act doesn't give EPA the authority to regulate power plants polluting carbon into the air

* Striking down a 100-year-old New York law aimed at keeping communities safe from gun violence – a win for the gun lobby that will make it harder to protect communities everywhere

Folks, I don't care what this radical Supreme Court comes up with next. When I'm Governor I _will_ protect a woman’s right to choose. Florida's utility monopolies _will_ be reducing their carbon pollution. And I _will_ fight for public safety by standing up to the gun lobby.
_**[But I won’t be able to win this race alone. Ron DeSantis and his billionaire supporters are going all in on this race, and we need to make sure we have the resources to stand up to them. Please, help me stand up for Floridians’ rights by making a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614083/354980820/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220709_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhkNTNjZi1jM2ZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vREOODr8GduvRznGJw4cruleP8SmOUihrYDKOiiLvYo=)**_

name: Nan Whaley
subject: We have an opening this year to elect a pro-choice governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
I won’t lie: This is not going to be an easy fight.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603130/354952976/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_9tovVob8_VYins6yUNx6gF8oAtlITSkwl-4spAdu8=)

Team,
With the demise of _Roe_ and Republicans’ decision to enact an extreme anti-abortion ban, the stakes in this race are now sky-high.
But we also have an opportunity this year – the chance to defeat Mike DeWine and elect a pro-choice governor who will protect the full range of reproductive care, as a majority of Ohioans want.
**[I am the first woman to become a major party nominee for governor in Ohio – and I’m running to protect abortion access. Please, chip in to my campaign right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603131/354952983/-419803747?refcode=nw_em_220709_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_9tovVob8_VYins6yUNx6gF8oAtlITSkwl-4spAdu8=)**
I won’t lie: This is not going to be an easy fight.
But I didn’t run for office because it would be easy – I ran because I knew that together, we can make a difference and create a better future for our state.
It’s what I believed then, and it’s what I believe now. And it’s how we’re going to pull together to restore abortion access in Ohio – along with ending the corruption in Columbus and creating a government that works for us again, not for the wealthy and powerful.
**[It is going to take every one of us doing everything we can this year to ensure that we can defeat anti-choice Mike DeWine and put government to work for the people. I need you in this fight – chip in right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47603132/354952990/-419803747?refcode=nw_em_220709_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDJlZTg2MS1hNGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_9tovVob8_VYins6yUNx6gF8oAtlITSkwl-4spAdu8=)**

clean_body: I won’t lie: This is not going to be an easy fight. = Team, With the demise of Roe and Republicans’ decision to enact an extreme anti-abortion ban, the stakes in this race are now sky-high. But we also have an opportunity this year – the chance to defeat Mike DeWine and elect a pro-choice governor who will protect the full range of reproductive care, as a majority of Ohioans want. = I won’t lie: This is not going to be an easy fight. But I didn’t run for office because it would be easy – I ran because I knew that together, we can make a difference and create a better future for our state. It’s what I believed then, and it’s what I believe now. And it’s how we’re going to pull together to restore abortion access in Ohio – along with ending the corruption in Columbus and creating a government that works for us again, not for the wealthy and powerful. = Onward, Nan Whaley **= Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

name: Rep. Demings
subject: Rubio’s record on reproductive rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I know exactly what grade I would give him
| | |
---
**Friend, Marco Rubio just called a bill discussing a woman's right to choose _"barbaric"_ – and he cheered on the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614304/354981839/232639193?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3678-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGViZGNlYS1jNWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvuDBLGafRdsXxF6W9K_Dnsxz6FxJqpUm6Ng5eIIhZQ=&emci=01d3a3ac-f0fe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=2debdcea-c5ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
Banning abortions for women and girls who have suffered sexual abuse, sex trafficking, rape, incest and more? _That’s_ barbaric.

Undoing nearly 50 years of precedent and forcing our country back to when women didn’t have autonomy over their own bodies and health care decisions?_T_ _hat’s_ barbaric.
Friend, I am sick and tired of politicians like Marco Rubio telling women what to do with their bodies while turning a blind eye to gun violence, lack of affordable health care and all the other issues affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country.
**To me, Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself (and I know _exactly_ what grade I would give him) – but I want to hear what supporters like you think about Rubio’s record on reproductive rights. So please, let me know: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614305/354981840/232639193?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3678-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGViZGNlYS1jNWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvuDBLGafRdsXxF6W9K_Dnsxz6FxJqpUm6Ng5eIIhZQ=&emci=01d3a3ac-f0fe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=2debdcea-c5ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
Thank you,

Val Demings
