clean_body: I know exactly what grade I would give him | | | Friend, Marco Rubio just called a bill discussing a woman's right to choose "barbaric" – and he cheered on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. Banning abortions for women and girls who have suffered sexual abuse, sex trafficking, rape, incest and more? That’s barbaric. Undoing nearly 50 years of precedent and forcing our country back to when women didn’t have autonomy over their own bodies and health care decisions?T hat’s barbaric. Friend, I am sick and tired of politicians like Marco Rubio telling women what to do with their bodies while turning a blind eye to gun violence, lack of affordable health care and all the other issues affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country. To me, Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself (and I know exactly what grade I would give him) – but I want to hear what supporters like you think about Rubio’s record on reproductive rights. So please, let me know: Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Biden & Dems Must ACT | Rogue Supreme Court | Universal
Healthcare on the Ballot! | Fast Food Worker Justice | Bust Big Tech |
Rep. Levin vs. Trump Donors | Major Push Inside Dem Party | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5972?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220709_1_1.pdcwKU&t=1011&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Become a monthly donor to fund our fight against far-right
authoritarians and corporate control. We need leaders who will act boldly
to meet this moment — and we need YOU to help maximize our pressure on
Washington.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1012&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

Make sure to tune in LIVE for our National Organize-to-Win Call [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]THIS
MONDAY (July 11th) at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT, when Our Revolution will host US
Rep. Pramila Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.

We will talk with Rep. Jayapal about what Democrats can do right now to
fight for abortion rights - from expanding the court to waging a national
strike - and priorities Congress can and must deliver for the American
people ASAP.

And, we’ll dig into the importance of building power at the state and
local level with Lt. Gov. David Zuckerman - Bernie’s fellow independent
from Vermont; and from Maryland, State House Del. Sheila Ruth and
Montgomery Co. Exec. Marc Elrich.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1015&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1016&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

C’MON MAN - DO SOMETHING!

President Biden and Dem leadership can and must ACT NOW to check the power
of a radical Supreme Court that has gone rogue, rolling back abortion
rights, gun safety legislation, the EPA’s authority to regulate emissions,
Native sovereignty, and more.

“Here we are with leadership basically [reduced] to begging for people to
vote,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6075?t=1017&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]The Hill
this week. “No clear plan, no promises of what those votes will translate
to.”

“I think that there is just this wishful thinking on the part of the party
establishment that suddenly Roe being overturned is good news, that this
changes the tide of the midterms,” Aaron said. “Delivering results now is
critical.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1018&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Join Our Revolution NOW to demand ACTION from our elected leaders.
Democrats must do everything in their power to protect our rights, defend
our democracy, and earn votes in the midterms.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1019&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

WHAT DEMS CAN ACTUALLY DO
EXPAND THE SUPREME COURT - AND MORE

As US Rep. Pramila Jayapal will explain on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1020&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Monday Night Call,
there are options to fight back and defend abortion rights - starting with
a push to expand the Supreme Court.

“We must hold these rogue justices to account,” she said.

Mondaire Jones has bills to add justices and expand the Supreme Court, and
his SCERT Act would institute a Supreme Court ethics and recusal standard
and require disclosure of lobbying and dark money interests.

Pramila’s Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act would overhaul judicial
ethics laws, and she said the Judiciary Committee must provide critical
oversight and hold hearings on violations the Supreme Court has committed.

Elected leadership could also establish clinics on federal lands; increase
grant funding for interstate travel and family planning services, and
legally challenge state bans on pills.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1021&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Rush a donation now to ramp up our work to defend abortion care. We
cannot sit idly by while the far-right dismantles our rights.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1022&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Ballot Initiative 1471 to create the
Washington Health Trust – the first-ever non-profit, state-wide universal
healthcare system in the country!

A successful state program will prove single-payer bills like Medicare for
All not only save money but SAVE LIVES - and we need you to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6076?t=1023&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]join this
fight!
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1024&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

Ballot measures are a form of direct democracy that circumvent elected
officials who have refused to act — but they require dedicated activists
willing to put in the work.

Our Revolution is partnering with Whole Washington to get more than
400,000 signatures to put universal healthcare on the ballot!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6076?t=1025&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]SIGN UP HERE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1026&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

Worker activists like Moriah Foster of Burger King in Sacramento and
Ingrid Vilorio of Jack-in-the-Box in Castro Valley, CA joined our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?t=1027&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]National Organizing Call last week to make clear that your activism on
this issue can tip the balance for critical labor legislation in
California.

We need YOU to stand up with fast-food workers, Our Revolution, SEIU, and
Fight for $15 and a Union to demand the California State Senate pass
AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. This bill would give these essential
workers a say in setting health, safety, and employment standards while
holding major food chains accountable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6051?t=1028&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Right now, CA workers need you to add your voice in solidarity with AB
257 and demand more democracy in the workplace.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1029&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

SCHUMER - BRING BILLS TO A VOTE!
WE CAN CURB BIG TECH MONOPOLY POWER

Our Revolution and Fight for Our Future are calling on Senate Leader Chuck
Schumer (D-NY) to bring two key antitrust bills for a vote, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6047?t=1030&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]The
Washington Post reports — and we need your voice!

“Amazingly these bills have support in the Senate, we just need Democratic
leaders to ACT,” Our Revolution Long Island organizer Joe Sackman said at
a demonstration in NYC. “Big Tech companies are monopolizing digital
markets and damaging our democracy.”

The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act
would enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and ban self-dealing.
See our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6078?t=1031&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]clip of John Oliver advocating for our bills on HBO!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5728?t=1032&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Take a quick action right now — CALL YOUR SENATORS and tell them you
want these two important bills passed ASAP!

★ ★ ★
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1033&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG][ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1034&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

As you know, Bernie founded Our Revolution five years ago to wage the
fight for our progressive policy solutions and elect allies into power who
will work with our activists on the outside.

Our Revolution is the largest progressive grassroots-funded organization
in the country — [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1035&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]but we need to double our coalition and max out our
power to beat back the big money dominating American politics. Become a
sustaining member TODAY.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1037&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

ANDY LEVIN vs. HALEY STEVENS AND AIPAC

Our Revolution is rallying this weekend with labor unions and climate
activists working to re-elect US Rep. Andy Levin to Congress to represent
Michigan-11.

In a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6079?t=1038&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]video, Andy’s opponent Haley Stevens outright ignores a Jewish
mother politely asking her why she’d accept more than $820K in ads from
AIPAC — which is also backing 109 insurrectionists.

“The fact that she ignored my question and turned her back to me shows
Stevens knows it’s wrong to take millions from a PAC that supports
anti-abortion insurrectionists,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6080?t=1039&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]said Susannah Goodman. “Clearly, she
hopes to take their money without any public accountability, but as a Jew
in Metro Detroit who just brought a new child into this world, I will not
be silent as our representatives associate with antisemitic politicians
who make us all less safe.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1040&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

As Bernie Sanders said in his endorsement: “Andy Levin is a strong
pro-labor voice in Congress who’s not afraid to take on powerful special
interests.”

Bernie’s right, Andy is standing up to Big Oil money right now because he
is a climate champion and original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6081?t=1041&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]JOIN US and Rep. Levin for a climate canvass starting at 1 pm ET
Sunday!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6081?t=1042&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]CANVASS FOR ANDY & CLIMATE ACTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1043&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

So far in the 2022 primaries, we’ve notched some important progressive

Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea Salinas (OR-6),

Even as corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms,

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5967?t=1044&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]Join now as a monthly member to help us take down the worst corporate
politicians to make sure we’re giving voters the best, most progressive
options in November!

This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more

Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like

Our Revolution and progressives are making a major push within the
Democratic Party structure to make it more democratic and more responsive
to the grassroots.

This month, transformative rules changes are on the table, and next month
the DNC will hold its fall meeting, where we are organizing to win

These upcoming meetings are public, but there are more corporate

priorities:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/change_the_party/?t=1049&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]We need you to WEIGH-IN right now — tell us your priorities for change
within the Democratic Party and what you like to see change HERE.

Over the past 5 years, Our Revolution leaders and allies have succeeded in
making real change in 15 of the 57 Dem Parties. We’re not cheerleaders for
the party, but we’re not giving up either.

Right-wing and corporate money is flooding primaries, and there are
currently no rules to address it. We can truly make elections more fair

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/change_the_party/?t=1050&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]SURVEY

DEFEND DEMOCRACY PETITION

Congress can investigate J6, but cannot prosecute. That’s why Our
Revolution is calling on state election officials to do their job, enforce

The American people can’t stomach any more political theater. Let’s put

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5961?t=1055&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]SIGN & SHARE OUR PETITION!

BIG TECH: CALL SENATORS

Two bills to bust up Big Tech monopoly power are heading to the Senate -
and our collective action can tip the scales to get them passed. We need

“The rent is soaring here in Washington where Amazon is located,” Our

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5970?t=1057&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ]TAKE 2 MINS TO CALL YOUR SENATORS!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6074?t=1058&akid=3135%2E5885482%2EEbv43J ][IMG]

This summer, we can elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems! It

Make an impact by making calls for Our Revolution candidates on the ballot

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Biden & Dems Must ACT | Rogue Supreme Court | Universal Healthcare on the Ballot! | Fast Food Worker Justice | Bust Big Tech | Rep. Levin vs. Trump Donors | Major Push Inside Dem Party | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Become a monthly donor to fund our fight against far-right authoritarians and corporate control. We need leaders who will act boldly to meet this moment — and we need YOU to help maximize our pressure on Washington. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Make sure to tune in LIVE for our National Organize-to-Win Call [ ]THIS MONDAY (July 11th) at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT, when Our Revolution will host US Rep. Pramila Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. We will talk with Rep. Jayapal about what Democrats can do right now to fight for abortion rights - from expanding the court to waging a national strike - and priorities Congress can and must deliver for the American people ASAP. And, we’ll dig into the importance of building power at the state and local level with Lt. Gov. David Zuckerman - Bernie’s fellow independent from Vermont; and from Maryland, State House Del. Sheila Ruth and Montgomery Co. Exec. Marc Elrich. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] C’MON MAN - DO SOMETHING! President Biden and Dem leadership can and must ACT NOW to check the power of a radical Supreme Court that has gone rogue, rolling back abortion rights, gun safety legislation, the EPA’s authority to regulate emissions, Native sovereignty, and more. “Here we are with leadership basically [reduced] to begging for people to vote,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ ]The Hill this week. “No clear plan, no promises of what those votes will translate to.” “I think that there is just this wishful thinking on the part of the party establishment that suddenly Roe being overturned is good news, that this changes the tide of the midterms,” Aaron said. “Delivering results now is critical.” [ ]Join Our Revolution NOW to demand ACTION from our elected leaders. Democrats must do everything in their power to protect our rights, defend our democracy, and earn votes in the midterms. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WHAT DEMS CAN ACTUALLY DO EXPAND THE SUPREME COURT - AND MORE As US Rep. Pramila Jayapal will explain on our [ ]Monday Night Call, there are options to fight back and defend abortion rights - starting with a push to expand the Supreme Court. “We must hold these rogue justices to account,” she said. Mondaire Jones has bills to add justices and expand the Supreme Court, and his SCERT Act would institute a Supreme Court ethics and recusal standard and require disclosure of lobbying and dark money interests. Pramila’s Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act would overhaul judicial ethics laws, and she said the Judiciary Committee must provide critical oversight and hold hearings on violations the Supreme Court has committed. Elected leadership could also establish clinics on federal lands; increase grant funding for interstate travel and family planning services, and legally challenge state bans on pills. [ ]Rush a donation now to ramp up our work to defend abortion care. We cannot sit idly by while the far-right dismantles our rights. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Ballot Initiative 1471 to create the Washington Health Trust – the first-ever non-profit, state-wide universal healthcare system in the country! A successful state program will prove single-payer bills like Medicare for All not only save money but SAVE LIVES - and we need you to [ ]join this fight! [ ][IMG] Ballot measures are a form of direct democracy that circumvent elected officials who have refused to act — but they require dedicated activists willing to put in the work. Our Revolution is partnering with Whole Washington to get more than 400,000 signatures to put universal healthcare on the ballot! [ ]SIGN UP HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Worker activists like Moriah Foster of Burger King in Sacramento and Ingrid Vilorio of Jack-in-the-Box in Castro Valley, CA joined our [ ]National Organizing Call last week to make clear that your activism on this issue can tip the balance for critical labor legislation in California. We need YOU to stand up with fast-food workers, Our Revolution, SEIU, and Fight for $15 and a Union to demand the California State Senate pass AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. This bill would give these essential workers a say in setting health, safety, and employment standards while holding major food chains accountable. [ ]Right now, CA workers need you to add your voice in solidarity with AB 257 and demand more democracy in the workplace. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] SCHUMER - BRING BILLS TO A VOTE! WE CAN CURB BIG TECH MONOPOLY POWER Our Revolution and Fight for Our Future are calling on Senate Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) to bring two key antitrust bills for a vote, [ ]The Washington Post reports — and we need your voice! “Amazingly these bills have support in the Senate, we just need Democratic leaders to ACT,” Our Revolution Long Island organizer Joe Sackman said at a demonstration in NYC. “Big Tech companies are monopolizing digital markets and damaging our democracy.” The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act would enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and ban self-dealing. See our [ ]clip of John Oliver advocating for our bills on HBO! [ ]Take a quick action right now — CALL YOUR SENATORS and tell them you want these two important bills passed ASAP! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG][ ][IMG] As you know, Bernie founded Our Revolution five years ago to wage the fight for our progressive policy solutions and elect allies into power who will work with our activists on the outside. Our Revolution is the largest progressive grassroots-funded organization in the country — [ ]but we need to double our coalition and max out our power to beat back the big money dominating American politics. Become a sustaining member TODAY. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ANDY LEVIN vs. HALEY STEVENS AND AIPAC Our Revolution is rallying this weekend with labor unions and climate activists working to re-elect US Rep. Andy Levin to Congress to represent Michigan-11. In a [ ]video, Andy’s opponent Haley Stevens outright ignores a Jewish mother politely asking her why she’d accept more than $820K in ads from AIPAC — which is also backing 109 insurrectionists. “The fact that she ignored my question and turned her back to me shows Stevens knows it’s wrong to take millions from a PAC that supports anti-abortion insurrectionists,” [ ]said Susannah Goodman. “Clearly, she hopes to take their money without any public accountability, but as a Jew in Metro Detroit who just brought a new child into this world, I will not be silent as our representatives associate with antisemitic politicians who make us all less safe.” [ ][IMG] As Bernie Sanders said in his endorsement: “Andy Levin is a strong pro-labor voice in Congress who’s not afraid to take on powerful special interests.” Bernie’s right, Andy is standing up to Big Oil money right now because he is a climate champion and original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal. [ ]JOIN US and Rep. Levin for a climate canvass starting at 1 pm ET Sunday! [ ]CANVASS FOR ANDY & CLIMATE ACTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] So far in the 2022 primaries, we’ve notched some important progressive wins for Congress — Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea Salinas (OR-6), Delia Ramirez (IL-3) and Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), and others! Even as corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms, we’re growing our power at every level of government. Let’s build on this momentum and change the composition of power in Washington. [ ]Join now as a monthly member to help us take down the worst corporate politicians to make sure we’re giving voters the best, most progressive options in November! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more than 500,000 phone calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as many folks as possible to help us hit that one-million mark and beyond! Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2), Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others! [ ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution and progressives are making a major push within the Democratic Party structure to make it more democratic and more responsive to the grassroots. This month, transformative rules changes are on the table, and next month the DNC will hold its fall meeting, where we are organizing to win critical reforms. These upcoming meetings are public, but there are more corporate consultants than ever. That’s why YOUR VOICE is needed to amplify our key priorities: [ ]We need you to WEIGH-IN right now — tell us your priorities for change within the Democratic Party and what you like to see change HERE. Over the past 5 years, Our Revolution leaders and allies have succeeded in making real change in 15 of the 57 Dem Parties. We’re not cheerleaders for the party, but we’re not giving up either. Right-wing and corporate money is flooding primaries, and there are currently no rules to address it. We can truly make elections more fair and just — join us in this push! [ ]SURVEY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Make sure to tune in LIVE for our National Organize-to-Win Call THIS MONDAY (July 11th) at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT, when Our Revolution will talk with US Rep. Pramila Jayapal about actions Democrats can take NOW to help protect abortion rights. And, we’ll dig into state and local power-building with Lt. Gov. David Zuckerman - Bernie’s fellow independent from Vermont - and from Maryland, State House Del. Sheila Ruth, and Montgomery Co. Exec. Marc Elrich. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] DEFEND DEMOCRACY PETITION Congress can investigate J6, but cannot prosecute. That’s why Our Revolution is calling on state election officials to do their job, enforce the Constitution, and bar insurrectionists from the ballot! The American people can’t stomach any more political theater. Let’s put the findings from the hearings into action and make sure Trump and his minions are disqualified from ever serving in government again! [ ]SIGN & SHARE OUR PETITION! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BIG TECH: CALL SENATORS Two bills to bust up Big Tech monopoly power are heading to the Senate - and our collective action can tip the scales to get them passed. We need YOU to quickly call your Senators and join our call team reaching out to others to do the same! “The rent is soaring here in Washington where Amazon is located,” Our Revolution phone banker Amanda Walker told us. “I called my senators, and now I’m making calls to other people asking them to do the same — this is a fight we can win.” [ ]TAKE 2 MINS TO CALL YOUR SENATORS! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As our movement is showing with primary victories, we can overcome the force of big money with our direct voter outreach. This summer, we can elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems! It feels great to change a voter’s mind in real-time and know that you’re changing the composition of power. Make an impact by making calls for Our Revolution candidates on the ballot SOON like Andy Levin (MI-11), Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), and Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3). [ ]SIGN UP TO PHONEBANK ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] US Rep. Andy Levin is one of our most committed working-class fighters in Congress — and we need your help to make sure he beats a corporate Dem opponent gunning for the seat with AIPAC money! We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Michigan’s 11th congressional district, which includes Detroit area communities like Bloomfield and Pontiac — hop on the dialer with us to make a few calls! [ ]PHONEBANK TO HAVE ANDY’S BACK! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Montgomery County Maryland’s Executive Marc Elrich is one of the most potent and effective Democratic Socialists in the country — and he needs our [ ]collective action to make sure he’s re-elected on July 19th! Don’t take our word for it — [ ]fair.org lays out Marc’s successful first term despite the staunch opposition of one of the world’s richest men — Jeff Bezos — and The Washington Post. [ ]SIGN-UP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Help us elect Del. Sheila Ruth to a full term in the Maryland General Assembly. Sheila is a great progressive and Our Revolution leader — and we need her fighting for us in Annapolis! Join us on Zoom at 6:30p Tuesday for a quick training session. Then we’ll get to work for Sheila! [ ]SIGN-UP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Are you a member of Our Revolution? subject: they won’t stop at Roe

body:
We need to send a strong message that the LGBTQ+ community deserves equal rights and dignity under the law.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614415/354982398/1431077011?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220709-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjhmNzVkNC1jOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap2u2NEzWdkKSi9kDOJGj8Z3T8pDELQSxSQbZeIEwCc=)
---
| Last week marked the seventh anniversary of the Supreme Court ruling that secured marriage equality nationwide. As the proud sister of two LGBTQ+ siblings and the current representative of Hillcrest, the heart of San Diego’s LGBTQ+ community, I welcome this anniversary with joy and gratitude.

However, this year, I also feel a deep disappointment in learning that the same court that affirmed these rights for my siblings and millions of others across the nation, is poised to take them away. Justice Clarence Thomas made it clear in his opinion: they won’t stop at _Roe._

As we celebrate San Diego Pride, we need to send a strong message that the LGBTQ+ community deserves equal rights and dignity under the law. [_**Will you add your name to the San Diego Democrats’ petition to show you stand with the LGBTQ+ community?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614416/354982399/403198173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjhmNzVkNC1jOWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap2u2NEzWdkKSi9kDOJGj8Z3T8pDELQSxSQbZeIEwCc=&emci=2b8f75d4-c9ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=2f8f75d4-c9ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14239920)

Peter,

Ballots were mailed to voters on Wednesday, which means _early voting has officially begun!_
---
And with 80% of the Arizona vote conducted through the mail during the early voting period, it’s critical that we earn as many votes as possible these next few weeks.
---
With less than a month to go until Election Day, I am relying on you, my top grassroots supporters, to help.

clean_body: I’m counting on you now that early voting has officially begun | Peter, Ballots were mailed to voters on Wednesday, which means early voting has officially begun! And with 80% of the Arizona vote conducted through the mail during the early voting period, it’s critical that we earn as many votes as possible these next few weeks. With less than a month to go until Election Day, I am relying on you, my top grassroots supporters, to help. Thanks to the continued support of my grassroots army, my campaign has been propelled into frontrunner status. And if we keep the momentum going every day this month, I know that we will come out victorious on Election Day and be one step closer to FLIPPING the House majority. With early voting in full swing, it’s up to us to make sure we have the resources we need to turnout every supporter in our district and ensure their ballots are counted. These next few weeks will make or break our campaign, but I know that with your help, we can show the radical Left the strength of our grassroots army. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

clean_body: Heal Our Country! | Fellow Patriot, Senator Roger Marshall here, reaching out about my good friend Ted Budd. We’re both farm kids who had successful careers, and like me, Ted had never run for office before 2016. Now, he’s running for the U.S. Senate because there’s more work to do. Our freedoms are under attack, and to take our country back, then we MUST take back the Senate majority. The road to doing so runs through North Carolina. | Our country is falling apart because the Democrats have total control. The Senate Majority is well within our reach, but we have a lot of work to do before November. Thank you for your immediate support. Doc Marshall, U.S. Senator for Kansas Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: I need you standing in my corner right now. 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)
---
| Peter,
I'm Doug Mastriano, and I'm an America First conservative running for Governor of Pennsylvania.
But _I 'm not writing to you about Pennsylvania_, Peter. **This is about the _future of free and fair elections_ in this nation in 2024:**
* In 2020, **Pennsylvania 's Far-Left leadership _illegally_ rewrote our election laws** in the name of "Covid-19"...

* ...sacrificing our Election Integrity to **help Joe Biden and Kamala Harris win the White House.**

**If I don 't win the Pennsylvania Governor's race in November, _they 'll do the same thing again in 2024_**..._and conservatives will be shut out of the White House for good._
If you support **free elections in this nation** (and if you want to see a conservative have a _fair shot_ in 2024), **[I need you standing in my corner right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)**
**[Will you join the fight with $25 or more to fund this campaign and fuel this fight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)** | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)
---
My plan to secure Election Integrity and restore confidence in voting is simple but effective:
* Immediately **end all contracts with compromised voting machine companies,**

* **Appoint a Secretary of State with experience** in securing elections from fraud,

* **Ban the use of private funds** (like Zuckerbucks) designed to influence our elections.

My race here in Pennsylvania is **one of the biggest TOSS-UP races of 2022**...and the latest poll has me trailing by just a couple points: **49-46**.

Considering we're running against a career politician with deep pockets and the full support of the Democrat Establishment and their allies in the Leftist Media, **we 're _exactly_ where we need to be right now...but we've got a _lot_ of work to do between now and November.**

If you care about Election Integrity, Peter, we as conservatives have GOT to start electing people on a state-level who are willing to fight to secure this Republic.

**I 'm that guy here in Pennsylvania.** I've got the momentum, I've got the support, and I've even got President Trump's endorsement.

But I _can 't_ win without your help. **[Will you pitch in $25 or more to help me WIN and make sure the 2024 Presidential Election is SECURE?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)**

**[Pitch in $25 or more right away (every dollar helps!)>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)**
| | | [DONATE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60766810:JQvi4RoN_:m:1:3317145305:17FB6DCD59DB3046EE65A2DF6B5E4D09:r)

Doug Mastriano

subject: I need to reach every voter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Dear Peter,**

**My first piece of direct mail is about to reach voters’ mailboxes and it’s incredibly important to this campaign’s strategy.** Many of the “likely voters” in MD-06 can’t easily be reached via email, online ads, or even over the phone. For some rural or older voters - the only way they’ll hear from my campaign is via mail. _And direct mail was expensive!_

**Our campaign needs _every contribution possible_ so we can continue to reach as many voters as possible! [Please contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, or anything at all to help us broaden our reach.](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=f0146d9842&e=0faa9de128)**

This campaign already received over 730 donations. We are truly grassroots and everything we've achieved has been made possible by the generous support of hundreds of people!

The more voters hear about Rep. David Trone’s massive donations to radical, right-wing Republicans like anti-choice and anti-voting rights crusader, TX Gov. Greg Abbott, the more they understand that Trone’s top priority is himself, not us.

**_In contrast, many voters get excited when they learn about my candidacy!_

Vote by Mail and Early Voting have already started; if we can reach enough voters - we will win.**

**[So help me spread the word, would you?](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=1634b6a63e&e=0faa9de128)**

This campaign has been steadily picking up momentum and we’re going to keep building from now until election day on July 19th. Thank you for everything you do for this campaign.

Sincerely,
Ben
---
| | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
---
| **Our mailing address is:**
Ben Smilowitz for CongressPO Box 275Gaithersburg, MD 20884-0275
[Add us to your address book](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=b04c0a5ca8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=b04c0a5ca8).

---

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dz%2BSE%2Bnv6HpFt7QVS2kf1wYvXHFesMOJ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I wanted you to be among the first to know: We just launched a critical new ad about the need to protect every Senate vote for reproductive healthcare and freedom so we can prevent Mitch McConnell and the GOP from passing their nationwide abortion ban.
This ad emphasizes the urgency of this moment: Protecting and expanding Democratic Senate control is essential to preventing any further erosion of American women's fundamental human rights _and_ codifying Roe's long-held protections for women into federal law.
**The more voters who see this ad, the more we can mobilize our supporters to defend this seat and protect control of the Senate from those who would steal your privacy and personal liberty.[I hope you'll take a moment to watch, and then - importantly, if you support the message - chip in to help us keep broadcasting it to voters far and wide.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email-2?refcode=jtk1199-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email-2?refcode=jtk1199-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
Ads like this are a powerful tool to reach voters who will decide this race - and to be frank, Friend, this is a must-win state. Mitch McConnell only has to flip a single seat to take back Senate control, and the National Republican Senatorial Committee has already made me a target for defeat.
There is simply too much at stake to cede control of our democracy to an extremist Republican Party - a party that could keep filling the courts with far-right judges who will only continue their attacks on long-held freedoms. Indeed, in conservative Justice Clarence Thomas' concurring opinion overturning Roe, he suggested that the legal precedents protecting same-sex marriage and contraception should also be reconsidered by this extreme Supreme Court. **The Senate Republican campaign arm is armed with a giant war chest to make this radical agenda a reality - which is why I urgently need your support to ensure we can keep reaching voters with our new ad and win this race. **
My team tells me we need to raise another $15,000 by midnight tonight. I've counted on you in big moments before, and I know I can count on you to come through again today: **[So please, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare to help us keep our new TV ad on the air? Your support is essential to protecting this seat and keeping the Senate under Democratic control.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email-2?refcode=jtk1199-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email-2?refcode=jtk1199-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xW9vO%2Bx1LIOYnaB84mWfW9cJQPwB3uvZ&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Tonight’s Alexandria Birthday Celebration has been postponed until tomorrow, Sunday, 7/10/22.

clean_body: We will do everything we can to protect abortion access. | | | Peter, In the days immediately after the overturn of Roe v. Wade we made a promise to you and our other supporters: We will do everything we can to protect abortion access. Last week, that looked like turning out in force in the streets and — in some cases — getting arrested for civil disobedience. We won’t ever tell you that the only answer is to “just vote” in November – especially when so many of our elected representatives have consistently failed to protect our families and communities. Instead, this is our plan: 1. Organize to help more Working Families Party champions win their Democratic primaries from now until the fall — candidates who will stand boldly and fight for abortion rights. 2. Go all out to elect a Working Families Majority in Congress in November — that means electing enough candidates in the Senate to end the filibuster, and that means winning key races in places like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. 3. Pass legislation at the state level that guarantees abortion rights where we can, and makes Republicans answer for the Supreme Court’s actions where we can’t. 4. And keep up the fight at the federal level to protect abortion rights, take on the right wing judiciary, and reform the courts for as long as it takes. In solidarity, Team WFP P.S. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Derek Marshall
subject: Don’t Say Gay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
**Fight back against “Don’t Say Gay” bills.**

**[Donate to send LGBTQ+ Democrat Derek Marshall to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47611096/354964136/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220709_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTE3MGFlNC1hZmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyGpC5RKWFOMmin3GGEdd2oVH71ZaM4hTk4FwMZcy60=)**
As Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” law takes effect, teachers are told to take down photos of their partners. Universities are taking down anti-discrimination statements.
**Peter, I refuse to go backwards on LGBTQ+ rights.**
I didn’t come out as gay until my late 20s. I feared that if I showed my true identity, I would be judged, rejected, or discriminated against.
**The GOP can’t shove us back into the closet or strip us of our humanity. We exist. We love and are loved. We are productive citizens, we add value to our country, and we deserve equality. **
As a member of Congress, I’ll fight for LGBTQ+ Americans and vote for the Equality Act.
**[We need more pro-LGBTQ+ progressive candidates who will fight for the interests of all Americans. Can you contribute to my campaign? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47611097/354964137/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220709_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTE3MGFlNC1hZmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyGpC5RKWFOMmin3GGEdd2oVH71ZaM4hTk4FwMZcy60=)**
Everything about Don’t Say Gay is unfair, discriminatory, hateful, and dangerous.
More anti-gay and trans bills have already been proposed _this year_ than any other. We are all at risk and have been for a while. Now is the time to come together and organize ourselves for a better future.
Many in the LGBTQ+ community still face horrific discrimination and bullying. LGBTQ+ youth, and _all people_ , deserve to be supported and affirmed in their identity.
**Americans’ acceptance of LGBTQ+ people is at an all time high, but the Republican Party still targets us with bills like Don’t Say Gay as part of their culture war.**
**[I’m running against a Republican that voted NO on the Equality Act. Will you donate to my campaign to fight for rights for ALL?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47611098/354964138/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220709_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTE3MGFlNC1hZmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyGpC5RKWFOMmin3GGEdd2oVH71ZaM4hTk4FwMZcy60=)**
Love is love,
Derek Marshall

clean_body: Fight back against “Don’t Say Gay” bills. = As Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” law takes effect, teachers are told to take down photos of their partners. Universities are taking down anti-discrimination statements. Peter, I refuse to go backwards on LGBTQ+ rights. I didn’t come out as gay until my late 20s. I feared that if I showed my true identity, I would be judged, rejected, or discriminated against. The GOP can’t shove us back into the closet or strip us of our humanity. We exist. We love and are loved. We are productive citizens, we add value to our country, and we deserve equality. As a member of Congress, I’ll fight for LGBTQ+ Americans and vote for the Equality Act. = Everything about Don’t Say Gay is unfair, discriminatory, hateful, and dangerous. More anti-gay and trans bills have already been proposed this year than any other. We are all at risk and have been for a while. Now is the time to come together and organize ourselves for a better future. Many in the LGBTQ+ community still face horrific discrimination and bullying. LGBTQ+ youth, and all people , deserve to be supported and affirmed in their identity. Americans’ acceptance of LGBTQ+ people is at an all time high, but the Republican Party still targets us with bills like Don’t Say Gay as part of their culture war. = Love is love, Derek Marshall = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

Peter, being a fierce fighter for the vulnerable can quickly make you an enemy of the powerful and corrupt – especially when you refuse to be bought or bullied.

That’s why some of the biggest special interests in the country want to see me out of office, **_and they’ll be poring over my fundraising numbers the moment they’re locked in on Monday and made public, looking for any sign of weakness._**

**They’ll exploit any weakness they can find, so we can’t afford to fall short of our PUBLIC filing fundraising goal. I need to raise at least $20,000 before 11:59 p.m. on Monday, so please: [Will you rush a donation of $5 or more to my campaign for re-election before my July 11 public filing deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47615062/354986046/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk562-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2M1YWQ3ZC1kMmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZyYSdgiXf3PIvwvVAnXyOOk0MIByIVcQjYMqwt8cbs=)**

Special interests like Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and Big Polluters aren’t the only ones who want me out of office. The Republican Attorneys General Association, which raised over **_$6 million_** in the first quarter of the year, is determined to install attorneys general who will promote their extreme agenda throughout the country. And, if my fundraising numbers are weak, they may throw their multimillion-dollar war chest behind my GOP opponent.

Peter, we can’t allow the GOP to take back New York – **because if the fall of Roe v. Wade proves anything, it’s that none of our fundamental rights are truly safe with this current Supreme Court.**** **

I vow to do everything in my power to protect the voiceless in New York and beyond, but I can’t continue my work without YOUR help.**[Will you make a donation now to help me raise $20,000 before my public filing deadline and send a message to everyone about how strong this campaign is?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47615069/354986053/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk562-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2M1YWQ3ZC1kMmZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZyYSdgiXf3PIvwvVAnXyOOk0MIByIVcQjYMqwt8cbs=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Warnock’s campaign is printing money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I want to give you a taste of what we are up against. |
---

Friend,
---
Today officially marks the final stretch of this governor’s race with exactly 1 MONTH to go until Election Day.
---
**And to PROVE just how much momentum we have going into this final month,_I’ve set an ambitious new goal of raising $25,000 by midnight._**
---
Hitting this goal is going to take our largest grassroots surge to date._But I know we can do it – and to help us get there, generous Wisconsinites have offered to MATCH your contributions._

Roughly 10 months ago I announced I was running for governor, and __everything__ we’ve been fighting for each and every day since is on the line come Election Day.
---
_It all comes down to just one day, Friend – and I REFUSE to look back with any regrets._
---
Come August 9, you can rest assured, I will fight until the bitter end to ENSURE victory.
---
I’ve been a fighter my entire life...
---
**I’ve fought as a reporter exposing corruption, as a mother battling cancer, as lieutenant governor fighting the “woke” mob with Governor Walker, and now as YOUR candidate for governor to take back our great state from the radical Left.**
---
_But even those of us who fight until the bitter end can’t fight alone._
---
That’s why I’m asking you in this critical final stretch to help me fight all the way up through Election Day by ensuring we have the resources we need to get across the finish line.
---

clean_body: This is our campaign’s make-or-break moment. | Friend, Today officially marks the final stretch of this governor’s race with exactly 1 MONTH to go until Election Day. And to PROVE just how much momentum we have going into this final month,I’ve set an ambitious new goal of raising $25,000 by midnight. Hitting this goal is going to take our largest grassroots surge to date.But I know we can do it – and to help us get there, generous Wisconsinites have offered to MATCH your contributions. Roughly 10 months ago I announced I was running for governor, and everything we’ve been fighting for each and every day since is on the line come Election Day. It all comes down to just one day, Friend – and I REFUSE to look back with any regrets. Come August 9, you can rest assured, I will fight until the bitter end to ENSURE victory. I’ve been a fighter my entire life... I’ve fought as a reporter exposing corruption, as a mother battling cancer, as lieutenant governor fighting the “woke” mob with Governor Walker, and now as YOUR candidate for governor to take back our great state from the radical Left. But even those of us who fight until the bitter end can’t fight alone. That’s why I’m asking you in this critical final stretch to help me fight all the way up through Election Day by ensuring we have the resources we need to get across the finish line. Thank you for all your support, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Erika
subject: If you’re someone who cares about human rights and democracy, things feel very hard right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
I won’t sugarcoat it
|
---

---
Team,

I won’t sugarcoat it: If you’re someone who cares about human rights and democracy, things feel very hard right now. The Trump Supreme Court just dealt us a bunch of setbacks, and Republicans keep trying to undermine fair elections.

But I’m convinced we can’t stop fighting. _Because that’s exactly what they want._ | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47615177/354986429/1479146301?amount=20&refcode=20220710.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YzVhZDdkLWQyZmYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d-4Lpv7Hg63baA4xdS1qfyUnsjCp37s7sXtIzxhLKTM=)
---
[_Will you keep fighting alongside us? Chip in $5 or whatever you can._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47615178/354986430/1479146301?amount=20&refcode=20220710.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YzVhZDdkLWQyZmYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d-4Lpv7Hg63baA4xdS1qfyUnsjCp37s7sXtIzxhLKTM=)

When a lot of bad news comes at once, things can feel overwhelming. But it’s important to keep an eye on the long game. Since this spring, the NDRC has been planning more ways to help us _protect_ our democracy and _mitigate_ some of the worst SCOTUS rulings.

This strategy includes shining a spotlight on critical races, mobilizing our grassroots network, partnering with national and state-based allies, and investing resources to support pro-democracy candidates. But here’s the thing: We can’t carry out all our plans alone. This will take _all of us_ , working together.

**So team, can you chip in today to keep up the fight? Don’t let cheating Republicans win and destroy our democracy.**

## Confronting Politicians at Parades
### Saturday, July 9th, 2022
Friend, We've built a new studio at Liberty HQ and we're starting to try a couple new formats for videos. This week, we discuss Young Jesse Smith's famous photo with Governor Walz and what it was like to confront a politician at a parade. What Walz said to him is quite revealing of his true personality. **I'd love to hear your thoughts on this new video format. We're hoping to make this a regular thing soon. Please give it a watch:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbMHHHdzHCtd1ZCA3Qsll9leXE-qMuNEdVSozTD0trANA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trying_this_out&n=2)

body:
Whose side are you on?
| [](https://links.salazarforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=e75db5741fb047d5aa2be8fd250fe2e8&_e=5yV3R9DGbHyX9hRr73Fxmd1jlgTE3Z-N0e2wJFkgOP0cWPrP_GLOQzkC6Yr_WW6iDrlp-paspuRNmH4dxxXRkFpPVmLPumnA_bk_Rdmk98QQl_uQtusYsRy3_tLQw4pbxOyoNe2aJlFeMO5BW-mkdxkzl9r2Y63PQFXaZ2dWIhL5Dz4kTH16aJN1K3ctLrO9-hl0dlPbhcKXO0BC4eyVMw_r41ZZU_NCq8P1xlaXcqmfkzN2NcNSDThFoO0kS0lamzugdnAWaLKI_2kJt8apt2uWuvvsg_oIqfYlVZgrR3GpqAnkajQFIi-0V1bC3d-EpF10vPXN1yo-GUmhONyOFgySMcaDpHFo2mg9Jctw7mnoDdv342vjcXmxh6j1lJbZnYpwlT01OH-qIF4Mg9gmvpowMj4SjfC86RmTmNcixYj8M9V1J1CLnlNPA9tXTT8JruiXFU9p7tcc9kOZMN1nNf4ur8Vl8UBuaRENukunbjAEp8kiBHwfcmOtogl5jMJY)
---
Peter,
---
There’s just 4 months to go until Election Day, and the latest polling shows we’re in a close, two-point race with Democrat Annette Taddeo.
---
_But I don’t want to rely on polls from other organizations and campaigns. I want to make sure we’re collecting our own data as our campaign kicks into high gear._
---

name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Reminder: We did it! I knew we could!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
Important and time-sensitive request
| | | |
---
|
Peter,
We did it!
Thank you from the bottom of my heart for helping us rent 30 billboards throughout our great state!
We couldn't have done it without you.
---
Today, I humbly request another favor.
Even though we received overwhelmingly positive feedback on our debate performance yesterday, we know two things:

* Some voters don't watch debates.
* Our grassroots message is so POWERFUL, that any liberty-minded voters we reach, are likely to vote for us on August 2nd.

Here is our plan for reaching more voters:
We would like to send 300,000 of these direct mailers to primary voters.
This will cost upwards of $65,000.
---
---
[We need a few supporters who can pitch in $500, $1,000 or more, but we also need many supporters who can give $200, $100, $50, $20 or $10. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DLIAc2c63_SaWyU9y_g4zhjh2OnEJWNa6eKKNo0PHOvGzgNKJhNboysvb93mAHLQEdKH-9zCBnytu8SCsInGF8dRRfuGfSA3uZBpjv7HkyOymWgCyWpCCXhecvBVQvFbU_9FEhpHuL3eSUzokDXCOt9BcyGQkWaZ8-4dqH7rX5-8AdSSUnodN8Svf1itsYSaZ751WAtBGxP00K-XYSZ3_w==&c=Wd0BJ-GwgCjkOyJd0aLkm28-bLC762j4sqv38wZhPcbb2jXfnX1A5g==&ch=uRFzBfULbLQ2UOyce0MyPyED7rZla-o0tz6NVdTWJAHryfGh_IvI5w==)
Some of the candidates have unlimited financial help from the establishment, but we have always relied on the support of the grassroots, and you have never failed us.
The primary is 26 days away, and we are in the final stretch.
Will you donate to help us send out these mailers?
---
| [DONATE $100](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DLIAc2c63_SaWyU9y_g4zhjh2OnEJWNa6eKKNo0PHOvGzgNKJhNboysvb93mAHLQEdKH-9zCBnytu8SCsInGF8dRRfuGfSA3uZBpjv7HkyOymWgCyWpCCXhecvBVQvFbU_9FEhpHuL3eSUzokDXCOt9BcyGQkWaZ8-4dqH7rX5-8AdSSUnodN8Svf1itsYSaZ751WAtBGxP00K-XYSZ3_w==&c=Wd0BJ-GwgCjkOyJd0aLkm28-bLC762j4sqv38wZhPcbb2jXfnX1A5g==&ch=uRFzBfULbLQ2UOyce0MyPyED7rZla-o0tz6NVdTWJAHryfGh_IvI5w==)
---

Even though we received overwhelmingly positive feedback on our debate performance yesterday, we know two things: Some voters don't watch debates. Our grassroots message is so POWERFUL, that any liberty-minded voters we reach, are likely to vote for us on August 2nd. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Protecting democracy is its own reward
body:
Subscribe on YouTube: The Takedown w/ Cliff Schecter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I'll be blunt: [Please subscribe to my rapidly growing Youtube Channel](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcee81d43-9ac3-4508-b881-786b96b5f808/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), **_[The Takedown w Cliff Schecter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb20b67b-0a7f-41ca-bb46-89ffcdd66cd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**. From the January 6th treason to a radical-right-wing Supreme Court. Corrupted, gerrymandered state legislatures to governors who think they're kings. The Republican Party has put a pox on America's houses. I document this in real-time with [numerous daily satirical takedowns and righteous rants I post at the channel](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb59e369a-8e8e-454e-98c8-dd1553e495e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). That's why I launched the Youtube video-series. I've been a paid contributor on cable tv, a podcast host and have appeared on scores of shows. Communicating is a skill I honed over the years, and if I don't use it to fight for freedom--_RIGHT NOW, at this perilous moment_ \--then what was the point of it all? Also, video has a way of reaching people words often cannot, whether through humor, righteous anger or simply sharing important information. **[PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE TAKEDOWN W/ CLIFF SCHECTER!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1252128d-ec95-483d-8a4c-dd4fa69f4ed4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** So for me it made sense to share these[ regular takedowns](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e856267-96d1-4a6d-b689-685b735c4864/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of rancid Republicans and God-awful right-wing policies. I don't make a cent off the channel, and don't need to. **I****f my videos convince a few people, get a few more of our own to turn out to vote, playing any role in helping protect democracy is its own reward.** Yet, the quicker the channel grows, _the more Youtube itself recommends it and the more influence it can have_ on our politics. It's **_100% free_** [to subscribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T516ff734-727d-48dc-b91c-0484da0dc321/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Only costs a minute of your time to hit the subscribe button. Then watch the videos and if you think they'll make a difference, like them, comment on them _and share them with those who need to see them_. **[PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE TAKEDOWN W/ CLIFF SCHECTER!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbca98adf-834e-40b4-a491-680d600e0043/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **So...do me a favor and please subscribe to [The Takedown w/ Cliff Schecter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba187d12-e513-424a-9665-f12cb05b3e8e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**. Also, do me another favor and please have a wonderful evening and fantastic weekend. I can never let you know how thankful I am you've joined us in this fight. All my best, Cliff
---

body:
We can't let this happen

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a7fc63054956435fbe48ec097c313e84&_e=AW2n_X3NdPKDtGa-BGunAAAUG974l5mwZjf8-bsTQrH8AlM5lEyHYAhoouIzkZ4lzBTNAa8yCb-IGUckDYMjW_Nzky8i56U_R3nVzvAWtBHjXSVBodVkL2WquHNMunTIeyAfBik8HvwotNnRtoqeFAu8bzROo_CD0eoDQhIJLITRX9BOffdNsgAPdo-MLek3Asf_fL-GhvY0v7-klR01uSMhkWOcIGbxOBSFdZLboGEibnHOW7uY7O61GqUC_z3EXD8kIOmVupcPxY0rXtMCxS7nZOVbZ07EPia6IhQcE_VUUHpEo-lWYciZigCfEQNkFjfw5oRRYwPQx6d7JiIW_RA4H-QYA1Z6PGU2xTaEWXBt-eDMITG7dxN69FRtEHrf9nrg55uygd5LOgXfeQaGDg%3D%3D)

It's Gov. Ron DeSantis - and**I 'm FURIOUS. **

You know I don't send emails like this often, but we're facing the biggest deadline yet & we're OUT of time.

**What happens today will decide everything. **

I can't believe it: Joe Biden & Chuck Schumer dropped a whopping $20+ MILLION bucks to destroy my friend & our Nevada GOP nominee, Adam Laxalt, in the MOST important Senate race on the map.

If the Democrats beat us & keep this seat blue, it's all over.
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help by midnight tonight.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a7fc63054956435fbe48ec097c313e84&_e=AW2n_X3NdPKDtGa-BGunAAAUG974l5mwZjf8-bsTQrH8AlM5lEyHYAhoouIzkZ4lzBTNAa8yCb-IGUckDYMjW_Nzky8i56U_R3nVzvAWtBHjXSVBodVkL2WquHNMunTIeyAfBik8HvwotNnRtoqeFAu8bzROo_CD0eoDQhIJLITRX9BOffdNsgAPdo-MLek35R3RArGIga1IUhjBeQWuiLct7AoSHsMQ4j03XiZYdIZ_m_ZpZjIkxWuy4Qwaa9sfxpcYkYVN18MTuKlmaPc6GEvtZDxTF2j52XjMTUW4iiuiwLVt6ajaauVlp8UhGsYGFJ8tBgqoZrVGCCvLmOG6B5hwoCFyqM6pX6CPUHgScusEqtVFaEO6kjLcsLWsR9WigmVB56bgSAQIIOEt5syoCA%3D%3D)

---
**
This is our one chance to hand Biden, Schumer, and the liberal news media a crushing defeat.**

Since I won the Republican nomination six weeks ago, Senator Warnock and national Democrats have spent more than $2 million per week attacking me on TV. What I'm asking from you: I know that it's summertime and folks are busy - but the reality of the situation is that Election Day is 122 days from today; every day that we don't hit our fundraising target, we fall behind even further. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | Democrats may be energized right now, but I know that a wave of PATRIOTIC AMERICANS are ready to get involved, stop the Biden-Warnock agenda, and get our country back on the right track. Your friend in the battle, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Some good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Here’s the blunt truth: Our only chance to make the change that we need and people are demanding is by expanding our Senate majority.
#

Here’s the blunt truth: Our only chance to make the change that we need and people are demanding is by expanding our Senate majority.
There has been a lot of bad news lately. The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe_ was devastating, and Republicans are aggressively putting a target on more of our rights and freedoms — gay marriage, access to birth control, free and fair elections, and more.
The good news is that we have the opportunity to stop their attacks and protect our rights once and for all by flipping this seat and sending Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate.
Cheri is not afraid to stand up to Washington politicians like our opponent who will take us backward. She **_will not hesitate_** to cast the decisive vote to end the filibuster and secure abortion rights, LGBTQ+ equality, voting rights and more.
But winning this fight and taking on the special interests that want to keep the system rigged against us is going to be tough. It requires all of us to play a role.
[**Please, if you can, make a $3 donation to Cheri Beasley’s campaign to flip North Carolina today. Our opponent wants a total ban on abortion without exceptions. Every dollar helps us stop him from pushing that agenda in the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220709-2-ma&t=1&akid=1198%2E357359%2E87nwFN)

subject: LIVE POLL: Do you approve of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade?

body:
| | | **BREAKING via CBS News: "Americans react to overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ — most disapprove, call it step backward"**

_A new poll finds 83% of Democrats OPPOSE the ruling overturning_ Roe v. Wade _, but we need to confirm these numbers so we can take the fight to Republicans!_

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8539?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&akid=5149%2E9716520%2EHp3GJl)
**Do you approve of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8539?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&akid=5149%2E9716520%2EHp3GJl)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8539?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&akid=5149%2E9716520%2EHp3GJl)
---

Team -- Americans are FURIOUS about the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

A brand-new CBS News poll says most voters OPPOSE the ruling -- **_including an astounding 83% of Democrats_** \-- but that didn't stop Donald Trump’s far-right justices from eliminating the rights of women to make their own health care decisions.

**The American people are united in their outrage. Now is the time to fight back against anti-choice Republicans, so we need to know if you’re with us -- tell us BEFORE MIDNIGHT:**

**[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8539?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&akid=5149%2E9716520%2EHp3GJl)
Do you approve of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8539?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&akid=5149%2E9716520%2EHp3GJl)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8539?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-SCOTUSUpdate-DobbsApproval-Pros-sl1&akid=5149%2E9716520%2EHp3GJl)

clean_body: Striped it | | Friends, Thanks to all of you, I started this campaign swinging for the green and it was a stripe show for the rest of the primary! We won this primary by 34 strokes, and I’m not letting up to win the general. My far-left opponent is further left than you can hook a tee shot out of bounds. She’s North Carolina’s version of AOC – on the Green New Deal, abortion, radical election reform, higher taxes - the list goes on. We can either split fairways and break course records en route to Liberty, or we can struggle to get off the tee en route to Socialism. I’ll see you on the course! Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

As both a pediatrician in Adams County and a state representative, **Dr. Caraveo accomplished big things for Colorado families** by working to make life more affordable – _lowering the price of prescription drugs_ , _passing free full-day Kindergarten_ and _holding corporations accountable_.
In Congress, Dr. Caraveo will continue to fight for Coloradans. This November, with the support of working families from Commerce City up to Greeley and back again, we will make sure the voices of Colorado’s 8th District are heard loudly in the halls of Washington.

[**Now that Dr. Caraveo is officially the Democratic nominee, we need your help now more than ever. So, please, can you chip in $8 for CO-08 to kickstart the general election campaign and make sure we win in November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47616235/354991167/-610028210?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2022.07.09_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTlkMzc5OS1lMGZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BRlcXWvNpgmJ6S7SPyu2Vg-OjO9DzmzmzKXyzLQHaCM=)

We’re in this fight together.
Thank you for being a part of Team Caraveo.

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. Now, fundamental American rights are under attack, while costs are out of control. = = As both a pediatrician in Adams County and a state representative, Dr. Caraveo accomplished big things for Colorado families by working to make life more affordable – lowering the price of prescription drugs , passing free full-day Kindergarten and holding corporations accountable. In Congress, Dr. Caraveo will continue to fight for Coloradans. This November, with the support of working families from Commerce City up to Greeley and back again, we will make sure the voices of Colorado’s 8th District are heard loudly in the halls of Washington. = = We’re in this fight together. Thank you for being a part of Team Caraveo. | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | I’ve never lost an election. ** ** I’ve won three for state legislature and two for governor — one against a 30-year incumbent.

| | I know what it takes to win an election — and they all have one thing in common: **Starting early and sprinting all the way until Election Day.** **[That’s why this fight to help Republicans win in November has only just begun. The final 4 months between now and Election Day will be critical to helping conservatives cross the finish line.](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=c459fb8d7b8a418588aafb6df1ef4fb3&_e=u8lsNYc-kEw-40z5Kt2QgTQxL7X43NOUyUEYjUE6v_fjydQrQJiIaHnomjn1GqRZlZ33-fIvDaiJxVh4PJrOH5-sGLuPLTSX4sUoEHvD_AmPhZ-d0lwYxhjFJe-_aG46IbFc-l4at1i0V6srvLwm5TSy6me7wzsBnq8YqcT7MQBj1UeoiVFJ0tn6zoWJyTmFpTStm6gyujQjUqQr2BL2dfdNbSRUmluf8Em4kPQ9jbYDeXsvlxk8umK9jY1VnGu3gjoMQbGhAZsHYYGicZzx7g-riIkySPDX_nmPk_q-zDMG0tsLlv0xz503ZYJOnNm5EureUGY6A90VElEKoAeYqq9_rUmJQQWdycwTUni3xb9QJkufkZQq6N-fx3wwwwaG8aWokcRt1YFdQZtZOmTAQe0lk8hKZXsmpdlWYZOebzzUyUJrixvToFpbmfqJesP1) ** I started this mission early. I launched Stand For America PAC last January to endorse, train, advise, and financially support strong conservative candidates. We’re now totalling more than 40 candidates endorsed and we’re far from finished. Right now, I’m criss-crossing the country right now to build a conservative coalition of leaders who will defend our country. [**It’s why every member of my team plays a key role in winning this next election. And, it’s why I’m hoping you will be a part of my team starting right now. **](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=c459fb8d7b8a418588aafb6df1ef4fb3&_e=u8lsNYc-kEw-40z5Kt2QgTQxL7X43NOUyUEYjUE6v_fjydQrQJiIaHnomjn1GqRZlZ33-fIvDaiJxVh4PJrOH5-sGLuPLTSX4sUoEHvD_AmPhZ-d0lwYxhjFJe-_aG46IbFc-l4at1i0V6srvLwm5TSy6me7wzsBnq8YqcT7MQBj1UeoiVFJ0tn6zoWJyTmFpTStm6gyujQjUqQr2BL2dfqIF8ZAGE97MQ-Stf07dvn7kKlZRzObNTgHvee8sf6N479-cJDlV2n-pzpRY6ose1HjwKU2qEe6PMGir2YEAoitjPtvHnNZhH4TMzCTNxTkc_HTQHNXfoLWS6VnROrUh3Hfh9okciDUWi6Rzr8rp6gxxrsd0w_HXqQK_NLnBY7o_9uqU813NLLJXHUn3e4nWS3Z1OjH4YOQKCFPb109y_D_yqT-1qxB4isGoo_occ3D) Americans like you, friend, are exactly who we are standing for — it would mean the world to me to know you’re on my side as we make history and elect bold conservatives across the country. I’m spending my time this year campaigning alongside conservatives — everywhere from New Hampshire to Georgia to Iowa to Texas and more. **[Millions of conservatives have already joined our movement, and today, I want to reach out personally to ask for your support of Stand For America PAC and enlist your help in this next election.](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=c459fb8d7b8a418588aafb6df1ef4fb3&_e=u8lsNYc-kEw-40z5Kt2QgTQxL7X43NOUyUEYjUE6v_fjydQrQJiIaHnomjn1GqRZlZ33-fIvDaiJxVh4PJrOH5-sGLuPLTSX4sUoEHvD_AmPhZ-d0lwYxhjFJe-_aG46IbFc-l4at1i0V6srvLwm5TSy6me7wzsBnq8YqcT7MQBj1UeoiVFJ0tn6zoWJyTmFpTStm6gyujQjUqQr2BL2dc1GR5D0p9Slk81j7kGz1ykfrg66PUVvBkAM9BlNkRPw-S0QejOpuozs875PYkhJc46LhtfPuT2XX1hyRbt0cCSfENnTf-HK6HIPwhROPtUIB4drNxUiBDbHOrO0QxYtM_-J_O96F0saPzIt-AYKmuZBzcd15qvqvbnkxCaziXlU3RtiEvFvDJCXVXjAY6vYFkjgF3I3mOrcSk1oN5fJfHDXArxC4cAIGpyKgpK_JzII) ** When I left my role as UN ambassador, I promised to never stop standing for America. It’s what I’ve always done, and it’s what I’ll always do. You can help me continue to fulfill this promise by joining my team today and electing a red wave of conservatives in November. This is a huge undertaking. [**So, if you’re able to send more than $45 — say $65, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,500, or even the FEC maximum of $5,000 — I would be especially grateful.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=c459fb8d7b8a418588aafb6df1ef4fb3&_e=u8lsNYc-kEw-40z5Kt2QgTQxL7X43NOUyUEYjUE6v_fjydQrQJiIaHnomjn1GqRZlZ33-fIvDaiJxVh4PJrOH5-sGLuPLTSX4sUoEHvD_AmPhZ-d0lwYxhjFJe-_aG46IbFc-l4at1i0V6srvLwm5TSy6me7wzsBnq8YqcT7MQBj1UeoiVFJ0tn6zoWJyTmFpTStm6gyujQjUqQr2BL2dTyIIlcWc4QXnYdMG-ObWJ-KDDRVmXAm4Jl4e3BI0r_nGaHwe2YdXhMFCdfp7-ofAswVwfI29G_CyBgA7WPRhgZvJIoWUIeI2neTfwQiZx8XJl98UPwYQS55UF64xLGWqaru3ZOIaLKG7jCz2xNaTYhGJ2ZI0SA84u-ZBqGQbyT85BJ2QZwJ_V5M9zQl7j3DRBeuap_cc8-la_4lVNogIoviIgLZvX1sCxWY8QUAUikO) I need you on my team. My very best,

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. clean_body: | | | Friend, | | I’ve never lost an election. I’ve won three for state legislature and two for governor — one against a 30-year incumbent. | | | I know what it takes to win an election — and they all have one thing in common: Starting early and sprinting all the way until Election Day. I started this mission early. I launched Stand For America PAC last January to endorse, train, advise, and financially support strong conservative candidates. We’re now totalling more than 40 candidates endorsed and we’re far from finished. Right now, I’m criss-crossing the country right now to build a conservative coalition of leaders who will defend our country. Americans like you, friend, are exactly who we are standing for — it would mean the world to me to know you’re on my side as we make history and elect bold conservatives across the country. I’m spending my time this year campaigning alongside conservatives — everywhere from New Hampshire to Georgia to Iowa to Texas and more. When I left my role as UN ambassador, I promised to never stop standing for America. It’s what I’ve always done, and it’s what I’ll always do. You can help me continue to fulfill this promise by joining my team today and electing a red wave of conservatives in November. This is a huge undertaking. I need you on my team. My very best, Nikki Haley | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. To pre-order your signed copy of "If You Want Something Done..." chip in $45 or more. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. subject: The War, Part III: War Is A Time For Fighting
