body:
# Help Firebrand Fight to Win
[Donate Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-butkkjt-ihhjkhtyud-r/)
# Watch: War Is A Time For Fighting
[](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-butkkjt-ihhjkhtyud-y/) | **New Episode**
# Real Independence
**July 8th **This episode emphasizes the Founding Fathers' perspectives on true independence for our nation, including the necessity for strong protectionist trade policy. The further we drift from economic policies that the Founding Fathers considered desirable when designing our government, the further our leaders risk the prosperity and well-being of the American people. [Listen on Spotify](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-butkkjt-ihhjkhtyud-j/) [Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-butkkjt-ihhjkhtyud-t/)
---

**New Episode **
# The Political Lesson of Dobbs
**June 29th** Molly discusses Dobbs and how this pro-life victory underscores the importance of fighting at every level to reclaim our country. Plus, she discusses Paul Clement's departure from Kirkland and the opportunity for America First attorneys, and Sidney Powell's clash with the Texas Bar over her license. [Listen on Spotify](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-butkkjt-ihhjkhtyud-i/) [Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-butkkjt-ihhjkhtyud-d/)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The enemy is within
body:
[****](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnHaATN53cugJmDoZtw2A4uaTgqI21btEB0qgamzkTB_tiGYgqCpOm_kYE-pXUfGu1Ptz02HinAOlw4iN6iiInoL9u3mdLzl24FVQ4n41jb9-9fNmRXzms4FsIQtjQiO-JiBWOptbnMHtO9aRwFHOhZovFhEnF00qPLY3wbs1nK0zSr4ovI3QHJ34IUpX2QZJUfTQ6dHCNDC7HI-ZqpmkHumw%3D%3D)

Friend,
**Our country is currently facing a great threat.** A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize.
This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: _stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history._
A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but -- perhaps in an even more sinister way -- tear down the American spirit itself. **They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education.**
Over the past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has attempted to _**brainwash our children**_ into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country.
We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while _**trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution.**_
[**> > DONATE NOW TO HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT <<**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnHRkBMj-T8SW_bNI9VCXFXn8GcWU157CpQeDDfTwa5GsJHk6b5StbJUaBe1J7m9_xlhsiggKpOo0_KbhWMY1vSyhiqDLcvX_rfCoSxKQ-hZOs3wT5vj-WsCXXw6qHpacr9Pb9qsn9fUxA-rf4pEoXCjJj-p_fFYA4j4nsGEaZ_Raet-_OJtrfVbPTUkWSDJbqFX8sfe425ct9VR8Ge3oz6oA%3D%3D)
We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate."
We watched _**Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth**_ - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square.
We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time.
**Well,****Friend****, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over.**
[**> >> FIGHT BACK <<<**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnH28gltl7T9bLf_ShTodxvsZnejhJu90NAf7Tm3pq96l7VdKjHzSQVV_cVq0df0XPhR6EARCF-boE1yWktdJ-DNiJEw_vx56uKCN6OGbaIWSY-FSq1FMdhIPfN_dugjd9eBvkFAuQxHVXyPcLD4zh4vI3BWBCrr56P7YdTPmIffBLitsC5Nr_QdLtv_buNYd8awpq33K6Cg3CnKpnVNXywmA%3D%3D)
This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. But all hope is not lost.
**We The People still have a say.** We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives.
**I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down.**
Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater.
[**If you 've been waiting for the right time to get off the sidelines and fight for the rights you know were given to man by God Himself - the time is NOW.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnHQwbOF_coQ2u9NEw0_RtuSZHeBvo31wyCPFXmpxi_N2-SVsEPKldJ0rup1nWWRyLP5R8txtOcP3HlGlPCSHVfAs5TiJVlv1X3vhSVJCcDHJWn6arLo1UDZE738bZFERlrfkFve5bIvSPffIcGLiSh5fcmnbISGd5Qv-E1nBGZTvQgWxE7VfBQmNyUBXvHViIEnFhi-60zwPEn5cJhfxRSJw%3D%3D)
[**If you 're with me, **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnH_VpFUWjkpMWsY0jlsMQl-qR9bPNinSgkL_6VD6gL2_mvrT771M0LeugsmipZsxRtqZggIWLUd0lSkiKum4jqzwi6NGharbQXRuVuI5Fts48QycSGZpJ0Y5MCLOEDm08qPfZlKEKuI9ASwObrPTbK0gkmWzWi5T89pD5wbL0iKlRu1JrHg8xgRT92MYIfvXO6vMdqAlG_WtjiwgjTwzK3gg%3D%3D)[**Friend****, chip in any amount to help me defeat this enemy.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnHaS2ShXCnK2Y39RxsYSlSE1NZ_dq3BueREbN_vTICB18FepDNZRv6TFbaSMTrqmTto6LEXrsqUGS0jHc10RqbJIv7mUMzuvqLDBf3nPvxSY3iU82RYX2g5rjAwYMPPKOiH-MxbOPXXUNfForUCIj7S5XCauKH_S2KYuLy97xjEvkrTVx7cC62vnPz6QLvQpSwFxQ19WQ8J-Z4P5AHH9AUZw%3D%3D) I can't do it without you. I promise you; I will _**never**_ stop fighting.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnH4k7rr1AYMjmK0VWPehnCghedBtEjjosC0WE-nPexAu_jioYpYBSbgoiwcAz4uG1hBikHv3x4p99dO1HWac36IZH0H_RzNCNbjCzIdGwjtbdErpgFRBC94izg5Cp_AAwjLQNwQbJmrRxO_Bc0vr-OBnmakYf7hgzJyWGyACnpKKRv7DITVPMzkU9gv4wWGS04DJHtcegh1eDlqJx1A2W_vw%3D%3D "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=37852ecfea8b4aa6960b7de539a8d196&_e=7B1OnVW_By3qRfdJfEyEXnMaPEviqogmgtw7-adFC_OJjjDhzXuyaID3nsXA_RjUlkSBQV86qhFjJBaCgJ1xSB1SCeuu6BsgP3rXGMg_WQf_6D9tWkYae4f56Nn5xnNtJ2jnTgKyLlPNnUxFzRvLPpD3ipTEQApiR3Z-P0b7Rk1r8XZ0hWj15sKEBFWritnHFU7CbxfzGs6eNbFn4Q46432mGfoPqTMCJE5xyRszD_7ncNBNi5gbaAOkNPnrAjbPK56GQ3pPa84hYjFquhEa5sI1U50447VMQiNTGCIekTH1yUA7Bi5L8JqNXIplljdmHqU6n4Co0koqRcxbrJvekU5Emh_DI80rBiB4yhvu0-U9wGQLExl1FhLT8aAkaW-o5P4g4HAE970rGFcFuKZYAw%3D%3D)

They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education. Over the past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has attempted to brainwash our children into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country. We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution. We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate." We watched Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square. We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time. Well,Friend, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over. This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. But all hope is not lost. We The People still have a say. We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives. I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down. Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater. I can't do it without you. I promise you; I will never stop fighting. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "CHIP IN NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| Team, earlier this week, a ballot initiative to protect abortion rights in Arizona failed to get enough signatures. **But that does not mean the fight to protect these rights is over.**

It does mean that now more than ever, _we have to elect pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot this November._ With Maricopa County being the most populous in Arizona, it makes the Maricopa County Attorney’s election key to our fight for protecting reproductive rights in Arizona.

Julie Gunnigle has promised to use prosecutorial discretion, and as your next Maricopa County Attorney, **she will not prosecute individuals procuring an abortion or doctors providing an abortion.** Her opponents have vowed to enforce the law no matter the cruelty or cost to our state.

**[Team, protecting reproductive rights is a multi-level approach in our state. We must elect people at all levels of government, including the county attorney’s office, in order to make sure medical professionals and their patients are not prosecuted for seeking care. Can you split a donation of $10 between the Arizona Democratic Party and Julie Gunnigle’s campaign to make sure we have that protection at all levels?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yBqgqs_69s5Av3COot1u9S757p-dAYCpHKGZlOHhvoz-8cO5OMAkbdyoYaIr0avsldxsAsIISWxxF9ekdPTWBYHAKu5DrtxFpHU1vVHMIDCcbF4oSwI5zXhjxx9IrtWC1_iWrkxIYLhVfPSBvcEyWvALGSStMSmP1h_yNpudTyt1aYmPEiMosg33Q0w65gXVPdo6Pw-7MbkwNetNtu637yX3C9VQPPNHfMMTKEruV0Sy71A9ozFBEu0L4l8spupgITxsVR48pYXPNsKcZh0l4-eNm_4ZeP_HjZKEIwTC_8D_HUOy0G2YAucEgsgb42j9gXEk1A2ksNA5rO2ippSgTCyQr3xjF6q-cQZUGVcFC-FpCw_Rgt7s8vKSY0N4jss847G9buhkkMb4ZszxB2y-qf4LHLOVY5WSCfxnn7G6bu_iO94KFaa1rM-99LGK6DsL459g2ikLoP1bxRQBt7lx58QVIXETreTNZmTQ19jT3jXg/3nl/LRTrLmxJQwuuZsMuPIErwg/h1/WiX7HtBCX1YCWD7ea3SJywcNE56ndB80SESwMuTBqVQ)** [

**It's simple: if we don't win this race, Arizonans in Maricopa County will be prosecuted and imprisoned for their personal health care decisions.** As the next Maricopa County Attorney, Julie will never use her political power and taxpayer dollars to criminalize pregnant people, their families, or health care providers for seeking or providing abortion care.

Protecting this right in our most populous county will help protect Arizonans in all 15 counties. It’s so important that we have pro-choice proponents at all levels here in Arizona while Republican extremists try to send us back centuries.

**[Team, can you split a donation of $10 between Arizona Democrats and Julie Gunnigle’s campaign right now to help us continue to build momentum for November and protect reproductive rights here in Arizona? clean_body: | | | We need local officials who will protect our rights. | | | Team, earlier this week, a ballot initiative to protect abortion rights in Arizona failed to get enough signatures. But that does not mean the fight to protect these rights is over. It does mean that now more than ever, we have to elect pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot this November. With Maricopa County being the most populous in Arizona, it makes the Maricopa County Attorney’s election key to our fight for protecting reproductive rights in Arizona. Julie Gunnigle has promised to use prosecutorial discretion, and as your next Maricopa County Attorney, she will not prosecute individuals procuring an abortion or doctors providing an abortion. Her opponents have vowed to enforce the law no matter the cruelty or cost to our state. It's simple: if we don't win this race, Arizonans in Maricopa County will be prosecuted and imprisoned for their personal health care decisions. As the next Maricopa County Attorney, Julie will never use her political power and taxpayer dollars to criminalize pregnant people, their families, or health care providers for seeking or providing abortion care. Protecting this right in our most populous county will help protect Arizonans in all 15 counties. It’s so important that we have pro-choice proponents at all levels here in Arizona while Republican extremists try to send us back centuries. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Arizona Democratic Party and Julie Gunnigle will go through immediately: We won’t stop fighting for you, Arizona Democrats Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwab for SOS, Matthew Goddard, Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Today is a very special day:

**Scott turns 50 years old!**

Scott has been working hard to earn your vote and raise money to keep [our TV ad](https://scottschwab.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=637dedc6f5c04616f44b83bbf&id=a1febf3e3e&e=e4cd931cf2) on the air. For his birthday, we would like to surprise him by meeting our fundraising quarter deadline early.

Will you help Scott celebrate turning 50 by contributing $50?

subject: re: my first TV ad

body:
Friend, I just launched my very first TV ad, and the response has been incredible! We’re spreading our bold message for change to Arizona voters – but we have a problem:
| | |
---
Friend, I just launched my very first TV ad, and the response has been incredible! **We’re spreading our bold message for change to Arizona voters – but we have a problem:

With time running out before the midnight fundraising deadline, we need to raise another $2,386 to keep our new TV ad on the air. [Will you rush $5 right now so we can keep this ad live and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614701/354983714/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk781-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGVkYjRjZS1jYWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_BuXPua3Uu9NKHtbFwSXVHk5EbZEkYBLpWogeUWzgBw=)**
And we are taking the fight to Spanish airwaves too. I will not let what happened in TX, happen to AZ Democrats – that’s why we launched our Spanish-language ad focused on AZ Latinos, who we will need to win up and down the ticket. I'm the only bilingual Latino candidate, and this ad is a game changer!
Right now, the GOP is spending MILLIONS and flooding the airwaves with TV ads, all so they can elect our pro-Trump extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), and keep Arizona red. Simply put, they’re scrambling.

They know we can win this race and flip Arizona blue – and experts from Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight to POLITICO agree. But we’re going to need an outpouring of grassroots support to keep our TV ads live and keep making the critical investments that will decide this race.

[**So I’m urgently asking: Friend, will you chip in $5 or more right now to keep my brand-new TV ad on the air so we can flip Arizona blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47614702/354983715/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk781-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGVkYjRjZS1jYWZmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_BuXPua3Uu9NKHtbFwSXVHk5EbZEkYBLpWogeUWzgBw=)

* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: Millions of people are living with Long Covid
body:
#
Peter,
A just and equitable pandemic recovery must include the millions of people living with Long COVID, a community whose voices and suffering have been ignored for too long.
Across the country, millions of people have been living with the physical and mental anguish of Long COVID for months or even years.
**Long COVID has had a prolonged impact on many of our most vulnerable individuals and families** —particularly in Black, brown, and historically marginalized communities. It’s past time that these people get the care they deserve and need.
[**Will you send a letter to your member of Congress right now asking them to co-sponsor this legislation that will help people who are living with Long Covid?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111132?t=1&akid=24216%2E1203867%2EOxKEyO)
**[Send Your Letter](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111132?t=2&akid=24216%2E1203867%2EOxKEyO)**
By helping folks with Long COVID get critical treatment right in their communities, the _TREAT Long COVID Act_ will save lives and support our long-term recovery from this pandemic. The legislation will fund the expansion of Long COVID Clinics and ensure that health care providers—including community health centers and local public health departments—have the resources to care for Long COVID patients.
Our long haulers deserve accessible and affordable medical care and treatment now, and you can help make it a reality.
[**Please send a letter to your member of Congress right now, asking them to support this critical legislation.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111132?t=3&akid=24216%2E1203867%2EOxKEyO)
Thank you for taking action today.
In solidarity,
Ayanna Pressley

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=4&akid=24216%2E1203867%2EOxKEyO) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=5&akid=24216%2E1203867%2EOxKEyO) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220709-24216-footer&t=6&refcode2=24216_1203867_OxKEyO&akid=24216%2E1203867%2EOxKEyO)**
---

body:
You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – but we don’t. |
---
Fellow patriot,

In the history of the United States of America, only one member of the Supreme Court has been impeached by the House of Representatives - **in 1804.**

But if Democrats – **namely AOC** – have their way, Justice Thomas would have already been impeached if this weren’t an election year.

And because it’s an election year, it’s our duty to tell you just how important It is that we flip the Senate Republican. _**Why?**_ Because if House Democrats move to impeach Justice Thomas over his wife’s political activity – **which would be a heinous mistake on their part** – a Republican Senate could block his removal from the Supreme Court.

You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – **but we don’t**. Let’s not learn the hard way that we cannot sleepwalk through a midterm just because we think we’ve got the upper hand.

If you support Justice Thomas and want a Republican Senate in place to protect him from future House impeachment efforts, **[then we’re asking you to donate $1 right now to help us elect as many Republicans to the Senate this November as possible.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=99131ffac1ef4609abadbe72c0f09a08&_e=3QT7EG_wVGlsKRMzLmIMnQAvahgg_HnJZ1wW3EU4vcrOHyYpsdeHAbttXjvQhVNYkufNHvbP6kQxS-AoKMGSL7ONtER0O6dDpmbseCt9Nh1HvdfrXHTVl8iR6aO8znHAGRHG-RLiQSEtp2wsrRdFzd6o9VTab-lorfd8aCeScHi1ARwz_srobSHeqxfB3rOPUKBt52zhxH0te9bHFJI0KPRgao3JENvZhA3IJK9jnURf4YDvkxl8HmxGY8VzOpEOgEm-ALQ3bQ8NZZZscWuD87a8nJ0RLaKwqoTXqjMJkvAPGr0YSEyAUg3ktZbOtxqAskCzylLI0sxxs055t048fPDAJ8PLVVssWHN7S69UvumzXvqOsQFehL7a5WCRaDfaYpnb_h8QrW4H5c7b5WFZUkqIstRTOy2DVNnB6O78qPI3Z5u8OIqSup9vhJvwSZtLr8uyy_aUDZvQdk02tHontGywNr6-ftAfNBMFKLlTIf5akXOiZzt4kp1IgYv2emHi)**

subject: I am proud to endorse...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=125079be7c&u=6bffc464e27eec80ec7c54f98&id=c60a2df6e1)
---
|
---
**Thank You for Your Support**
|
---
Thank you to everyone who volunteered and sacrificed for the campaign. I am humbled and honored to have stood with so many great patriots in our fight to _make America great again and to take liberty to the halls of Congress_. Though the outcome was not what I hoped, t _he blessing was in the journey_ of meeting you and hearing your stories. I will take all the stories and experiences with me on my next journey and I am excited to see what the Lord has for me next.I hope you will [**follow me on Facebook**](https://JohnBennettForCongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bffc464e27eec80ec7c54f98&id=ef2a95a5d9&e=125079be7c) so we can keep in touch and keep up the . I _**also**_ encourage you to check out these two liberty organizations that endorsed me and fight the everyday freedoms of all Oklahomans. [Oklahomans for Health & Parental Rights ](https://JohnBennettForCongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bffc464e27eec80ec7c54f98&id=48b5b8927a&e=125079be7c) [Oklahomans for 2nd Amendment](https://JohnBennettForCongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bffc464e27eec80ec7c54f98&id=12c966a188&e=125079be7c)
| [Follow Me on Facebook](https://JohnBennettForCongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bffc464e27eec80ec7c54f98&id=5a8b52f7a6&e=125079be7c)
---
|
---
# Vote Josh Brecheen on August 23
Many of you have asked, who I will be endorsing for the runoff election on August 23. I believe Josh Brecheen is the true conservative choice in Oklahoma's 2nd Congressional race to represent this God-blessed-constitutional-republic. To have a true America-first agenda, we must have leaders willing to put themselves second to convenience, fame, and politics as usual. Josh will serve with integrity and consistency, upholding the constitution and biblical values, and has the record to prove it from his self-term-limited time in the State Senate. Josh Brecheen is the real deal, a brother, a friend, and a constitutionalist. Josh has my formal endorsement and full support. Join us in sending a constitutional conservative to Washington D.C. and learn more about Josh here.
| [I want to send a Constitutional Conservative to D.C.](https://JohnBennettForCongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bffc464e27eec80ec7c54f98&id=6428fab4f8&e=125079be7c)
---
May God bless Oklahoma and America!
|
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Are state legislatures going to decide presidential elections? They might. Help us elect good Democrats to them.
body:
The small dollar donation that can make a big impact
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, this is really important to think about. Picture this: Democrats win the 2024 presidential election, but a Republican is inaugurated in 2025. What do I mean? Imagine it's 2024, we all turn out, vote Democratic and win a huge electoral majority. Then state legislatures around the country convene and decide they disagree, overrule the voters, and send their electoral slates for Donald Trump, Michael Flynn or Marjorie Taylor Greene to Washington. This is not just a fantasy. I wish it were. This could happen. The same Supreme Court that forced a 10-year old little girl to leave Ohio so she wouldn't have to carry a rapist's child has agreed to take a case, Moore v Harper, that could end with their declaring state legislative supremacy. A ridiculous and radical notion, authoritarian to its core, this would mean the will of gerrymandered Republican state legislatures can decide which electoral votes count, no matter for whom their constituents voted. It is pure insanity. And it absolutely could happen. [**Can you please join me, Stacey Abrams, Michelle Obama and other concerned Democrats in doing all we can to "keep it," by supporting the DLCC right now with a donation of $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5719c7a9-6546-45e7-aabb-31b363905305/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is why even though it's not as sexy nor as covered on cable news, WE MUST win control of as many state legislatures as possible. It means supporting the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC), tasked with helping win state legislative seats across the country. **Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama just launched a huge campaign to raise funds for the DLCC, and we'd like to do our part to pitch in to winning these crucial races, which could determine if Republicans or Democrats control t****he state senate in Michigan, ****Minnesota, Colorado, Oregon and Nevada, ****the state house in Alaska and both the state house and state senate in Maine.**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC LEGISLATIVE CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52fc1efa-c1eb-402d-9ecc-b359f2d8d554/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I can't stress how important it is that we take these chambers--all within a few seats of going either way. It not only builds a bench of talent (President Obama got his start as a state senator) and decides important policies in the states, **but can be a bulwark against Republican attempts to corrupt the 2024 election, declaring themselves victors when they lose the popular and electoral vote.** As Benjamin Franklin walked out of Philadelphia's Constitution Hall in 1787, an onlooker asked him whether we'd be "a republic or a monarchy." Franklin's rejoinder has echoed across time: "A republic. If you can keep it." [**Can you please join me, Stacey Abrams, Michelle Obama and other concerned Democrats in doing all we can to "keep it," by supporting the DLCC right now with a donation of $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c549073-78a5-4f1f-9827-ce6787efc296/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your tireless devotion to democracy. Cliff

clean_body: The small dollar donation that can make a big impact | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, this is really important to think about. Picture this: Democrats win the 2024 presidential election, but a Republican is inaugurated in 2025. What do I mean? Imagine it's 2024, we all turn out, vote Democratic and win a huge electoral majority. Then state legislatures around the country convene and decide they disagree, overrule the voters, and send their electoral slates for Donald Trump, Michael Flynn or Marjorie Taylor Greene to Washington. This is not just a fantasy. I wish it were. This could happen. The same Supreme Court that forced a 10-year old little girl to leave Ohio so she wouldn't have to carry a rapist's child has agreed to take a case, Moore v Harper, that could end with their declaring state legislative supremacy. A ridiculous and radical notion, authoritarian to its core, this would mean the will of gerrymandered Republican state legislatures can decide which electoral votes count, no matter for whom their constituents voted. It is pure insanity. And it absolutely could happen. This is why even though it's not as sexy nor as covered on cable news, WE MUST win control of as many state legislatures as possible. It means supporting the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC), tasked with helping win state legislative seats across the country. Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama just launched a huge campaign to raise funds for the DLCC, and we'd like to do our part to pitch in to winning these crucial races, which could determine if Republicans or Democrats control the state senate in Michigan, Minnesota, Colorado, Oregon and Nevada, the state house in Alaska and both the state house and state senate in Maine. | | | | | | I can't stress how important it is that we take these chambers--all within a few seats of going either way. It not only builds a bench of talent (President Obama got his start as a state senator) and decides important policies in the states, but can be a bulwark against Republican attempts to corrupt the 2024 election, declaring themselves victors when they lose the popular and electoral vote. As Benjamin Franklin walked out of Philadelphia's Constitution Hall in 1787, an onlooker asked him whether we'd be "a republic or a monarchy." Franklin's rejoinder has echoed across time: "A republic. If you can keep it." Thank you for your tireless devotion to democracy. subject: have you seen our new ad, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

This week, we launched an exciting new TV and digital ad featuring
Stacey’s colleagues from her time in the state legislature. All of them
worked alongside Stacey in the state legislature to ensure that Georgians
of all backgrounds and zip codes had the opportunity to thrive.

One thing they’re clear on: Stacey is exactly what Georgia needs right
now. But with polls showing us tied with Brian Kemp, we need to get this
ad in front of as many voters as possible to make sure they know about
Stacey’s record of delivering on behalf of Georgians.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1496?refcode=sa_em_220709_B4_Ad_S1_T1_TA_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=910%2E1862389%2Eum8d9w ]Watch our new ad, and then rush a $5 donation to help us
get it in front of voters across the state >>

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1496?refcode=sa_em_220709_B4_Ad_S1_T1_TA_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=910%2E1862389%2Eum8d9w ]DONATE

Stacey always wants to see how the state can do better for its people.
That’s why she worked with Republicans to stop the largest tax increase in
Georgia history, and why she worked across the aisle to save universal
pre-school in Georgia. Don’t just take it from us — Stacey’s former
colleagues call her “the most qualified person” to be governor.

But Brian Kemp has already hit the airwaves with negative smears about
Stacey. We need to keep this ad on the air if we’re going to drown out his
attacks with Stacey’s positive vision.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1496?refcode=sa_em_220709_B4_Ad_S1_T1_TA_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=910%2E1862389%2Eum8d9w ]That’s why we’re relying on this grassroots team,
Derek. Can you make your
first investment in
our campaign today to help us keep this ad running?

Thank you,

Team Abrams

name: Tim
subject: I need to confess...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4544%2E3611125%2E9ad7JH ][IMG]

I have a confession, folks.

I hate political TV ads. Like, really hate them. I can’t even count the
number of times I’ve been sitting at home watching my beloved Browns play
on a Sunday in the fall, only to be overwhelmed by the non-stop campaign
ads during Every. Single. Freaking. Commercial. Break.

But here’s another confession: TV ads are critical for campaigns like
ours. It’s the BEST way to spread our message to as many Ohioans as
possible while keeping up with the millions of dollars national
Republicans are spending to elect right-wing extremist JD Vance.

I’ve come to think of TV ads as a necessary evil. And right now, we need
to hit our $150,000 Ads Fund goal if we want ANY shot of preventing the
REAL evil (also known as anti-choice, anti-democracy JD Vance) from
stepping anywhere near the Senate floor.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16229?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4544%2E3611125%2E9ad7JH ]So, could you do me a favor and chip in to help us fund our next round
of TV ads? I promise we’ll even try to make our ads enjoyable to watch so
you don’t get as annoyed as I do next time one pops up on your screen.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16229?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4544%2E3611125%2E9ad7JH ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16229?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4544%2E3611125%2E9ad7JH ]Donate $50

Thanks.

—Tim

name: Christie
subject: I was impressed by your responses >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/8421?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220709-Christie-StrategyGroupRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220709-Christie-StrategyGroupRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=5145%2E9716520%2EMLM6HT)
---
Hi team -- I’ve reviewed this community’s recent survey answers and want you to know that I was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Senate Majority Strategy Group by answering this survey.**

Now that we are in the homestretch to the midterm elections, the handful of folks in this group will provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and help solidify the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Jersey Shore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
“HEY DR. OZ, WELCOME HOME TO NJ! ❤️ JOHN. ”
#
Hi, it’s John.
Sorry to interrupt your beautiful Saturday. But I was wondering if I could get your help trolling Dr. Oz down the Jersey Shore this weekend.
Tomorrow, our campaign is running an airplane banner up + down South Jersey beaches with the following message:
**“HEY DR. OZ, WELCOME HOME TO NJ! ❤️ JOHN.”**
Aerial trolling, Derek!!!!! I’m told it’s gonna look something like this. 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48152?refcode=em20220709-6465&t=1&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)
The banner will fly from Cape May to Brigantine on one of the biggest vacation weekends of the year. It will literally reach *thousands* of beachgoers at the shore, where so many PA families go to vacation every year.
**[We’re only a few hundred bucks away from securing tomorrow’s final flight path. Can you chip in just $15, $10, or even $5 to help me lock in our plane plans?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48152?refcode=em20220709-6465&t=2&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)**
**[Donate to John's Aerial Trolling Fund](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48152?refcode=em20220709-6465&t=21&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)**
Btw — If epic trolling isn’t your cup of tea, Derek, I 💯% understand. Instead, I would be incredibly grateful if you donated here to directly help fund our General Election digital organizing efforts: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220709-3**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48164?t=22&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220709-6465-footer&t=23&refcode2=6465_434096_7_lJOb&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=6465%2E434096%2E7_lJOb)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Senate GOP
subject: Impeaching is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – but we don’t. |
---
Fellow patriot,

In the history of the United States of America, only one member of the Supreme Court has been impeached by the House of Representatives - **in 1804.**

But if Democrats – **namely AOC** – have their way, Justice Thomas would have already been impeached if this weren’t an election year.

And because it’s an election year, it’s our duty to tell you just how important It is that we flip the Senate Republican. _**Why?**_ Because if House Democrats move to impeach Justice Thomas over his wife’s political activity – **which would be a heinous mistake on their part** – a Republican Senate could block his removal from the Supreme Court.

You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – **but we don’t**. Let’s not learn the hard way that we cannot sleepwalk through a midterm just because we think we’ve got the upper hand.

If you support Justice Thomas and want a Republican Senate in place to protect him from future House impeachment efforts, **[then we’re asking you to donate $1 right now to help us elect as many Republicans to the Senate this November as possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4896261ca3744f2886c273e2c782cc28&_e=Wvz1sX5tHbzj_azug7eFDZa92zSFCjme7dPJlfa2nXolG_FHP0y5vfkzbgNKtswwe3wjJs3HOMDDc6p9i5d99OlA84HL_xlmZmNbJKoHnzFtxHhK6Wn6029uH6nv4dED6SKXST0EFWWUrHNdXmuEgp3wGsDGwEZM1L0yD0ZJxUWmkwmPLIM-JXvmURITtxENnaznawhjVwUCj_L7QzCiapKBJY7elvThNDJCkV9HV_13buwzdykSmDbGBbwgxqcONxXX2nu6IHyiJ6YQbXxdnnjT_FQEJ587vFhQc_Ok1XYsqPDuawy7iPRu8T13F4m0ozYAuwmZnTK93-bZ-GIlhW_8U1z71ayBMB4IemMqLlFxO4NQIvfrjPbUPo4nCsV-N26ViwruAWg4nZX3JdkAkCVR6ANRo3zKXZ40HgRftvCXU4F6nqjZxreunxeDT1RhT-KkJs3mkHdLC45GyYcU7GxawwltNbqAX4hjBtk_-3dfZCqdOrBjHUQAnyjF1YDS)**
